https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
What’s happening in the special election for Tennessee’s 7th District could rewrite the balance of power in the U.S. House – and we need to move now.
Cook Political just shifted TN-07 from Solid R to Likely R after seeing a wave of Democratic momentum during this month's earlier elections.
If Democrats even come close here, it will send a shockwave throughout the country, open up the Democratic playing field, and put us one step closer to taking back the House.
GOTV PAC is jumping in right now, but after running winning get-out-the-vote programs across Virginia, Pennsylvania, and New Jersey earlier this month, we need your help to have an impact.
Chip in $25 today to help us shrink the House GOP majority and fuel this upset-in-the-making: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11172025]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email11172025]
- GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-UFTIeK5E0CCzhE2NytL8Q2?unsubscribedata=W62LqVYkpOZd3QTFVRvidPDyexo90uN6xTViWYewpfE6zZpnH0E0nnxNNSZ8nWbgClb7lpWSy0%2BBu9YYeh23r4tN5dQMr0a4JxCc5FecLOWwB2xAQALkLCq2UCKpqyXwoxJJNJ6INZKc6aX5PE7hTZ98GUiqzeFuRkY02hm4pk7SgrDUyCHHb9IMRTZAaP0BVR7fO8s4d%2BZgdYAl0UFL5cYC5huLdA6Nt4MCxX2Fmnawbxe9sVTxqCKzAsmt0HMrS3axCl%2BqlLcjFyd8wN1gSPNajx4sFD2Ts3JCLKXW%2BrDjAKhan9YYGCPR%2FUN0rXoeeYatFzsp6NbuB7wwmwE2fRqbHUQSGNxDdsjUu48gLCfRRmyPfUBdZKqLV%2Bkk0XVqmKHxz5qp4KrE3O5mdQrEZLNo5deHiT6K4bx%2Frqy0tB0%3D .

Fellow Patriot,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**

Fellow Patriot, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This is a HUGE development for 2026
body:
Our momentum is growing to FLIP New York

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Friend, did you catch this interview?
I went on Sean Hannity’s show to expose the truth to the nation.

**WATCH THE CLIP:**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_Elise Stefanik on "The Sean Hannity Show"_**

Sean and I discussed how New Yorkers are FED UP with failed Democrat single party leadership!
They know that Kathy Hochul,**the WORST governor in America** , is destroying the Empire State from within by pushing policies that put violent criminals and illegals first while putting the needs of New Yorkers last.
Under her regime of sky-high taxes, open borders, and failed bail reform New York has become increasingly unaffordable and unsafe.
And just when we thought it couldn’t get any worse from New York Democrats,**Governor Hochul along with Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries have bent the knee** to the Far-Left of their party by**endorsing Zohran Mamdani** for Mayor of New York City.
Zohran Mamdani is a**radical communist** who unapologetically**promotes jihadists** and has called to both**DEFUND and DISMANTLE the police.**
This is who Kathy Hochul wants to run our nation’s largest city!
If we stand by and do nothing the Defund-The-Police Democrats led by Kathy Hochul and Zohran Mamdani will complete a full socialist takeover of New York from Albany to NYC.

[SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Fellow patriot, I am not giving up on New York, this is my home and I know that we cannot Make America Great Again until we save our nation’s states and cities from the grip of the Radical Left.
And I am not alone. The polls are continuing to shift in our favor with recent independent polls indicating that I am LEADING Kathy Hochul. **This race is now a TOSS-UP!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**_Independent Poll Shows Elise Stefanik LEADING Kathy Hochul in the NY Governor Race, Giving Hope to millions of New Yorkers Terrified of a Mamdani Communist Takeover_**

We are gaining momentum and poised to flip NY in 2026!
This state is now in play because New York Democrats stand with Mamdani while I stand with New Yorkers who want safe streets, affordable communities, and real leadership.
I’ve been the loudest, strongest, and most consistent fighter to **SAVE NEW YORK** and **_[with your help I will continue to FIGHT BACK against Mamdani and FIRE HOCHUL once and for all](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**

[STAND WITH ELISE](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
There’s no hiding from this fight. Kathy Hochul has decided to make Zohran Mamdani the new face of the Democrat Party.
If we don’t hold the line here their radical platform will become the model for the next wave of Democrats across the country.
But with your continued support we can deliver a victory in New York next year that will replace Hochul with America First leadership and secure several battleground House seats that are crucial to preserving the GOP House Majority.
I am counting on you to help us seize this moment.

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bvMh/?__vbtrk=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzM0MjQ3OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: Capitol Update- November 17th
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
📬 From Paris to Phoenix: a silver anniversary, the Apache helicopter turns 50, America celebrates 250, and Arizona updates | | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=93d4769311&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | **Weekly Update – November 17**
**✨ Personal & Family Highlights**
**• **Clint and I celebrated our silver wedding anniversary in Paris with three unforgettable nights.
**• **We visited **Notre-Dame Cathedral** , the **Basilica of the Sacred Heart** , and **Sorbonne University** —where President Teddy Roosevelt delivered his famous _[“Man in the Arena”](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=77a64c5f64&e=a7ab36849c)_ speech in 1910.
**• **We honor two anniversary dates each year:
******◦** November 9 – our civil ceremony before a judge
******◦** November 11 – our wedding ceremony with family and friends
**• **Veterans Day coincides with our anniversary, reminding us of the sacrifices made by men and women in uniform. Both of my grandfathers served our country, and I remain deeply grateful to all who protect our freedoms.

**🚁**** Community & State Updates**
**• Boeing’s AH****‐****64 Apache Helicopter** celebrated its **50th anniversary** in Mesa.
******◦** First flight: September 30, 1975
******◦**** Impact**: Thousands of aerospace and defense jobs, putting Arizona on the map in these industries
******◦**** Watch** a short clip of the ceremony [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=3bb9642281&e=a7ab36849c).
**• **On Friday, I joined a call with **Club for Growth** to learn more about the **White House’s America 250 Task Force**.
******◦** Their website: [America 250](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d8c09d6553&e=a7ab36849c)
******◦**** Highlights**: Freedom Trucks launching in 2026, online educational content curated in conjunction with Hillsdale College and PragerU.

**🗳**** Legislative Work**
On Saturday morning, I pre‐filed** [ SCR 1001](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=c91b3fd92b&e=a7ab36849c)**, the first Senate bill for the upcoming legislative session, focused on a top priority for Senate Republicans: **election integrity to strengthen trust in Arizona’s elections**.

Over the past three legislative sessions, I have introduced legislation to ban foreign donations in Arizona elections and to bring "Florida-style" timely results to the state. SCR 1001 builds on those efforts and allows voters to decide the issue directly. If approved by the Arizona Legislature and passed by voters on the November 2026 ballot, SCR 1001 will secure Arizona's elections by:
· Requiring documented proof of citizenship before a ballot is issued
· Ending early voting at 7:00 p.m. on the Friday before the general election, ensuring clear and prompt processing
· Requiring a government-issued ID for both in-person and early-ballot voting

Election integrity is paramount. A recent [poll](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ee8d9bdd48&e=a7ab36849c) from _Center Square_ shows broad national support for voter ID requirements – evidence that Americans overwhelmingly want stronger standards that ensure only lawful voters participate in the process.

Don’t we have a duty to restore confidence in our elections by banning foreign influence and ensuring all individuals requesting to vote provide documented proof of citizenship before they receive a ballot? Please contact your elected state legislators to encourage a YES vote come January 2026.

➡️ [HERE](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1b188ae05a&e=a7ab36849c) is a link to today's press release discussing SCR 1001.

**🏡**** Local Issues**
**• Housing:** The median age of first‐time homebuyers have risen to 40 years old, with the average buyer now 59 years old. Smaller entry‐level homes remain difficult to find.
**• Animal Welfare:** Arizona faces a crisis with shelters beyond capacity and rescues overwhelmed.
******◦** I attended **PACC911’s “Glimmer of Hope” gala** on Sunday.
******◦** PACC911 raises funds to provide critical care for vulnerable animals.
******◦** Visit [PACC911.org](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=db41eba20f&e=a7ab36849c) to adopt, foster, or support their mission.
******◦** The event program highlighted **“Jerry’s Law,”** the new pet protection bill I sponsored last legislative session.

**📰**** Bolick in the News**
**• **Coverage continues around Arizona’s **Sex Offender Management Board** and challenges with the state’s registry system.
******◦**** Read** more: [Arizona Agenda – Registry Problem](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=fe96cda819&e=a7ab36849c)

**🗳️ Campaign Update 📈**
**👉[ Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=674553c1bf&e=a7ab36849c) **to sign my nomination petition.
**👉[ Click here](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=1581f6ecae&e=a7ab36849c) **to donate to my campaign. From celebrating our anniversary dates in Paris to honoring veterans, advancing election integrity, and supporting animal welfare, this week reminded me how deeply connected our freedoms, responsibilities, and communities truly are. Thank you for staying engaged and informed. Together, we’ll hold this State Senate seat in District 2 in 2026.

Shawnna

clean_body: 📬 From Paris to Phoenix: a silver anniversary, the Apache helicopter turns 50, America celebrates 250, and Arizona updates | | | | | Weekly Update – November 17 ✨ Personal & Family Highlights • Clint and I celebrated our silver wedding anniversary in Paris with three unforgettable nights. • We visited Notre-Dame Cathedral , the Basilica of the Sacred Heart , and Sorbonne University —where President Teddy Roosevelt delivered his famous speech in 1910. • We honor two anniversary dates each year: ****◦ November 9 – our civil ceremony before a judge ****◦ November 11 – our wedding ceremony with family and friends • Veterans Day coincides with our anniversary, reminding us of the sacrifices made by men and women in uniform. Both of my grandfathers served our country, and I remain deeply grateful to all who protect our freedoms. 🚁 Community & State Updates • Boeing’s AH‐64 Apache Helicopter celebrated its 50th anniversary in Mesa. ****◦ First flight: September 30, 1975 ****◦ Impact: Thousands of aerospace and defense jobs, putting Arizona on the map in these industries ****◦ Watch a short clip of the ceremony . • On Friday, I joined a call with Club for Growth to learn more about the White House’s America 250 Task Force. ****◦ Their website: ****◦ Highlights: Freedom Trucks launching in 2026, online educational content curated in conjunction with Hillsdale College and PragerU. 🗳 Legislative Work On Saturday morning, I pre‐filed , the first Senate bill for the upcoming legislative session, focused on a top priority for Senate Republicans: election integrity to strengthen trust in Arizona’s elections. Over the past three legislative sessions, I have introduced legislation to ban foreign donations in Arizona elections and to bring "Florida-style" timely results to the state. SCR 1001 builds on those efforts and allows voters to decide the issue directly. If approved by the Arizona Legislature and passed by voters on the November 2026 ballot, SCR 1001 will secure Arizona's elections by: · Requiring documented proof of citizenship before a ballot is issued · Ending early voting at 7:00 p.m. on the Friday before the general election, ensuring clear and prompt processing · Requiring a government-issued ID for both in-person and early-ballot voting Election integrity is paramount. A recent from Center Square shows broad national support for voter ID requirements – evidence that Americans overwhelmingly want stronger standards that ensure only lawful voters participate in the process. Don’t we have a duty to restore confidence in our elections by banning foreign influence and ensuring all individuals requesting to vote provide documented proof of citizenship before they receive a ballot? Please contact your elected state legislators to encourage a YES vote come January 2026. ➡️ is a link to today's press release discussing SCR 1001. 🏡 Local Issues • Housing: The median age of first‐time homebuyers have risen to 40 years old, with the average buyer now 59 years old. Smaller entry‐level homes remain difficult to find. • Animal Welfare: Arizona faces a crisis with shelters beyond capacity and rescues overwhelmed. ****◦ I attended PACC911’s “Glimmer of Hope” gala on Sunday. ****◦ PACC911 raises funds to provide critical care for vulnerable animals. ****◦ Visit to adopt, foster, or support their mission. ****◦ The event program highlighted “Jerry’s Law,” the new pet protection bill I sponsored last legislative session. 📰 Bolick in the News • Coverage continues around Arizona’s Sex Offender Management Board and challenges with the state’s registry system. ****◦ Read more: 🗳️ Campaign Update 📈 👉 to sign my nomination petition. 👉 to donate to my campaign. From celebrating our anniversary dates in Paris to honoring veterans, advancing election integrity, and supporting animal welfare, this week reminded me how deeply connected our freedoms, responsibilities, and communities truly are. Thank you for staying engaged and informed. Together, we’ll hold this State Senate seat in District 2 in 2026. Best, Shawnna | "Sign My Petition" | | "Donate" | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. AUTHORIZED BY SHAWNNA BOLICK. | | Copyright © 2025 Vote Bolick, All rights reserved. Our love is just as valid as any other, and today’s decision reaffirms that truth for millions of other couples. It’s moments like these that I reflect on when my wife and I said our vows. This ruling recognized that every same-sex couple has the choice if they want to make this commitment to each other, and I couldn’t be more excited for them. In Colorado, I helped defend that right by co-sponsoring the law officially repealing a provision in our state's constitution that stated marriage is only valid if it is between a man and a woman. [](http://links.briannaforco.com/s/c/rlipMKuBvh9Hd4xnDzDWQP5Rfy42OpqBmxlfxqooF1p9OpuJ3_iuJx0rqgj29fOkho_ryKV_4JQESRSvgRpB1JtuAiBVpIezIkPDZNuDFnkCj2QqQvdH7g3P2u__z3REa52zdlJqigT81ErriR4juWdJrAxAOpuZtln5E4KA9grAQraiSy9g8KaKIAOooPTJC5C45zRfDspPlwiDGaHZh9jH7kcVse05jBfkmz3FHrYLFRLK1ku37j5iFPbFq9rQ19vaQvFHRAF0wOojOpac_Buhe3ZDdW0uQa_AVeFI_4Q13dm0KuGsLKRVPxtjCYCdHaFhgUKulYppQQmmWVz__-sun_-ho0iC5-2ykGFM7IcBONb7QOezh5EM2BWfR3iqbviwYKtO1S8LaNCe7jY1YVvfKdjDrxCrJ3FLeksnv_ITOacnWR-mmEz8wmWF7xGY8-J-HfdPsmDgBbNyQhi8khbrce4vsb3ZDm1Vljg0PHNO43uRFunffOVxoNui1pxWtqqLSncWMqtoV0MCsr1jhbFuv9kqmCRoEaduuqYFxnEoqs1ZWQizSkbR-Zv14o5yHFm4xr_ndu3yIfCpHmFS_w9COBq96usYUpxB34qZED5_8tXk8bPtVqE0O89Wl_dWDsBEQlYz8bpLuyscFxS1uDnU63DqoC9Vg6md5QK0JddrH_Ybs0PP7MEvA7tHLkoDauSFCz_qreXQ8p-oke6Kmv-OAcvCVaxMKT0pjl37JmZ_WcRGFzxOXlHWjbwja-LIqMCyM4mfFnzAXKLKW4zNPVEVZKUzh5Q-GFhMdTEt_gRoM8MBfEOtnGMcbxtFXqqnWpbvnS_Nv3Gl6FM8YUEddUan2bGlmZ2oZ6qslnZf058VwZh8zrY-5ZeymBIPXshAGcYSAoxQVoW2BNVVkoKLO4oA3x17hhqLHSpbmlZCVr91YKjLw3BqnVKE/GjgIMUGLqJjCN2TE39Dq1LheCSRXh3nJ/14) But across the country, we’re seeing extremists who are denouncing this decision. I will always continue to celebrate _all_ love and encourage everyone to live their lives as their truest selves. body:
Here are three reasons your donation today matters.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40433%2E3422442%2EfiJKfP)
Peter,
At Katie Porter HQ, we are building a campaign to win. We’ve earned steadfast voter support, endorsements, and financial resources that put us in a competitive position.
**[But this race will be hotly contested until Election Day. Can you donate any amount that makes sense now to help us stay ahead?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251117_1_ak.3aIhz6&refcode=em20251117-40433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40433%2E3422442%2EfiJKfP)**
Here are three reasons your donation today matters:
**1\. Katie is the Democratic frontrunner, but Republicans are within striking distance.**
Polling shows Katie has a strong lead over her nearest Democratic opponents, _but two MAGA Republicans are close behind_. If they consolidate support, they could overtake us in this jungle primary. Your donation helps us reach undecided voters first, before Republicans flood the airwaves.
**2\. Katie is growing a coalition of meaningful endorsements, and we need the resources to activate it.**
Major labor unions in California, national women’s organizations, and leaders from purple districts have endorsed Katie because they know she can win statewide. _But endorsements only matter if we have the resources to amplify their support_.
**3\. Grassroots fundraising keeps us competitive, and we cannot fall behind.**
Katie’s average contribution is just $33. We aren’t funded by massive corporations or billionaires, but by working people chipping in a little at a time. But when other candidates take corporate money or write themselves huge checks, _we need sustained grassroots support to keep this race competitive._
**[We’re in a strong position because people like you power this campaign, but keeping our lead isn’t a given. To win, we need your support today. Can you chip in $5 to help us stay ahead?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20251117_1_ak.3aIhz6&refcode=em20251117-40433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=40433%2E3422442%2EfiJKfP)**

Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251117-40433&amounts=&t=24&refcode2=40433_3422442_fiJKfP&akid=40433%2E3422442%2EfiJKfP)**

subject: I was arraigned on baseless charges

body:
Donate now to help me keep fighting for our shared values. |
Recently, I walked into court to be arraigned for a baseless indictment – driven by politics, not justice or facts. **Let me be clear: these charges are baseless.** I am being targeted by Donald Trump and his allies for one simple reason – because I had the courage to hold him accountable for fraud, and for standing up to his destructive MAGA policies. And while they think this will stop me, I refuse to back down. **[They’re trying to silence me with this politically motivated indictment. _My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough._ But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. **Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter?** It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.**_People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out._** Long story short, we heard _every single lie_ the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear._**But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT.**_ I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — _she thrived_. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the **YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER** of the Georgia House.

clean_body: | | | Peter, My wife Lauren is running for office as a Republican in battleground Georgia, and if you donated to her campaign recently, I can’t THANK YOU enough. But there’s a side of Lauren she’d never brag about...As her husband, I think you deserve to hear it. Can I get just two minutes of your time, Peter? It started way back in high school when Lauren and I first met. We fell in love, and at just 17, she got pregnant with our first child. We were young. We were scared. And we were surrounded by voices telling us we would have no future if we kept the baby.People told Lauren she was throwing her life away. That abortion was her only way out. Long story short, we heard every single lie the Democrats push on young women — that motherhood is a mistake, that life begins only when it’s convenient, and that faith should take a back seat to fear.But Lauren stood firm. She chose LIFE. She chose OUR SON. She chose to FIGHT. I’d never admired her more.Because she didn’t just survive — she thrived. She finished high school, graduated from Georgia State University with a Bachelor’s in English, and went on to become the YOUNGEST FEMALE MEMBER of the Georgia House. And now, she’s running against a well-funded Democrat backed by the political establishment in Atlanta. And she’s not doing it for power, but to PROTECT the values she lives every single day. I’ll be the first to tell you, the Left can’t stand Lauren. They’re ATTACKING her for being a bold, unapologetic, America-First mom who puts families and faith above everything else. They HATE that she’s living proof that conservative, pro-life women are strong, capable, and ready to lead. The truth is, they’re trying to shut Lauren down because she’s fighting for your God-given rights – the same way she fought for the God-given right for our son to live. They haven’t succeeded yet — but they’re getting close. That’s why Lauren needs we can give her. Because if we don’t draw the line right now, we risk losing everything we’ve fought so hard to preserve. Lauren’s ready to fight. I’ve seen it in her since day one.The only question is... For faith, family, and freedom,Zak Daniel | | Paid for by Daniel for Georgia. PO Box 5, Forsyth, GA, 31029

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: AOC thinks "women's rights" just means abortion. | Peter - Riley Gaines is under attack from the Left's top Socialist, AOC. What happened to supporting "ALL" women? AOC is going after Riley because she stands STRONG for women and girls across America. I stand with Riley Gaines. Riley Gaines is a 5x SEC Champion and 12x NCAA All-American. Not to mention she 's a patriot who has fought every day for women and girls. Meanwhile, AOC thinks "women's rights" just means abortion. Riley Gaines aligns with the majority of Americans when she comes out against the Socialist squad, who are endorsing Mamdani to be the next Mayor of NYC. The bottom line: Riley does not deserve to be attacked and smeared by AOC for taking a stand against Socialism. | With your support, we will defend America and defeat the Socialist Virus sweeping our nation. Coach Tuberville Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: Update: Our path to taking back Congress
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer email than usual — but with so much going on right now, we hope you’ll keep reading. If you don’t have time, we’ll cut to the chase: [**This year’s elections showed us that Democrats have a real chance to take back Congress — but only if we get to work now. If it makes sense for you, will you make a $7 contribution to help flip the House and Senate?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251117_5316_fr&refcode2=5316_22930333_zVrbf_&akid=5316%2E22930333%2EzVrbf_) _Here is the most important information you need to know:_ **DEMOCRATS ONLY NEED TO FLIP A HANDFUL OF SEATS TO TAKE BACK THE HOUSE.** With Rep. Adelita Grijalva finally sworn in, Democrats just gathered enough signatures to force a vote on releasing the full Epstein files as we continue to push for the truth. If we can flip the House, we’ll have enough votes to not only hold Trump accountable, but prevent more of his allies’ harmful policies from becoming our new reality. **FOUR SEATS WILL GIVE DEMOCRATS SENATE CONTROL.** Democrats have a real path to taking back the Senate. We have major opportunities to flip Republican-held seats in North Carolina and Ohio, after former Governor Roy Cooper and former Senator Sherrod Brown entered races in their states. But make no mistake: These races will be very close and very expensive. Every single vote will count. _If Democrats can win back Congress, we can check Trump’s power and prevent more damage and destruction. But here’s the thing:_ **REPUBLICANS ARE TRYING TO RIG THE SYSTEM TO STOP US.** Trump and his allies are doing everything they can to keep control of Congress. They’ve redrawn congressional maps in states like Texas and Missouri to give themselves more seats, and this could just be the beginning. Democrats are fighting back — and voters recently passed the Election Rigging Response Act in California to counter Republicans' gerrymandering scheme. But the only way we’re going to win this fight and protect our democracy is if we all get involved _now._ [**Please don’t wait for someone else to step up. Don’t wait until it’s too late. Can you make your first $7 contribution to support the DNC today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251117_5316_fr&refcode2=5316_22930333_zVrbf_&akid=5316%2E22930333%2EzVrbf_) Thank you, The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: You won't believe what Keller said about APD (and who endorsed him anyway)
body:
We can't believe this ad is airing. Plus, Trump's new blame-Biden-first strategy and Fetterman's classy moment | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=16d76f8034&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | [This is wild.](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=0de12a4ca5&e=567664f14c) Tim Keller released a campaign ad claiming "innocent people" were shot by APD under Darren White — then, the police union turned around and endorsed Keller anyway. We're not making this up!
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=46e00021ea&e=567664f14c)
| |

### 🔥 **KELLER'S "INNOCENT PEOPLE" BOMBSHELL**

Tim Keller's new campaign ad claims "innocent people" were shot by Albuquerque Police under Darren White — costing taxpayers millions and creating "a stain on APD."
Then the Albuquerque Police Officers Association endorsed Keller anyway.
**Wait, what?**
Mark's reaction: "I can't believe the stations are even airing this ad. He's saying APD is gunning down people in the streets."
The runoff is December 9th. We break down why this endorsement makes absolutely no sense, what Darren White's response ad looks like, and what's really at stake for Albuquerque. **

Spoiler: 750+ homicides under Keller's watch tells you everything you need to know.**
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=6bca43d2d7&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

### 💰 **TRUMP'S ECONOMY PROBLEM — AND THE MESSAGING PIVOT**

After election warning shots, the Trump administration just pulled a complete 180 on their economy messaging.
**Here's what changed:** Instead of "the economy is great, people just don't realize it" — they're now blaming Biden first, then pivoting to solutions and hope.
Peter Ducey drops stunning comparison numbers. Kevin Hassett admits Biden "dug a really big hole." Scott Bessent promises 2026 will be a "great year for working Americans."
**The big question Mark breaks down:** [Is it too late?](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a65341909f&e=567664f14c) Can Trump grow his way out of inflation fast enough to satisfy voters who don't have a "patience button"?
We do a full deep dive on what the actual numbers show and whether housing, prescription drugs, and offshore drilling can move the needle before voters lose patience.
🙏 **FETTERMAN FALLS — PENNSYLVANIA GOP RESPONDS WITH CLASS**
Senator John Fetterman fell and needed 20 stitches this week. Instead of piling on, the Pennsylvania Republican Party sent this message: "Praying for John Fetterman and his entire family as he makes his recovery."
**Mark's take:** "This is how politics should work. Fetterman is one of the most principled, gutsiest people in the Senate. When someone gets hurt, you pray for them. You don't celebrate it."
This moment matters because it's the opposite of what we've seen too often — people cheering violence or misfortune against political opponents. The Pennsylvania GOP got it right.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=ce4563b75e&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

### 📊 **40% OF YOUNG WOMEN WANT TO LEAVE THE US**

A stunning new Gallup poll shows 40% of women ages 15-44 say they'd leave the United States permanently if they could. Overall, 20% of Americans (one in five) want out.
**Top destinations:** Canada, Japan, New Zealand
**Krysty's take:** "Lumping 15-year-olds with 44-year-olds is bizarre. When I graduated college, I wanted to teach English in Prague. That's not a political statement — that's being young. But a 40-year-old with a career saying they want to leave? That's different."
Martha MacCallum's theory: It's "Trump derangement" — a protest vote at cocktail parties, not an actual plan to leave.
We discuss whether this is real dissatisfaction or just performative politics, and challenge anyone who wants to leave: Where exactly do you think it's better for women?
---
|
---

name: Mark Takano
subject: I just introduced two bills to stop Trump’s ballroom corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=4fed19b7d8&e=9a636fd341)
| | | | | |
Dear Peter,
It’s Mark Takano.
To make room for his bloated ballroom, Donald Trump bulldozed the East Wing – _one of our most priceless national monuments_ — without permission from the taxpayers who fund it.
---
[|
---](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=62334b9a8b&e=9a636fd341)
| | Trump orchestrated the longest-ever government shutdown in American history – but instead of coming to the table to make a deal to save healthcare, he’s spent the past month commemorating his billionaire donors by engraving their names inside the White House.
[**I’m fighting back as quickly as possible to stop this corruption in Congress, but I’m counting on your support. Will you co-sponsor my bills to block Trump’s ballroom? >>**](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=2f94e69bc2&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [SIGN NOW: BLOCK TRUMP’S BALLROOM >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=e589bc87a5&e=9a636fd341)
---
| | Last month, I introduced two bills to rein in the construction of Trump’s $300 million ballroom and block his proposal to give donors a White House plaque:
---
| |
• The** White House BALL Act** forbids federal funds from being used for construction during a shutdown.

• And the **White House NOT FOR SALE Act** prohibits the display of names in the White House without official approval from the Committee for the Preservation of the White House.
---
| |
Peter, as long as I am in Congress, I will be a voice and a vote to hold Trump accountable. His brazen renovation of the White House completely flies in the face of historic preservation and government transparency.
[**Can I count on you to speak up, Peter? Sign now to citizen co-sponsor my bills and stop Trump from building his ballroom >>**](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=5601c2e2e7&e=9a636fd341)
---
| [SIGN NOW >>](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=0069c91ccf&e=9a636fd341)
---
| |
Thank you for signing.
Mark Takano
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time.
Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here.](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=7bcf2c0bd9&e=9a636fd341) Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact, make a [monthly contribution by clicking here.](https://marktakano.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=224eb2c898a465decdda4691f&id=9851d3b4e6&e=9a636fd341)

To make room for his bloated ballroom, Donald Trump bulldozed the East Wing – one of our most priceless national monuments — without permission from the taxpayers who fund it. | | Trump orchestrated the longest-ever government shutdown in American history – but instead of coming to the table to make a deal to save healthcare, he’s spent the past month commemorating his billionaire donors by engraving their names inside the White House. | | | Last month, I introduced two bills to rein in the construction of Trump’s $300 million ballroom and block his proposal to give donors a White House plaque: | | • The White House BALL Act forbids federal funds from being used for construction during a shutdown. • And the White House NOT FOR SALE Act prohibits the display of names in the White House without official approval from the Committee for the Preservation of the White House. | | Peter, as long as I am in Congress, I will be a voice and a vote to hold Trump accountable. His brazen renovation of the White House completely flies in the face of historic preservation and government transparency. | | | Thank you for signing. Mark Takano | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, Republicans have captured a slim House Majority. The leadership of Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. We've got to let you know, Team, that **a bill that would give President Donald Trump broad powers to target his political foes** passed in the U.S. House of Representatives last Congress and is sure to come up again. The bill, last known as H.R. 9495, would empower the Treasury secretary to unilaterally designate any nonprofit as a “terrorist supporting organization” and revoke its tax-exempt status, effectively killing the group. **The bill could give presidential administrations a tool to crack down on organizations for political reasons. ** “ _Authoritarianism is not born overnight — it creeps in_ ,” Rep. Lloyd Doggett said on the House floor. “ _A tyrant tightens his grip not just by seizing power, but when he demands new powers and when those who can stop him willingly cede and bend to his will_.” “ _A sixth grader would know this is unconstitutional_ ,” added Rep. Jamie Raskin. Unconstitutional and authoritarian or not, this bill has passed the House once and has a good chance of passing both houses of Congress now that opponents of voting rights have total control of our government. **That's why we need to start working now** to prevent this bill from ever becoming law. **[Will you chip in with $25 or whatever you can to help us stop this bill and protect the ability of people-powered groups to advocate for our rights?>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119479453/583228243/1498593520?refcode=111725_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjkzYTYyNzA4LTFhYzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Soq52nrpk0LGV49JznA3O2rXNt7f_FMh4jcVNmR-8Fs=)**

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. * * *
Hey folks,
Tonight I sat down with my friend and political scientist **Rachel Bitecofer** , and we got _very_ real about the moment we're living in. We talked about Trump's sudden "support" for releasing the Epstein files, his public war on Marjorie Taylor Greene, and why Democrats keep bringing a knife to what is now basically a gun fight. If you care about winning in 2026 and actually saving democracy, this one is a must-watch.
* **[00:01:07]** Rachel talks about how the last two months have upended her life and pulled her deeper into warning people about what's coming rather than just analyzing politics.
* **[00:05:47]** We dig into Trump's sudden embrace of releasing the Epstein files and how it's exposing the cracks and conspiracies inside his own coalition.
* **[00:11:36]** Rachel breaks down why affordability is the Democratic opening -- and how Trump has openly betrayed his own base on the economy.
* **[00:24:32]** We unpack how consultants keep running the same cookie-cutter ads, ignoring narrative and emotion, and why campaigns that build real villains and heroes actually win.
* **[00:35:20]** I talk about why political ads must make people _feel_ seen -- and Rachel explains why bad testing tools and small sample sizes keep leading Democrats astray.

This episode is for anyone who's tired of watching Democrats play nice while the other side sets everything on fire--and wants a concrete roadmap for how we fight back on affordability, corruption, and democracy itself. If you value honest, unvarnished conversations like this--and guests like Rachel who are willing to name what's broken and how we fix it--help me keep them going.

With urgency,
--Mike

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1004%2E181023%2EvKd7eJ)
Folks:
John James voted for a tax law that will cut his own taxes while Michiganders are struggling to put food on the table and afford health care.
_That’s bad leadership — and not the kind of person who should be our next governor._ **[Pitch in to help us defeat him and elect Jocelyn Benson as Michigan’s next governor.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1004%2E181023%2EvKd7eJ)**
John James is more focused on delivering for his wealthy campaign donors than he is on making a difference for hard-working families in Michigan.
His voting record is 100% aligned with Donald Trump — for an agenda that helps the rich get richer while leaving everyone else to fall behind. Like the ”Big Beautiful Bill,” which drives up health insurance costs, cuts food assistance, and threatens rural hospitals across our state.
**We deserve better. That’s Jocelyn.** She’s spent her career standing up to powerful interests so government works for people, not the wealthy.
**[Will you chip in to help us fight back and make sure our next governor is someone who prioritizes our families and our futures?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251117_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1004%2E181023%2EvKd7eJ)**

body:
Here's the deal.
#
**Hey, Team McBride here with an urgent request.**
Here’s the deal: Donald Trump demanded the Epstein Files be made public for years — but his calls stopped the moment he realized the extent to which he appeared in them.
**Donald Trump is hiding something, and his allies in our government are doing everything they can to keep the truth hidden.**
Sarah has been pushing for these files to be released because every survivor deserves justice, and the American people deserve a government that doesn’t protect the powerful and well-connected.
Now, the House could vote as soon as this week on whether or not to force the release of the Epstein Files. If Congress is going to do the right thing, they need to see the public demanding transparency loud and clear right now.
[**Will you add your name next to Sarah’s to call for the FULL release of the Epstein Files? This is the moment to take action.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/em-20251117-epstein-files/?source=em20251117-2511&t=1&akid=2511%2E21716%2ESWC6QK)

name: Phil Izon
subject: Press Release Eaglexit Submits To LBC
body:
Please share with friends and family | | | [](https://v8k6.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=691bc8e1c518ae1b5c26e19f&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D691bc32b9bbb74669c6f0bee%26ss_email_id%3D691bc8e1c518ae1b5c26e19f%26ss_campaign_name%3DPress%2BRelease%2BEaglexit%2BSubmits%2BTo%2BLBC%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-11-18T01%253A16%253A32Z&w=658ac75703428575b106784b&c=b_691bc32b9bbb74669c6f0bee&l=en-US&s=v_CphkNo7au6Rs1juhUtofeY4Qs%3D)
---
|
### **Eaglexit Submits to LBC**
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****EAGLEXIT SUBMITS PETITION PACKAGE TO ALASKA LOCAL BOUNDARY COMMISSION, INITIATING DETACHMENT PROCESS****EAGLE RIVER, ALASKA – 11/16/2025** – Eaglexit, the grassroots movement advocating for the separation of Assembly District 2 (AD2) from the Municipality of Anchorage (MOA) and incorporation as its own home rule borough, today announced a major milestone: the formal submission of its complete petition package to the Alaska Local Boundary Commission (LBC) staff for an Informal Technical Review. This submission marks a critical step forward in creating the independent **Chugach Regional Borough (CRB)** , a non-unified home rule borough that will encompass the communities of Eagle River, Chugiak, Birchwood, Eklutna, and JBER.The complete petition package, required by Alaska Statute (AS) 29.06 and 3 AAC 110, includes the proposed **Charter** describing the design of the new borough, a **Metes & Bounds Map** detailing the borders, a **Transition Plan** outlining the implementation of the new government, and a **legal brief** detailing the legal aspects and advantages of separation from the MOA. Eaglexit’s detailed financial analysis shows that detachment will not increase overall costs for the new borough and will lead to lower local taxes.**Restoring Local Power and Fiscal Accountability** The core mission of Eaglexit is to ensure that local residents have control over their destiny and that tax dollars remain local."We are turning Alaska’s promise of local self-government into practice by pursuing a **home rule charter** for the Chugach Regional Borough (CRB)," said Catherine Margolin, Chair of Eaglexit. "A lean, responsive government will be right here at home; easy to reach, quick to listen, and making decisions based on what _our_ community needs and wants, not what distant officials think is best.”Key arguments for detachment include:
* **Stronger Fiscal Accountability:** Tax dollars will fund the services, services and safety of the residents of the new borough. Smaller government means lower property taxes.
* **Preserving Identity:** With local businesses, events, councils, and culture, a smaller government can preserve and prioritize what’s important to residents.
* **Tailored Economic Development:** The CRB can move forward to promote pro-business growth and revitalize the local economy.

**A New Vision for Education and Public Safety** The proposed CRB School District (CSD) will be established as a **charter school district** , designed to restore local control and improve educational outcomes.
* The new district will comprise fourteen (14) schools in total, including ten (10) elementary, two (2) middle, and two (2) high schools.
* The model ensures authority flows up through the schools and community, not down from centralized administration, giving parents and students more control.
* Each school will be a public charter school, with a strong core curriculum and specialty courses based on parents’ and students’ needs and wants.

Furthermore, detachment allows the CRB to directly and responsibly address the community needs for safety, streets and roads maintenance, snow plowing, and other services. **Next Steps in the LBC Process** The LBC staff has up to 45 days to complete the Informal Technical Review and respond with approval or necessary revisions.Once the petition package is informally approved, Eaglexit will begin the effort to obtain**** signatures from residents of Eagle River, Chugiak, Birchwood, and Eklutna to proceed to a public vote. "We believe in trusting local voices, embracing local leadership, and realizing the full potential of the home rule model in Alaska. We urge all citizens who believe it is time for independence to join this effort," Margolin concluded.

---

---
**Paging Alaskans Across This Wonderful State, I need volunteers to work on Eaglexit, we are doing door knocking this winter / spring and plan to start collecting signatures next year. You do not have to be an Eagle River / Chugiak Resident to collect signatures. I am looking at recruiting people in Mat-Su and Anchorage / Fairbanks and Kenai to come help. I can help cover gas etc. If you are interested in working directly with me on a new project, come one, come all, let’s help Eagle River / Chugiak become their own borough.**
---

#### **Eaglexit is hosting businesses owners in Eagle River and Chugiak to discuss the future. Please reply to this email or sign up on their website.**
---
|
---
## **Frozen Odds Movie Update:**
**I am so thankful to all the people who bought tickets to “Frozen Odds” I was able to put together an amazing setup for equipment and little did I know that AFPI, America First Policy Institute would be so interested in working directly with me to help make content, do presentations, and show my movie all over the country. I have been working with them for a couple months now planning our strategy in Michigan, which is facing a ballot measure to get RCV in Michigan in 2026. The movie will be 45 minutes, the first trailer will come out in October and the movie release will be December or January for Alaska.****I am working directly with AFPI executive team and we plan to bring big name people to various events to get large crowds, their goal is 400-500+ per event and plan to do events across Michigan, having my movie as the main showcase with a panel doing Q &A at the end.****I am not charging AFPI for the movie, videos, or content I have created for them. I believe they will pay for the events, marketing, and flying me to Michigan for the various events. I had no idea that my work would make such a difference and I am very proud and thankful to all the people that have supported all of my efforts.****Seeing Charlie Kirk die reminds me that the work doesn’t stop, it never will and we have to carry on doing what he started.****Our work doesn’t stop in Michigan, I am also working with AFPI in Georgia and Minnesota next.**
---
|
---

Eagle River

name: Help us fight back! New Dems
subject: Trump doubles down on banning mail-in voting:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Democrat Coalition Action Fund

Voters showed up in record numbers in protest of his administration’s extreme far-right agenda and in favor of commonsense, unifying Democratic candidates.

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. name: Jena G.
subject: fwd: message about the Space Command relocation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
Peter,
I wanted to make sure you saw my team’s message from yesterday. Colorado is fighting back against Trump's move of the US Space Command from Colorado to Alabama. Trump said he was going to move Space Command because Alabama supports him and Colorado uses mail ballots.
I’m glad the State is taking a stand. We cannot allow Trump to get away with his unlawful behavior and retaliation schemes. As Attorney General, I’ll lean in because these decisions aren’t just fun and games. They impact Colorado jobs, our communities, and our national security.
Chip in now to help me win this race and continue to fight for Coloradans as Attorney General. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251117-email]
Thanks so much,
Jena G.
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251117-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251117-email]
Peter –
Donald Trump used political retaliation once again when he ordered US Space Command be moved from Colorado Springs to Alabama. He said that Colorado's vote-by-mail system was one of the reasons he was targeting our state.
Colorado took action. Our state filed a lawsuit to block the relocation.Trump’s retaliation would harm Colorado families and the nation’s military readiness. It's necessary to file these lawsuits to stop Trump’s hostile and unlawful behavior.
Fights like these are exactly why Jena is running for Attorney General.
As Secretary of State, Jena stood up to Trump’s attacks on our elections and protected Coloradans’ rights. As Attorney General, she’ll continue to defend our state, our jobs, our service members, and our democracy.
But we can’t win this race without you.
Will you chip in today to help Jena win this race for Attorney General? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2511-q4-jg?refcode=251117-email]
Every dollar you give today strengthens our ability to elect an AG who can take on Trump’s abuses of power – and win.
Thank you for standing with us in this fight.
– Jena for CO

https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]
Paid for by Jena for Colorado. Rachel Gordon, Registered Agent.

Louisville, CO 80027

body:
his approval rating has hit a record low. Will you help us take advantage of this moment, Peter?
#
Need a little bit of good news today, Peter?
**Donald Trump’s approval rating has hit a record low among everyday Americans.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97743?refcode=em20251117-9726&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9726%2E614464%2E8mXbgz)
Here’s what this means: **The majority of Americans do not approve of Donald Trump’s agenda.**
They have felt the cost of living get higher and higher, all while GOP politicians make life easier for the billionaires bankrolling their campaigns.
They have seen how the GOP has shamelessly stripped away fundamental rights and actively worked to rig our elections in their favor.
_And they know these attacks on everyday Americans won’t stop here._
That’s why we’ve seen Democratic candidates steadily gain momentum since the beginning of this year — in red and blue states alike! **People are more motivated than ever to take our country back from Donald Trump + the GOP.**
**So today, we’re asking for your help to take advantage of that energy, Peter.[Will you help us elect Democrats in all 50 states and build on the momentum we’re seeing for Democrats across the country by making a donation of $5 or whatever you can today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97743?refcode=em20251117-9726&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9726%2E614464%2E8mXbgz)**

ICE is falling behind on deportation quotas. So MAGA Republicans want to “fix” that by paying private bounty hunters with taxpayer money to track, detain, and deliver immigrants for cash.

name: John Fetterman
subject: ⚠️ protecting mail-in ballots in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh)
| | |
---
**Derek, Republicans are attacking your right to vote.**
First, Trump told Republican-led states to redraw their maps to rig the lines and help save their fragile House majority.
Then, the Supreme Court took up a case that could gut what’s left of the Voting Rights Act and make the GOP's cheating even easier.
**Now, the Supreme Court just agreed to hear a major Republican-backed challenge to mail-in ballots – a case that could upend voting rules in dozens of states.**
That means confusion. Delays. Chaos. All heading into the 2026 elections.
Let me be blunt: This is an attack on your right to vote. Period. Republicans know mail-in ballots help working people, seniors, parents with no child care, and more – so they’re trying to blow up the system. 😡
They think the fewer people who turn out to vote, the better their chances at winning elections. So they’re doing everything they can to stop people from voting. **That's un-American.**
Between these gerrymandering stunts and mail-in ballot attacks, protecting the right to vote has NEVER been more important. We need people who aren’t afraid to stand up, speak out, and push back. That’s you.
**[If you agree folks should be able to mail in their ballots to vote, will you please sign my petition now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52332?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh) 👉**
| | [Protect Mail-In Ballots](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52332?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh)
---
Thanks yinz,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jt335-su-fl-footer&t=4&refcode2=10433_434096_epN0nh&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://X.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=5&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=10433%2E434096%2EepN0nh)

Within just a few hours of my announcement, we raised over $1 MILLION for my gubernatorial campaign and the New York GOP! Those kinds of numbers will send a shiver down Kathy Hochul’s spine. The worst governor in America knows she can’t win a free and fair election that’s decided on the issues. Her only hope is to BUY her way to reelection – so if we can keep this momentum going, she won’t stand a chance! But that last part is key, Peter... To compete with the Democrats’ multimillion-dollar ad buys and win this race, we have to keep our momentum going from today all the way through Election Day. That’s why I set an ambitious goal of raising an additional $1,000,000 by midnight tomorrow to ensure we close out our launch week in the strongest possible position. Let’s CRUSH this goal and show Hochul that her days in office are numbered! Thank you, Elise Stefanik Paid for by Elise for Governor PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: Intern Applications Open for 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
No images? [Click here](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-e-quijydy-hhlljjcji-o/) [Click Here to Submit Your Application](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-r/) Dear Hoosier Republican,We are reaching out let you know that the Indiana Republican Party has opened internship applications for Winter, Spring, and Summer 2026. Our interns play a vital role in carrying out the day-to-day operations of the party and assisting with events and special projects. Our internship offers hands-on experience working for the Indiana Republican Party, gaining insight into the political and legislative processes, establishing valuable professional relationships, and building a strong resume.If you or anyone you know would be interested in applying for an internship with the Indiana Republican Party during the 2026 election cycle, please refer them to our [website](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-y/), where they can find the internship application under the **Take Action tab**. We will be hiring interns to assist in the field/grassroots, fundraising, communications, and political departments. Interns are paid a monthly stipend and will either work remotely or at our headquarters in downtown Indianapolis.
* Field/Grassroots Interns will be working in the field under our team of field coordinators and engage with our local Republican parties and grassroots organizations to coordinate voter outreach and engagement.
* Fundraising Interns will be working and assisting with donor outreach and engagement, as well as staffing various events.
* Communications Interns will be working with our communications team on voter outreach and engagement as we promote our slate of candidates for statewide office and Congress.
* Political Interns will be working with our political team to assist in the coordination and administration of the 2026 Indiana Republican State Convention.

If you or someone you know is interested and have any questions pertaining to the Indiana Republican Party internship program, please refer them to info@indiana.gop or call (317) 635-7561.Very best,
INGOP Team [Click Here to Submit Your Application](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-j/) [](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-t/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-i/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-d/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-h/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-k/)[](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-l-quijydy-hhlljjcji-u/) ** PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. ****NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. ****WWW.INDIANA.GOP.** | Indiana Republican State Committee 101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com [Preferences](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.updatemyprofile.com/y-quijydy-293A8D27-hhlljjcji-x) | [Unsubscribe](https://indianarepublicancentralcommittee.cmail19.com/t/y-u-quijydy-hhlljjcji-m/)

subject: 3 reasons this Democrat urgently needs your support
body:
As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQ9i210f49qDvFsJja26PnW4s9FYoof_ThLxI6muGsSqcZuPl32gzgl9X29xRxhQRfQgGSLOsE3aKcCzQ0C-q_g0cAzpx9NnDcf3ptU5MF7wdkJc6Es14Minmjam6f4_TTbbs5AuMwDcTl1ObhG-pazpaEE6UJEjXC8De9SNZ_98pACu3LbiY7e8Be358HmOXiJ4csHSnc7uYrv_-Y9UshgOyrQLXIHn&c=54hOn_IuNEW8uRdMLRz91Y1Ovrva3PoWcwRo-iMkkXRaXsvFO8sleg==&ch=enmFAVuB5hpI3Idzcpf0zVijW-0FdYLzH6xlzvKacLAlJEbMIuRYLQ==)
---
|
Peter,
Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party.
With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists.
Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQ9i210f49qDvFsJja26PnW4s9FYoof_ThLxI6muGsSqcZuPl32gzgl9X29xRxhQRfQgGSLOsE3aKcCzQ0C-q_g0cAzpx9NnDcf3ptU5MF7wdkJc6Es14Minmjam6f4_TTbbs5AuMwDcTl1ObhG-pazpaEE6UJEjXC8De9SNZ_98pACu3LbiY7e8Be358HmOXiJ4csHSnc6S59OedHWCELyEchjJETWW&c=54hOn_IuNEW8uRdMLRz91Y1Ovrva3PoWcwRo-iMkkXRaXsvFO8sleg==&ch=enmFAVuB5hpI3Idzcpf0zVijW-0FdYLzH6xlzvKacLAlJEbMIuRYLQ==)
---
You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now?
As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three.
A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026.
A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes:

* Universal healthcare
* Tuition free college and university
* Affordable housing and lower costs
* Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy
* Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes

MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it.
Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress.
[Will you chip in $50, $25 or whatever you can spare to help Bushra Amiwala win this race and keep this deep-blue seat in the hands of a strong Democrat?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IQ9i210f49qDvFsJja26PnW4s9FYoof_ThLxI6muGsSqcZuPl32gzgl9X29xRxhQIdBAsPMSDh6HmBB-VRvrVyPcNYoYi-KVt3dWUZW2tqXZTrmIWOSRk6JUxuvpS_M3_VhxiqJs5onR0V7Pq9BK7xyvIlazEPP4Rn_jfJxm64S1X4EP_p6diFkBu37ewrRTxwSnsc805geAeZvyioeByvstk2JtZE1-c24enTkAXC4=&c=54hOn_IuNEW8uRdMLRz91Y1Ovrva3PoWcwRo-iMkkXRaXsvFO8sleg==&ch=enmFAVuB5hpI3Idzcpf0zVijW-0FdYLzH6xlzvKacLAlJEbMIuRYLQ==)
---

clean_body: As Tracy Chapman once said: “Give me one reason,” well... we’ll give you three. | | | | | == | Peter, Illinois' 9th District just became ground zero in the battle for the future of the Democratic Party. With Democrat Jan Schakowsky retiring, one of the safest Democratic seats in the entire country is suddenly open and forces outside of Illinois are scrambling to claim it--establishment DC power brokers, MAGA billionaires, AIPAC, and corporate lobbyists. Bushra Amiwala is running to make sure that IL-9 stays a strong, unapologetically progressive seat, not a trophy for MAGA billionaires or the DC elite. As one of the top-funded campaigns in this race, she is considered a frontrunner to be the next representative for IL-9. | == You might be wondering: why is Bushra the candidate Democrats should be supporting right now? As Tracy Chapman once said: "Give me one reason," well... we'll give you three. A new generation Democrat with real experience: Bushra started organizing against Trump's first administration straight out of high school and she's spent 7 years in elected office delivering for Skokie families. She's the rare candidate who brings fresh energy to the party with day-one readiness. Democrats desperately need both in 2026. A people-first agenda that meets the moment: Bushra is fighting for the people of IL-9, not corporations and special interests. Her agenda includes: Universal healthcare Tuition free college and university Affordable housing and lower costs Ending America's blood soaked foreign policy * Abolishing ICE and holding agents accountable for their crimes MAGA & AIPAC are trying to buy this seat: Because they can't win IL-9 with a Republican, MAGA billionaires and AIPAC are funneling money into the campaign of one of Bushra's opponents who will fold in Congress when Trump demands it. Bushra is going toe-to-toe with these MAGA billionaires but she desperately needs the support of Democrats across the country to ensure this seat stays in the hands of a strong Democrat who will take the fight to Trump and MAGA's extremism in Congress. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Thank you for your support, Team Bushra | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Ro Khanna
subject: This is how we splinter the MAGA base – and win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Help me continue to show up in red districts, MAGA podcasts, and conservative spaces. It’s working.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwjrIo7juNNC6aXWkdr_R5qTaryOBUlfCFwQwYzYmtJnul5xKfeVgfuVsAaK9pAkG8rs61UwJ2uhjdLuYnuzfaGEwrqDP5W7JIV7zg_HvAUZs1iKbCQIOKzBtxi-EwXNg70GUs-l_fK3ePN42ljhKG4Pu_i08KykReAYIsQUdBNllaD2He7yvDF4Ma2z2IyJAaVZM_GtAjoNJ_NedSsRHQITMNZ9XXtW&c=rrcWjJ75v4dWcpGDGvcBYcg8e6AEWwxXrAB8CBDdvBFEmKXVbnmb1w==&ch=azs4SNHRRwdWz5eChqaX49NQf7lWLgbe7nczwzGSAtlQfM-4rpH2cg==)
---
|

Peter,
I'm going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, we have split the MAGA base, and we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans are ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn't happen by accident.
It happened because I've spent months:

* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect -- not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn't believe this strategy would work. But it's working.
It's the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade - since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President.
And if we can break Trump's coalition on transparency and a government for the people, not the rich, powerful, and well-connected, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
[Will you rush a split $25 to my campaign and Trisha Calvarese to help us keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwjrIo7juNNC6aXWkdr_R5qTaryOBUlfCFwQwYzYmtJnul5xKfeVgfuVsAaK9pAkEenlVCP3f9L-C3F2NMHk6x90nad9ZWzU7ID1GlKu1zFaRYtBYTXofga_ZfiUjFN1ICJQo_mGpcEVrY3nEWSOHgNSLaPymyosjdqtHM3EccQYzH3-DsRlv2pVNg3gRCwMhIXntseUvCSkXY2JV_mgZMn4vG0T-NA3rNm5AewsRJw=&c=rrcWjJ75v4dWcpGDGvcBYcg8e6AEWwxXrAB8CBDdvBFEmKXVbnmb1w==&ch=azs4SNHRRwdWz5eChqaX49NQf7lWLgbe7nczwzGSAtlQfM-4rpH2cg==)

---
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZwjrIo7juNNC6aXWkdr_R5qTaryOBUlfCFwQwYzYmtJnul5xKfeVgfuVsAaK9pAkG8rs61UwJ2uhjdLuYnuzfaGEwrqDP5W7JIV7zg_HvAUZs1iKbCQIOKzBtxi-EwXNg70GUs-l_fK3ePN42ljhKG4Pu_i08KykReAYIsQUdBNllaD2He7yvDF4Ma2z2IyJAaVZM_GtAjrJmS-5E7AYWfCSUlhkeE4M&c=rrcWjJ75v4dWcpGDGvcBYcg8e6AEWwxXrAB8CBDdvBFEmKXVbnmb1w==&ch=azs4SNHRRwdWz5eChqaX49NQf7lWLgbe7nczwzGSAtlQfM-4rpH2cg==)
---
|
We don't take lobbyist money. We don't take corporate money. Our campaigns are powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:

* Travel and event logistics to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* Promotion and organizing to bring new people into the movement.
* Security and operations so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn't understand. Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity, Ro Khanna
---
