| | | Dear Friend, There's a catch when it comes to reducing your blood pressure. Blood pressure medications don't "cure" anything... ...they just delay the inevitable. And without major changes — when you stop taking them — your blood pressure goes right back up! [ ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=6e9a85ae4c77512d51d5d688603a170d86c533b0a18253916c40bf0d4f9575b192b6680b90849ca93a1fd6493f981c75a0efe81c055f7f8161f6252f570e198e)

That's because they're treating your symptoms... In fact, it's a never-ending cycle of symptoms and drugs... symptoms and drugs... rinse and repeat! Until you [**find out how to get to the root cause of your problem**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=6e9a85ae4c77512d51d5d688603a170d86c533b0a18253916c40bf0d4f9575b192b6680b90849ca93a1fd6493f981c75a0efe81c055f7f8161f6252f570e198e)... you'll never have normal blood pressure. But here's the secret they don't want you to know... |

name: The Flyover
subject: Trump Pushes Epstein Vote, Drinking Myths, and an Art Cleanup
body:
President Trump urged House Republicans in a [Truth Social post](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2q4zAUBOCnkboEHf1ZKlQsLO6y1cKWRrGOYy2yZaSThLz9xfcVbjsDH8z8u023mEveH3_ihoGWOu347gWJsE3UnttxPPuKHY9OmPdXJUwtT1JIcwG4gJtSzOUzaZ7CgihRcQwwWKWt8krxNcSEOg3u7hcrkx0GMUvl7kJgXJI3oHkOpwYADkAYBVeplqTUbB2gu3swTAtMmWq7_q95pxWX8qkvbNe5bryElejoTP1icmRypPaktdc5x3L2Z6hFw1h-1z2W9PecxOR41E6dyRHAGCuttF6B8d5ox1tIxzuXkrsdmBaPLeZvitOP_nkF-RUAAP__4yZ4IA) to vote for the full release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, reversing earlier warnings that the issue was a political trap. He said the GOP has “nothing to hide” and indicated he would sign the bill if it clears both chambers.

# Tuesday, November 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this date in 1963, Bell Telephone began offering service for the world's [first electronic push-button, touch-tone telephone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAYRZ9GO4wfqIMFxTZ2s-2WBuU6skEw8I1m3n4z-wp_fZN7cs6f5_y0Pvj4-m0PGN7SHHGXAGbkmfP7OM932VFwFoaPV2K47GfZyl4QCdKzsz585q52ZgMkVA1Dj0F1gxqVqndDsCuURt9Ca7n1tOptXJVuaVns8nC1N983ItJEba-okWpzSq2DJuhlpL7qWjjPKTd_k4-8YwufdCE3azrqYHbms1TqVyWnSk73fTdw8btVcuIUIZy3X0PBCDj3FFGEzRA-ck7uvcKJmC4cC7IgLWgcVCWnOht33j4EX4ZH1bWvw_rwn8g_ynQZ-S8AAP__reF9cg). The original touch-tone telephone came with 10 push buttons--the addition of the * and # keys would arrive soon after. 🤠 _The Texas Flyover_ just hit over 400,000 active readers! If you live in the state--or know someone who does--[use this link to sign up and stay in the know](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7FuwyAQQL_GbIm4AxwzMHTJlq4dETFHTIWNBZek-fuqnbp3f-9J7-PiLyGXvN3ew0qOU_UbPXshZmqe233d93tfqNPemfL2qEyxZY8SzQHgAJOPIZeX1yK6RISkBDk4jUqPyiolFhctJopGpjAjYiKwo0Grr7PS0kRjRXY_NQCYAKRRcESVolLzOAFNVwtm0JJi5tqOnzVvvFAqr_qgdpzrKopbmPc-qLcBzwOeeSGmr9D_MAOeRXNxf-ZSch9Pg5a3NeTy6_O_ph8OvwMAAP__u2Rr6A). 🎧 What happens when a Florida state football championship collides with a decades-old Supreme Court ruling on school prayer? On today's episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown explains how the nation's highest court handled the issue of pregame prayer over the stadium loudspeaker. [Click here to watch](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz0tugzAQANDTmF2Qx2M-WXhRtWKXKrsuEdjj4MpgZA9EuX3VXqEXeNL7uo23KcSwPT6nlQz7NG70LJGYKY-cj3Xfj7JQob0whe1MTC6HUUnVXAAu0I9uCvE16soZT6QIKzLQtahbvCJWi_HdLCVaPdtWae_mK_aoJrRNPwOC7KpgfjUA6AFkg1Ar9A7Rtj1QP1-hEVqSC5xy_Z3Cxgv5-Eon5dqmtYpmYd6LwDehBqGGVzr4qGcSanjP-n6_nDSsVuDAAj9Q6iobtz9DjKG0ndDysU4h_kn8r_5p1E8AAAD__9eMbPE). If you've ever wished you could make a real, immediate difference in a child's life, today's sponsor, [Convoy of Hope,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u2zAMhZ9G3hJYkn_iwUOBwNvt2lHglSibhSQaMp2LvH2RNn2CuxH8gO8cnF8f7gMoUVl_QsZZIruCX0dCEaxO6pn3_Tw2PHA_BKk8WDBUcqY1_UXri765AJSermvCHBEN2gZnPQ62G-xkbbPNfYRgRt1FHGKA6VNPMWBnWw8ex2mEhuaXTWt907rtrb4aG4O1frhpvH1Oulddi4GE6_U3U5ENY3ryA-vVc27SvInsh7I_lFmUWTyXBz85brzjleuqzBK4gKAyS0QMXF6Xsssp2R18Vo_K3t9GZYbXO2OgMyt7D7SSQLpAeBMPeQdai7J3D_nStl0_jf8ZF8EiL9u_HFdAiAukps5h_6KU6BhG1bVrBkp_28u3Jn_M5k8AAAD__1MxmPE) gives you the chance to turn a simple gift into the daily meals--and hope--that hungry children desperately need.

## Trump Backs Vote on Epstein Files
President Trump urged House Republicans in a [Truth Social post](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2q4zAUBOCnkboEHf1ZKlQsLO6y1cKWRrGOYy2yZaSThLz9xfcVbjsDH8z8u023mEveH3_ihoGWOu347gWJsE3UnttxPPuKHY9OmPdXJUwtT1JIcwG4gJtSzOUzaZ7CgihRcQwwWKWt8krxNcSEOg3u7hcrkx0GMUvl7kJgXJI3oHkOpwYADkAYBVeplqTUbB2gu3swTAtMmWq7_q95pxWX8qkvbNe5bryElejoTP1icmRypPaktdc5x3L2Z6hFw1h-1z2W9PecxOR41E6dyRHAGCuttF6B8d5ox1tIxzuXkrsdmBaPLeZvitOP_nkF-RUAAP__4yZ4IA) to vote for the full release of records related to Jeffrey Epstein, reversing earlier warnings that the issue was a political trap. He said the GOP has “nothing to hide” and indicated he would sign the bill if it clears both chambers. Attorney General Pam Bondi directed the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York, a major federal prosecutor based in Manhattan, to investigate [Epstein’s ties to prominent Democrats](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8GdxMZ8F8Kim3cZdstLWyGeBIMFkwS-e1Xju4b3GaaIx3N-f7dppulQPH-125o2Kcp4qcEZMY8cX5t-_4qKxbcCyPFd2J0mSZVqxakBDlMzlI4pqZyxiMq1BUa2Xe66fRV62o1S4eIbe8GZa_DYlvvW-VU3S1z0-lW9xWZ0yalHKSsWy0vSnun9dINEof5KlvR1OiIU748EkVe0YcjvTFflrRVwazMexH6j1CjUGM89lT4REKNp1ioUcrzNEKNrwJnn1Djtw1seRZw6QGcYM9pRnig9xkP-AkGJiwnnSkEWAJFThESr5jB4VZgpjvMNj5PZ5WN2z8UApWuF0193yyF75f8q2nfRv0PAAD__2Yjjow) after Trump requested the move last week. The House is [expected to vote as early as today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdCDvGttQuEhDd2lTIg4vx0YGI9t36P4-IsofpJlqNE9vvm7jbeLA--Nz2siVJY47nTlQKZTGkp7bcTzzSpmOXIj3VyzkE48oUdcANXSjnzi8x7bybiFCUhU5sEa1RvVKVauTVoPBzoKFvvdKT16htaSpm6S5L3PF7loDgA5AagUNqsUrNZsOqLv3oEUryXOJqfmOvJeVlvCOL0rNHLcquLWUIwv1IXAQOJzn2RwxcOE5XgWBw2UkcLgoAgeAK6zA4c-pXjhQru8cQj3H_ZEo51pKozV2pkrOHyeHwNlY0crHNnH4BZd_vfVy-BMAAP__eht8Eg) on the Epstein Files Transparency Act, a bipartisan bill that would require the Justice Department to release all unclassified records related to investigations into Epstein and his associate, Ghislaine Maxwell.
## Seniors Face 10% Medicare Part B Hike
The Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) has announced that the standard [Medicare Part B premium is set ](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnwZ0jmPFnQXEbd7ntlhYxQ5gVthFMEuXtV9lX2PYc6Vf8v67r1XHi4_7f7WQlnOtBr5pIhMoq5bHn_KiRKuUqxMfzFPKFV9DQt8a0Zlq94_Reu8bbQASEDVkzDtgNOCM20WI_wOZo6hxS0G7uZ29mE8LoJtwCjg3bj2aMmYzRPZoLYPCI2zAZmm6z6VWnybOc5fJ98iGRQnqfTyqX7dybZKNIrgr_KVgULBIpckqfT8GSz8TbW8ESySWJmyukYOkHPXeo2508f6Y2uyLtrc2Fdn7stQUNg4KlKdbnF6fEdRhVp--741-5kT-lelr4CQAA__93F3zw)[to increase](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAQxfGnwZ0jmPFnQXEbd7ntlhYxQ5gVthFMEuXtV9lX2PYc6Vf8v67r1XHi4_7f7WQlnOtBr5pIhMoq5bHn_KiRKuUqxMfzFPKFV9DQt8a0Zlq94_Reu8bbQASEDVkzDtgNOCM20WI_wOZo6hxS0G7uZ29mE8LoJtwCjg3bj2aMmYzRPZoLYPCI2zAZmm6z6VWnybOc5fJ98iGRQnqfTyqX7dybZKNIrgr_KVgULBIpckqfT8GSz8TbW8ESySWJmyukYOkHPXeo2508f6Y2uyLtrc2Fdn7stQUNg4KlKdbnF6fEdRhVp--741-5kT-lelr4CQAA__93F3zw) in 2026, rising by nearly 10 percent (or $17.90) to $202.90 per month. This cost-of-living increase is largely due to projected price changes and increased utilization across the system. Seniors and disabled enrollees will also face a higher annual deductible of $283 for Part B, which covers services like doctor visits and outpatient care. For more details, refer to the official [CMS Fact Sheet](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOrDAQAE9jMiPbzW8CBy8hm5duiAxuhl7ZGNkNaG6_mr3CXqBKVV_P6eko0P767yJaXtO0410CMmOeOJ_xOM6yYcGjMNJ-JUafaTLKtFJrqYfJOwrvqam8XRENQoVW9x00HTwAqs2auWvNoFevdN_PAI2be3CP3qkOlYelIvuhaa0HrVULujaweoClGzQO80O3olHoiVOuvxPtvOEa3unCXC8pVsFuzEcR8E-YUZjxvu96iaV-pUuY8ROTU4rCjKtbWJYNkYswo1GmkxE9LS6jPFzmImd5ZIx0xiI9-nNhmgOWKlt_3BQCla4XjXpFR-FXzX_6dVnzEwAA__9kyYCS) on 2026 Medicare costs.
## Record Thanksgiving Travel Expected
A record [81.8 million Americans are expected to travel](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtDAQg58mdCAmCSwUKf6Gbv_2ShRgAnMXEpTMgvbtT-wrXGfJlvXZX8_xaclTWP_bHQ27OAa8skdmTCOn134cr7xhxiMzUjgj45JolLVsSoASunGx5N-jLhbjECWqAg08WqVb1StVbKZ3bd25x9Q6gElbcBonJ_u-VZO2jVYFmbsNADqAulFQSeUWpea2A-ymHhqha1yIY6q-IwXe0Pl3PDFVc9wLbzbmIwv1T8hByOG6rmqe8r3i9oUcbinkwJsNP3mlk8Jafvg52RN9aa0tXUw428ylpeQpYC5TtEu-I87RLORQJLMcF3lPuX0IXa-7Jf8h4D_ddhr5GwAA__9kW4Nm) at least 50 miles from home for the Thanksgiving holiday period, which spans from Nov. 25 to Dec. 1. This new record is a 1.6 million increase from last year, according to a forecast by AAA. The vast majority—nearly 90% of travelers, or about 73 million people—are expected to drive to their destinations. Gasoline prices are similar to last year, and domestic car rentals are projected to be 15% cheaper. Despite recent air travel disruptions caused by the resolution of a government shutdown, AAA projects that about 6.1 million Americans will fly, representing a 2% increase from the prior year. See [a year-by-year breakdown here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdCDGxsQpXGxDl223RBM8wOwajOwJUf5-xdP7g9cfnXt1_jzGB3LkffmNG3mZ07jTu0QSoTxKfm3H8SorFTqKEO9nEgqZR91qWwPU4MaAHD9jVwU_E2kyFXm49abrzd2YavUh0NNMnXUt0UTOhhB6Y4MLhiaN9lmxv2wA4ABaa6DRZg7GTL0Dcs87WNW1FFhSbv4m3mWlOX7SSbmZ0lZFv4ocRZlfSg9KD9f9nNLWIOIFKD1ceqUHAKUHRKxlxf1fWfjkfakl40mxnlOmCYvU33CVfTjeHCOX_qa6dtmQ49eg_KjS6fX_AAAA___Opnv5). The Federal Aviation Administration [lifted all commercial flight restrictions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OrDAUg58GuiCSQGCKFLeZbm67JQrkZDir_KCTAMPbr9hX2NayLfv7ek0vgx7j-78JoItLU4QzeygFaCq0h23b8woZtlwA45EKWMJJtKJnnDM-Ttagv6auttoBCJA1aD4o2Sn5kLJetbS9cmZeJFfDqOxjMGoANQvoR2Fkz2vUdxvnfOS87SVvhHRWykWNHMb5wfuqa8FiSdR8J4xlBeevdAA1Swq112spW67kv0o8K_E8z7Nx6TPvGSPkfHsq8XTpw-5jrJA5wN-KMQyiZRCA3hCXiyWyQIwg7wFYTBSMZwbpjjiHC0sbkCmYYmYhRWuumrTdTvQesxqqrn0Hg_53VPkTyUOLnwAAAP__MISL_Q) shortly before the holiday period, allowing airlines to resume regular schedules. Still, some air travelers may opt for driving due to recent uncertainty at airports.

He said the GOP has “nothing to hide” and indicated he would sign the bill if it clears both chambers. Attorney General Pam Bondi directed the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Southern District of New York, a major federal prosecutor based in Manhattan, to investigate after Trump requested the move last week. The House is on the Epstein Files Transparency Act, a bipartisan bill that would require the Justice Department to release all unclassified records related to investigations into Epstein and his associate, Ghislaine Maxwell. Seniors Face 10% Medicare Part B Hike The Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services (CMS) has announced that the standard in 2026, rising by nearly 10 percent (or $17.90) to $202.90 per month. This cost-of-living increase is largely due to projected price changes and increased utilization across the system. Seniors and disabled enrollees will also face a higher annual deductible of $283 for Part B, which covers services like doctor visits and outpatient care. For more details, refer to the official on 2026 Medicare costs. Record Thanksgiving Travel Expected A record at least 50 miles from home for the Thanksgiving holiday period, which spans from Nov. 25 to Dec. 1. This new record is a 1.6 million increase from last year, according to a forecast by AAA. The vast majority—nearly 90% of travelers, or about 73 million people—are expected to drive to their destinations. Gasoline prices are similar to last year, and domestic car rentals are projected to be 15% cheaper. Despite recent air travel disruptions caused by the resolution of a government shutdown, AAA projects that about 6.1 million Americans will fly, representing a 2% increase from the prior year. See . The Federal Aviation Administration shortly before the holiday period, allowing airlines to resume regular schedules. Still, some air travelers may opt for driving due to recent uncertainty at airports. name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: 🎙️Join me in Charleston Wednesday night!
body:
✅Vote today in Spartanburg Run Offs!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fa2dc14d8583/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6422816?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
|
---
| | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
| |
# The run off races in Spartanburg today and the women who can win.
---
|
---
| |
Dr. Octavia Amaechi, a family physician and Chief Medical Officer for Regenesis Healthcare who won 44% of the vote on November 4, is running against Dillon Swayngim, a Developer for Colliers, in a citywide race for Commission of Public Works that carries a six year term. [The race for CPW has taken a turn, and you can read all about it here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=865dded9ad&e=edbde6c9b1).
Leslie Rodgers, who previously ran Atlas Organics here in Spartanburg and has a career as a Business and Marketing Director in the Sustainability Industry, is running against Josh Summers, a local Dentist, for the City Council 2 seat vacated by Rob Rain.
**I’m asking today for you to consider supporting Octavia and Leslie, so they can get to the finish line.**
Both races will be extremely close due to low turnout and additional funds will pay for phone calls to remind voters to get out and vote. If you live in the city limits you can vote for Commissioner of public works at your local polling place, and if you live in Fernwood, Hillbrook, Hillcrest you can vote for Leslie Rodgers for City Council.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Support Octavia ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=022f9962bf&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | [Support Leslie](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=cb96ce8339&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| |
# Join me in Charleston on Wednesday Night
---
| |
Charleston friends! Please join us this Wednesday, November 19 at 6pm at 13 Morris Street as [**Grace Cowan**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8e97f01af3&e=edbde6c9b1) and I co-host the [**Frogmore Stew**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d6f41af1b0&e=edbde6c9b1) political podcast with the Peninsula Dems! We'll discuss gerrymandering, the unusual and undemocratic ways that South Carolina conducts elections, and what an ordinary citizen can do to make a difference within this system. [**Register today!**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=991ed45bae&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=84e0b321b7&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
| |
# We didn’t get the result we wanted, what’s next?
---
| |

From the bottom of my heart, I am so grateful for your support, for the opportunity to have run (twice now) to represent my community and for what lies ahead. While my race didn't get the result we wanted we knocked 6,000 doors, made 2,000 calls and had amazing volunteers and community members show up for this race. Please don't lose sight of what we have built in just a few short years.
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6771fa1901&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |

In 2024, over 20 Democrats ran up and down the ballot in the Upstate, and in Spartanburg where we challenged races, we moved the needle forward. In 2025, Democratically aligned candidates ran across the Upstate to serve their communities. From Greenville, to Travelers Rest, to Reidville, to Greer to Spartanburg, fourteen out of eighteen candidates won their races, two are in a runoff tomorrow, and two of us won over 40% of the vote in conservative districts in Spartanburg.
**This is what progress looks like, and now we must ready for the midterms.**
We collectively had so many wins in so many ways this November, and I hope you'll join me on December 1 as we celebrate the 2025 candidates who stepped up to run (and win!), and meet the 2026 candidates running for statewide office. Let's carry this energy into the New Year. [**Get your tickets here for our event in Spartanburg Monday, December 1**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=162c02e011&e=edbde6c9b1)**.**
---
| |
# 2026 Candidates in Spartanburg December 1
---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2012462bfa&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Celebrate our 2025 progress and bring that energy right into the 2026 midterms as we host our statewide candidates for US Senate, Governor, Congress and Superintendent of Education on Monday, December 1 in Spartanburg at Mclellan’s Chicken and Fish 1441 Union Street.
---
| [Get Tickets](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=88b9c1ebb1&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| |

* **Rally at the State House for Reproductive Freedom 2pm Gressette Building**
* **November 18 Run off for Spartanburg municipal elections 7am - 7pm**
* ****[**December 1: SPCDP Statewide Candidate**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a3030ac78d&e=edbde6c9b1)**M eet & Greet 6pm - 7:30pm **
* **December 18:**[**Rights & Empowerment Art Show Blue Spirit Studio **](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=b98aafb4ac&e=edbde6c9b1)**5-7:30pm**
* [**Upstate artists can submit by November 24 for a show supporting WREN**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=e53498746b&e=edbde6c9b1)

---
[|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=02212fe710&e=edbde6c9b1)
|
---
|
---
| | **CALL & EMAIL YOUR SENATORS ABOUT SENATE BILL 323 **Ban all medication abortion and even its manufacture or possession. Remove exceptions for rape, incest, or fatal fetal anomaly. Redefine embryos as full legal persons, threatening contraception, IVF, and miscarriage care. Impose felony penalties up to 30 years on physicians and medical providers. Criminalize helping someone travel out of state for abortion care. Gag doctors and advocates from sharing accurate medical information — even online.
---
|
---
|
---
| |

# Will the Epstein files bring down Trump?
---
| |

Should it pass the House, it still faces an uncertain future in the Senate, which is under no obligation to even pick up the measure.
It remains unclear whether Senate Majority Leader John Thune will do so - but the Republican is under enormous pressure from both sides of the US political spectrum.He had previously suggested that while he was "not hearing" much desire from fellow Republicans to push for the release of the documents, a successful House vote could change that.
"I just hope John Thune will do the right thing," Kentucky Republican Representative Thomas Massie told ABC News over the weekend.
Another Republican, Senate Majority Whip John Barrasso, only told NBC's "Meet the Press" that the Senate will "take a look" at the bill if it passes the House."We'll see what it says," Barrasso said. "We all want accountability and transparency. But to me, this it not about the truth. It's not about justice."
"This is about an attempt by the Democrats to make President Trump a lame-duck president," he added. "And I'm not going to aid and abet them in their efforts to do that."
[Read More](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d2d367139d&e=edbde6c9b1)

| | | | | | | | | | |

| [|
---](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=247dbafa76&e=edbde6c9b1)
| |
Just before the election I attended the 20th Anniversary of Emerge, the number one organization training Democratic women to run for office (and win). We heard from seven congresswomen about the state of our government and it lit a fire under me like you wouldn’t believe. The South Carolina Chapter of Emerge is accepting applicants for the 2026 Cohort. [You can apply here. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=1534e17f17&e=edbde6c9b1)
These past couple of weeks I’ve had my head down helping my friends with their run off races! We’ve been knocking doors nonstop and I hope we’ll see two victories tomorrow night. I went and voted early with our former Mayor Talley last Friday, and my best friend’s mom had her book launch at Blue Moon, order[ Leaving Edgefield ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6ae1556fac&e=edbde6c9b1)today!
Democracy is a participatory sport, stay with me y’all.

Leslie Rodgers, who previously ran Atlas Organics here in Spartanburg and has a career as a Business and Marketing Director in the Sustainability Industry, is running against Josh Summers, a local Dentist, for the City Council 2 seat vacated by Rob Rain. I’m asking today for you to consider supporting Octavia and Leslie, so they can get to the finish line. Both races will be extremely close due to low turnout and additional funds will pay for phone calls to remind voters to get out and vote. | | | Dear Friend, There's a catch when it comes to reducing your blood pressure. Blood pressure medications don't "cure" anything... ...they just delay the inevitable. And without major changes — when you stop taking them — your blood pressure goes right back up! [ ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=223adc9210c575412e37b291ad2f606583aab7108d5ab351e83ed1cca443b4cd91c6b595193fdfe0aa296474516fb7b6a03d4b322d6bc2a6c1e7bf9ce93f6f6d)

That's because they're treating your symptoms... In fact, it's a never-ending cycle of symptoms and drugs... symptoms and drugs... rinse and repeat! Until you [**find out how to get to the root cause of your problem**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=223adc9210c575412e37b291ad2f606583aab7108d5ab351e83ed1cca443b4cd91c6b595193fdfe0aa296474516fb7b6a03d4b322d6bc2a6c1e7bf9ce93f6f6d)... you'll never have normal blood pressure. But here's the secret they don't want you to know... Here's how to get 120/80 BP and healthy circulation... with [**4 all natural blood pressure savers...**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=223adc9210c575412e37b291ad2f606583aab7108d5ab351e83ed1cca443b4cd91c6b595193fdfe0aa296474516fb7b6a03d4b322d6bc2a6c1e7bf9ce93f6f6d) Yours for Peak health,

|

Virginia Tims-Lawson
Chief Research Officer

body:

# Tuesday, November 18, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On [this day](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OwyAQQOHT4C4WDPivoNjGXbbd0hrMJBkJBwsmcXL7VfYK2z99xfs5L2fkxPfrN27k5XXJy52OmkiEyoIhZJEnV5YqJee91u3x2CstoKE7GXMy4xKR03txTfRBx8k05M3QW9cPVrvm5qOeELvBxmiREFa99j1ccOommFbTuYb9BzPGjAa0cdAOAe0YpnENUXdkQTlNkSWXVm4k9MJ6Se_8pNKueWuSv4nsVdkvBbOC-TiOltKONQtvVD-NgjkHlgcWpqpglvumR-M6aIqP-8Epce0H5fR1Q05_qvzvxdPDbwAAAP__YeN0dw) in 1958, [Laura Lynch](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtu6zAURFdDdRT4069g8Rp1fm1KgZ9r6yKkKJCUZe0-cIKsINU0g8Gc83FbbgYDbo__JoKur3taNjhLgFohL8baVOsTC9ZSc0p7KfE49gKLYKKjnFM-Lt5guBbVeG2Zn3gDmg-9VP0gmWpW3QtvmILJT0qOk7TKDd6Z0TEFvOunrkH9HuOcj1wwrkQ7WCNHO43OetaBFEQx8FhTbusKFV6m3MOVnpBbl2IT9FrrXoj8R8RMxHyeZ7umEK4zJZ9hT7n-NImY41HQ_SZ9gxIxB3NkQ8O1uZV6MJ7e07F53B40QrSQqccXAnUrus9CuZDd0I9TL4mYm6z9fmIIWPqBKPaIBsP3q_o3l08tvgIAAP__OiyK6g), a founding member of the Dixie Chicks, was born in Dell City. We got a lot of feedback from readers about their favorite Thanksgiving side dishes! That got us thinking: What do you call the [bread-based side dish](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOpCAURp8GOw1cHGUKim3sZtstDQjqTVAM96ozb7-Zrbb_u6_4ck5y_rzGl8OE-_LbbdHye87jHm9KkTmW0XmfmS8kZOKS80G0nedBcQQJj1qpWpkxOEyfsa2C9TI8VRWt6jvddr2WbbVaeGijYTKzdDBN0vUetPGx61o_Gyn7Cu0XppQyCqRqoem908Y_zeSDfEQNopUxIOfS8Bo5vh3N6ZOvWJopb1WyK_NBQv8SMAgY7vtuKJ-8xrInvHBfvjcBw5xzEDAEpFXAQHzOM-7Lf7O-qA4lEuG-VMWG48aUkLpetHLZHKZ_Pv5ZpcvC3wAAAP__xqx-qg) sometimes cooked inside the turkey? Let us know in today's _Poll_. What happens when a Florida state football championship collides with a decades-old Supreme Court ruling on school prayer? On today’s episode of _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown breaks down how the nation’s highest court just weighed in on pregame prayer over the stadium loudspeaker. [Click here to watch](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz01uwyAQQOHT4F0sGIiNFyyqVt6lyq5LxM8kQcLBgrGT3L5Kr9ALfHrv52RPLuV0v367BQ09L8Xe8dEyEmG1zvtCtKeWqFEtZW1t2ba1oQUOx4MQB6FtdCm_rOqi8TxOokMjxkGqYZRcdTfjudIhSD44FUFr0IAOxylwrobpIo9dMm9MCKEFcKGgH72T2k86-MiPKIEpjjFRqT3dkPDp2iW_yo61D2XpsrkRrY3JDwYzg_lVNtp6jwzmz6rO58OO8xKYnInJr3dSNXF9pJxTG0am-HVxKf9J9L__3cBvAAAA___cv24Y). If you’ve ever wished you could spot the next breakout tech wave before the headlines hit, today's sponsor, [RAD Intel’s](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2O3DAMhU8jd2NIon68hYsAxnSbNqVAW5yxENsSJHp29_aBk71BSn74QJDv_XoP75i2dDx_4k4jfz5yOOijbcRMNeA8Z-ZXaokb15xLa_t5lkZBS21vSt3UECKm7SuYLo6zjG-qo1F5B8Z5kKZbx6isAbSz1k5qsrO3aCN5IOsRyJkujdcypdSgtFRG935GGOa3YZmjtARaGEkxca49r8T0ie2xfeUX1X7Je7eNK3NpAn4IfRf6no4XNe4rxnQwbT2mi8M9C5iMNUK7pQiYrNSD0A4FTGANXDhFAZNW_hr2S3FCu8t9CO1O3kPLZ11IwFQJl_X2fUVojEyh4PIbn_StLrgXTM9DwFSw8kG1ramoQd6M9OFfcOeRGIMxg7NOejC-q2MsH2nbUnNeGPncMW1_n-T_q-Y16j8BAAD__3jQnbY) early-signal momentum and upcoming 11/20 share-price change make this one of those rare moments where timing truly matters.

**We’re in the home stretch.**

Our 12-day sprint to reach **2,000 _Flyover_ investors** ends in just **four days** , and we’re still **240** away from hitting that goal.

For two years, _The Flyover_ has grown because readers like you did more than just open our emails. You believed in what we’re building: independent, trustworthy journalism that puts facts first and politics second.
When we launched _The Flyover_ , America needed a new kind of news source—one that didn’t talk down to readers or push an agenda. ## Abbott Visits Texas Troops Securing Border
Gov. Greg Abbott met with Texas National Guard soldiers and DPS troopers in Eagle Pass on Sunday to [thank them for their efforts](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1u3TAQhE8jdXwgKeqvYJFGndOmFJbiWlqEIgXuWrZvH7y83CDtYDD4vvn1tr4BJcr7TzjRy9d7WTN-ckIRrCuEUERuYhKWWsrFfH58XIyr1bZXxigzrREofa-ujT7oOJsWvRmHzg1jp117eIDO9BD6LegQHE5u1qGfR9eN0xhmN7Tkn2PGmMlYbZx9jAG6KczTFqLusbON0xhJSn3IgYJfwO_pu9xYH1s52-QPkYub7kdjl8YuT3zHkCFLyVSenX9pY5dUNkiNXfZyq5ecYqw3spID8m_e6aa8qxMhsZKiQqkRq3q5K0gl70wRFZ0n7RWESlaQEiG31cfrk1IiHsbG6f0ESn8B5f9uvb39EwAA__9gApHU) in securing the border as part of Operation Lone Star. ## OSHA Investigating H-E-B Employee's Death
The Occupational Safety and Health Administration (OSHA) is [investigating the death](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO4zAMRL_G7riQZG3iFC6uSbfXXmnQEh0TkCVDpJPNff3Bxv7BteQM5xHz52v8Qk6cH79xpUG_5zJmekkiVaojTlNRfbKwitZSNpF13zeh0Rn3CdaC7ceInN6jb-MwmXizLQ32eun85doZ3y5Db2g2Bm-BKHQm9DcXnbPRR_TUhUvX8nAcs9b21hnr3cd1wq6fbn2YovmkzjXeUGQt9UMXUvpGmdO7PKl-hLK2aVhUN2m6X427N-5-4HvBjFlL5nJofqaNu6cSMDXu_iorZoFIqAugwgIEE7yw0lJ2IdhqWTcVmClSxQSYI5xe4PwkUX6gcskCghl-kqDIglBC2LdziQkEZ9L36V4I05EVV84sWk8JKFUShFhWzo-d_h5EMb0BQ-BIWds6xO3FKbFcro03jxU5nW_r_5X1HNy_AAAA__-4iLLc) of a 27-year-old H-E-B employee at a San Antonio distribution center on October 24. According to police, Teresa Dominguez "sustained an injury from possibly a forklift" and "was found unconscious in the freezer." The Bexar County Medical Examiner determined she died from a [blunt-force injury](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upSAUhZ8GO4x7w_WnoJiG7k47pQHZKhkUI_voOW8_cV7hNqtZyfr5_nyP3y6muC-_3UaG33Med7pLImY6R-d9Zr5iiVz4zPkoZXu9jkIjNvglAST0Y3AxfUZdBeObMEBFBrpW6bZTja5W0w8htFr5WWnVU3A9-G4ISAHbdgbAKponDAB6wAY01p13qvdDP_nQfJFCoRsKkfNZ80pMb1fm9MkXnfWUtyqZlfkoQv0SaAXa-77rv8XxYwq0zxuBNuXJJYH2qRJoAR7pBNpcVifjflHhuDiO-yLzxNnTKQM5XmWe5SpJenm7k9b8KiRpO1L-EAm01WnCcceUYmk7oZtlczH938U_o3kZ_BcAAP__wbGJ_Q) to her left leg. H-E-B is disputing those claims, however, saying Dominguez was transported to a hospital by EMS after a coworker noticed she was "showing signs of distress" while [operating a forklift](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdCB7TDAuXLyGLq_dEo1hEqw1GNmTOPn7VfYXtr-6R-d8XecrhhiO-3_cyfHrluaDaonETHlG7xPzM5TAhXNKZyn743EWmkHCpVWqVeO8YojvuW9W5-VqVUNOmUH3g9GybzYHZlhQawvjavGGxkprgAY12AVpQd8E9zlTSo0KpOqhMx716O24-FVeSIPoJa2BU-54I6YXllt8pyflbkl7E93GfBah_wmYBEy11m5_Fzzw4HSE9BkJmD5WAqaYFowCJswclkgCpo18WzHTlh6F2pryN-UWlLLS6KE7t7PJbj1riDGUwYhe3ncM8RfNfwv2dPATAAD__wmPgWQ). The company added that it is "heartbroken" about its employee's death and is working with investigators to determine what happened. OSHA began its investigation the same day Dominguez died, but it has not been able to provide updates during the government shutdown. A spokesperson said the agency has [six months to investigate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHO4yAQBOCnwR0RLMZ2Copr3P3XXmktsI7REYhgE___25-SV7h6pNE38-dr-8KUU7n9xjs5_t7rVujsmZipbeh9ZX6lnrhzq_XR-_35fHTaQIGVWku9bBFT_tnGITqv4lUP5PQ8mXGajRqHwy06qgBmtHaGoEmryYRJgfUL0a5MHJJ7l2mtFw1Kj3CZPZrFX5fgo7JkQIyKYuLaLnwQ0zf2Pf_UF7VLqPchu4P50YX5JWAVsJ7neflLpdt3KmDFxilkErC-hwlYcw2YBawHeXlio6M-O8lIyIfsWCQWriVVWfuBMpUXdU435FSL3ClSwyw_CAErzEZaG2lXO0mPE8qRopeLp1legzaIMyh7paG5-DhTzqlPsxjV7Y4pf_T8f5-_HPwLAAD__13XluM) the incident and issue citations if warranted.

The Bexar County Medical Examiner determined she died from a to her left leg. The company added that it is "heartbroken" about its employee's death and is working with investigators to determine what happened. OSHA began its investigation the same day Dominguez died, but it has not been able to provide updates during the government shutdown. A spokesperson said the agency has the incident and issue citations if warranted. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The 11/21 Deadline will decide it all..
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

[https://secure.winred.com/rudy-giuliani-freedom-fund-79a3adfa/ed1ec15198b607a/?utm_campaign=20251113&utm_medium=email&utm_source=RW_B&utm_content=MAWCO&utm_term=lrm-active]

Friend, asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today,
I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand
my situation.

Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home,
arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing
me to the brink of bankruptcy..._

_...The worst thing they did was DISBAR me._

As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes
and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.

You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down
bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution.

Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I
_did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s
worth more than gold.

_AND THE LEFT HAS STOLEN THAT FROM ME._

_Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend
myself from the Democrats’ lawfare._

RIGHT NOW, I AM FACING A DEADLINE ON 11/21 THAT WILL DETERMINE WHETHER
THE DEMOCRATS’ LAST REMAINING RIGGED TRIAL AGAINST ME PROCEEDS OR IS
THROWN OUT FOR GOOD!

And because it’s in _state_ court, the President cannot save me with
a _federal_ pardon...

LEFT WITH NO MEANS TO DEFEND MYSELF, NO WAY TO BE PARDONED BY
PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR _STATE-LEVEL_ CHARGES, AND NO MONEY FOR A
TOP-NOTCH LEGAL DEFENSE TEAM, I’M RUNNING OUT OF OPTIONS.

BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY
END!

_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you
contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. YOU
truly are my final hope._

PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND BEFORE
THE 11/21 TRIAL DEADLINE SO THAT I CAN KEEP FIGHTING TO ENSURE MY
TRIAL IS DROPPED.

clean_body: - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - [] Friend, asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation. Of all the things the Deep State did to me – raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy... ...The worst thing they did was DISBAR me. As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater priceless treasures. You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution. Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I did make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold. AND THE LEFT HAS STOLEN THAT FROM ME. Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare. RIGHT NOW, I AM FACING A DEADLINE ON 11/21 THAT WILL DETERMINE WHETHER THE DEMOCRATS’ LAST REMAINING RIGGED TRIAL AGAINST ME PROCEEDS OR IS THROWN OUT FOR GOOD! And because it’s in state court, the President cannot save me with a federal pardon... LEFT WITH NO MEANS TO DEFEND MYSELF, NO WAY TO BE PARDONED BY PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR STATE-LEVEL CHARGES, AND NO MONEY FOR A TOP-NOTCH LEGAL DEFENSE TEAM, I’M RUNNING OUT OF OPTIONS. BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END! That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. YOU truly are my final hope. PLEASE MAKE A CONTRIBUTION TO THE RUDY GIULIANI FREEDOM FUND BEFORE THE 11/21 TRIAL DEADLINE SO THAT I CAN KEEP FIGHTING TO ENSURE MY TRIAL IS DROPPED. [] [] CONTRIBUTE $25 [] CONTRIBUTE $50 [] CONTRIBUTE $100 [] CONTRIBUTE $250 [] CONTRIBUTE $500 [] CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT [] Thank you and God bless you, [] Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Team Kaptur
subject: A blatant power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
Peter, the Ohio GOP has once again gerrymandered our maps - and our district was their top target
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b129f96-5ca0-4aa4-b34d-719abbc65cb2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, in 2018, Ohio voters overwhelmingly approved a constitutional amendment to end partisan gerrymandering and institute a fair, bipartisan redistricting process. But Ohio Republicans ignored it and passed illegal maps after the 2020 census. Their redistricting plans were so biased that the Ohio Supreme Court rejected them seven times. [Now, they're trying to steal even more seats — including Marcy's. But Marcy and Blue Amp Action are fighting back. Split a contribution between them here >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbd89e721-7d4d-4923-b3e3-8e8f985bd020/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) If Ohio's congressional districts reflected our electorate, Republicans would have an 8-7 majority. But instead, Ohio's GOP mapmakers gerrymandered Marcy's district to make it even redder. That's an unprecedented attempt to steal elections and disenfranchise Ohio voters. But Marcy isn't backing down. She's won against long odds before, and is ready to do so again. [We need all hands on deck to fight back, Peter, because Marcy and Blue Amp Action never back down when it comes to fighting for our democracy. Are you with us? Split a contribution today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c3f3bbd-ec03-46f4-8162-9ba43ad25d4a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Thank you, — Team Kaptur

Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22f6be33-7ebe-4cca-a619-5ed7616d816c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: DNC Community Engagement
subject: Bilingual (ENG/SPN) Know Your Rights to Vote Informational Session – Dec 4, at 6 PM ET
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=7d9f2eba82&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
|
---
| |
# “Know Your Rights to Vote” Informational Session
---
| |

The right to vote is a fundamental pillar of our democracy. Across the country, communities are coming together to protect this right and ensure every voter’s voice is heard. But we cannot do this work alone.
We invite you to join the **Democratic National Committee** and **Latino Victory Fund** for the informational session **“Know Your Rights to Vote”** on **Thursday, December 4, at 6 p.m. ET.**
During this session, you’ll learn about your rights at the polls, the legal protections available, and the actions we’re taking to ensure free, fair, and accessible elections. We have critical runoff elections this December, from Nashville to Miami.
---
| [REGISTER HERE](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=66ff870846&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
| |
# Sesión Informativa “Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”
---
| |
El derecho al voto es un pilar fundamental de nuestra democracia. En todo el país, comunidades enteras se están organizando para defender este derecho y proteger la voz de cada votante. Pero este trabajo no lo podemos hacer solos.
Por eso, le invitamos a unirse al **Comité Nacional Demócrata** y a **Latino Victory Fund** para una sesión informativa bilingüe sobre **“Conozca Sus Derechos al Votar”** el **jueves 4 de diciembre a las 6 PM ET**.
Durante esta sesión aprenderá sobre sus derechos en las cajas de votación, las protecciones legales disponibles y las acciones que estamos tomando para garantizar elecciones libres, justas y accesibles. Tenemos elecciones de segunda vuelta decisivas este diciembre, desde Nashville hasta Miami.
---
| [REGÍSTRESE AQUÍ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=ceb801ea4a&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | |

---

DNC Community Engagement * 430 S Capitol Street, SE * Washington, DC 20003 * USA

I'm the ONLY Democrat in this race who has polling that shows we can win, and with your help, we can build the grassroots campaign that finally flips Texas blue:](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5bed00d-e93f-4b68-a6bc-9f52f9ee8d56/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| Last cycle, we outran the presidential campaign by almost 200,000 votes – more than any other Senate campaign in the country. That's proof that your support has the power to reach across party lines and build the kind of coalition it takes to win tough races here in Texas. Republicans like Ken Paxton and John Cornyn are putting the interests of their wealthy donors ahead of hardworking families, and Texans are fed up and ready for real change. Which is why the political forecasters at The Hill are saying this Senate seat is one of the top five most likely to flip. But here's the reality: Those wealthy mega donors my opponents are beholden to poured over $117 million into the 2024 election to keep their grip on power in Texas – and they're already gearing up to spend whatever it takes to win in 2026. [The only way we can keep up is if grassroots donors like you are in this with me, Peter. So, I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 or more today between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me hit my $50,000 fundraising and keep building on the historic grassroots movement we've been building?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76f51840-1ace-4948-9b5a-257a5f123bad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

Colin

subject: We Filed the Emergency Motion Today. Zahid Needs You to Know What’s Happening.
body:

Friends,
Last week was Veterans Day. And, as the wife of a former President of Veterans for Peace, it was also Armistice Day--an older tradition honoring the end of the First World War and insisting that peace, not war, is what we should celebrate.
The contrast matters.
Veterans Day in America has become a ritual of honoring "the troops." Armistice Day asks a harder question: **What does it mean to actually honor service? To protect those who protected us? To refuse the machinery of endless war --and the betrayals that follow in its wake?**
This year, that question hit home.
I spent the day speaking on a panel about _deported veterans_ --a crisis most Americans have no idea exists--and delivering the keynote at the Armistice Day rally in Tacoma. Many of you have seen clips of that speech ([full video](https://substack.com/redirect/de2651ec-75ac-4b79-92e3-aefc48a57a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [transcript](https://substack.com/redirect/ddab8b28-2cd9-4ad7-b3dc-07c45e054f88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). The message resonated because it pulled the veil back on something most of us were never told:
**The United States has deported nearly 100,000 military veterans.**
Not a typo.
Not rumor.
Not exaggeration.
**According to[research from Berkeley](https://substack.com/redirect/31f04323-dcc8-41bd-b94f-ef140f2196eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), almost 100,000 men and women who raised their hand, swore the soldier's oath, trained, deployed, and served this country have been exiled--stripped of everything including access to the VA, separating them from their families, and in some cases placing them in mortal danger.**
Only a few hundred have ever made it home.
The rest are out there somewhere, many living in hiding, some hunted by criminal organizations precisely _because_ of the military training America gave them. Others are navigating addiction, injury, PTSD, homelessness, and poverty in countries they barely know--without medication, without the VA, without community, without hope.
And far too many have died in exile, including by suicide.
### **The stories from the panel were devastating**
One panelist, a veteran exiled in Kenya for fourteen years, spent over a decade hiding his American veteran status because militias and kidnappers targeted anyone with U.S. training.
Another described cartel threats in Mexico--how cartels actively hunt American-trained veterans to conscript them, threatening their families if they refuse.
**Explain to me on what planet this is good for American national security.**
From a policy perspective, it's lunacy.
From a moral perspective, it's cruelty.
From a constitutional perspective, it's perilous.
And yet...it happens. Every year.
### **One family 's story**
Beside me on stage sat Latesha Parris, whose husband Marlon--a deported veteran--was taken two days after Trump's inauguration. They even had a formal "Letter of No Interest" from DHS saying they had no intention of deporting him. He had a past record, yes--but he served his time, rebuilt his life, and was raising seven children.
ICE detained him anyway.
When the family finally accepted voluntary departure in May of this year--which was approved by a judge in June--ICE kept him locked up until **August**. Three more months in detention after they'd already agreed to leave. Windowless, undernourished, overcrowded confinement.
Marlon was eventually sent back to Trinidad & Tobago. His family, who live in Arizona, now cross the border into Mexico to see him. As Latesha said, "He's one of the lucky ones."
### **And then there 's the work of people like Hector Barajas**
Hector, founder of the [Deported Veterans Support House](https://substack.com/redirect/d46f4b5a-28b0-45d2-b2ae-e0adeb72413b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in Tijuana, has spent _fourteen years_ supporting deported veterans--helping them with legal cases, reinstating VA benefits, preventing suicides, and giving them the sense of brotherhood and belonging that was taken from them.
His center has received calls from deported veterans in **53 countries**.
This is not a small problem. It is not a fringe issue.
It is a national moral failure hiding in plain sight.
* * *
## **And then there is Zahid. My husband. A decorated, disabled U.S. Army veteran with zero criminal record --detained by ICE.**
Most deported or detained veterans have at least some old criminal record. Many served their time years or decades ago. Zahid is unusual because:
**He has never broken a U.S. law. Not even a parking ticket.
He is 100% service-connected disabled.
He is wheelchair-bound.
He has two U.S. citizen toddlers at home.
And he is still in ICE detention.**
His medical conditions are severe and worsening. He is rapidly losing vision due to untreated thyroid eye disease. He's been denied thyroid medication and infusion therapy for months. He is approaching irreversible blindness.
ICE knows this.
They have the records.
They simply don't care.
### **And today, something far worse came to light**
Zahid told me this evening that detainees who arrived in the past three days--from the Portland/Vancouver region--were **injured. Mauled. Bleeding. Bruised. Lacerated.**
Not by fights.
Not by fellow detainees.
**By ICE attack dogs.**
Military/police K9 units were sicced on unarmed men who were already:
• handcuffed
• on the ground
• offering no resistance
• posing no threat
In one case, a Latino father had just dropped his seven-year-old off at school. ICE knocked. He didn't open the door. They lied and told him they'd hit his parked car--so he stepped outside with his driver's license to exchange insurance information.
They grabbed him.
Threw him down.
Cuffed him.
And then--only after he was _fully restrained_ --they ordered the dog to attack.
His two- and three-year-old children watched from inside.
Let that sink in.
These dogs are so highly trained that they _do not bite unless commanded._ ICE agents ordered it. On purpose. Anyone who claims otherwise is lying.
This is not "immigration enforcement."
It is state violence.
Against unarmed, non-criminal civilians.
And the men are showing up at the detention center with the wounds to prove it.
* * *
# **New Legal Updates on Zahid 's Case**
## **1\. The bond rehearing that should have happened ...didn't.**
Zahid filed a motion for a new custody redetermination under the new rules established in _Rodriguez-Vasquez v. Bostock_. The same immigration judge who previously claimed she had "no jurisdiction" to release him **denied** it again.
She also attempted to sabotage his BIA bond appeal by sending a memo claiming he filed it late--despite the fact that:
• he submitted it on time
• EOIR improperly rejected it
• they tried to charge him a fee that is **legally prohibited** for bond appeals
• he had to hand-write a five-page argument citing their own regulations to get them to accept it
The BIA saw through this and issued an interim order acknowledging his diligence and the extraordinary circumstances. They will accept the appeal as timely. That is _good_ news.
But the BIA is slow. They're very unlikely to reach his case before the Ninth Circuit.
## **2\. The Ninth Circuit is where everything now hinges**
He is technically expedited.
But "expedited" can still mean months.
Meanwhile, Zahid does not have months.
His eyesight does not have months.
His ability to see his children's faces... does not have months.
Our Motion for Release Pending Decision--filed weeks ago--got swept up into the other motions already set for argument later this year. That would be far too late: his medical condition would likely be irreversible by then.
So today, we filed an **Emergency Motion for Release Pending Decision**.
We are asking the Court to:
**Order ICE to release him immediately so he can receive the VA and Madigan medical care that he is being denied, and return home to his family, while the case proceeds.**
Legally, the Court is required to issue a decision within 21 days.
We have asked them to rule this week.
This is the moment.
This is the window.
This is the one that matters.
If you share no other update, share this one.
* * *
# **Armistice Day vs. Veterans Day**
At the Armistice Day rally, I spoke about the difference between honoring _war_ and honoring _peace_.
As the daughter of a Navy Commander who deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan, and the wife of a disabled Army veteran whose body bears the scars of service, I can tell you with absolute moral clarity:
**Peace is the higher honor.
Service means nothing if we abandon the people who served.
And war is not glory. It is violence, trauma, broken families, broken bodies, and broken promises.**
I have linked the [full video](https://substack.com/redirect/de2651ec-75ac-4b79-92e3-aefc48a57a59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [transcript](https://substack.com/redirect/ddab8b28-2cd9-4ad7-b3dc-07c45e054f88?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Please watch, and please share widely.
This is the moment Americans must decide whether our gratitude is ceremonial or real.
* * *
## **We need you in this fight. Right now. Today.**
This is not abstract policy.
This is a man's eyesight.
A father's presence.
A veteran's life.
A family's future.
A nation's integrity.
We are doing everything we can legally, politically, publicly, and morally.
And we need your help.
**👉 Please share Zahid's story.**
**👉 Please stay loud.**
**👉 Please help us keep public pressure on the Ninth Circuit.**
**👉 Please support the organizations doing this work - highlighting this week: [Black Deported Veterans of America](https://substack.com/redirect/bb377496-d2e4-4dc5-98b3-4e1dc0ceb7b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [About Face](https://substack.com/redirect/89670c79-b920-4410-b55a-f4d7eb269cb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Veterans for Peace](https://substack.com/redirect/e3a48dbc-dc75-49fb-a41f-95d631601582?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and the film **_**[Bring Them Home](https://substack.com/redirect/29f2aee5-8be4-415b-8018-18277b314f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_**by[Excuse My Accent](https://substack.com/redirect/b3985054-4108-40b3-8a88-8fb0a901d20d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
And if you want to support our family, the legal fight, and the broader movement:

She also attempted to sabotage his BIA bond appeal by sending a memo claiming he filed it late--despite the fact that: • he submitted it on time • EOIR improperly rejected it • they tried to charge him a fee that is legally prohibited for bond appeals • he had to hand-write a five-page argument citing their own regulations to get them to accept it The BIA saw through this and issued an interim order acknowledging his diligence and the extraordinary circumstances. They will accept the appeal as timely. That is good news. But the BIA is slow. They're very unlikely to reach his case before the Ninth Circuit. 2\. The Ninth Circuit is where everything now hinges He is technically expedited. But "expedited" can still mean months. Meanwhile, Zahid does not have months. His eyesight does not have months. His ability to see his children's faces... does not have months. Our Motion for Release Pending Decision--filed weeks ago--got swept up into the other motions already set for argument later this year. That would be far too late: his medical condition would likely be irreversible by then. So today, we filed an Emergency Motion for Release Pending Decision. We are asking the Court to: Order ICE to release him immediately so he can receive the VA and Madigan medical care that he is being denied, and return home to his family, while the case proceeds. Legally, the Court is required to issue a decision within 21 days. We have asked them to rule this week. This is the moment. This is the window. This is the one that matters. If you share no other update, share this one. Armistice Day vs. Veterans Day At the Armistice Day rally, I spoke about the difference between honoring war and honoring peace. As the daughter of a Navy Commander who deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan, and the wife of a disabled Army veteran whose body bears the scars of service, I can tell you with absolute moral clarity: Peace is the higher honor. Service means nothing if we abandon the people who served. And war is not glory. It is violence, trauma, broken families, broken bodies, and broken promises. I have linked the and . Please watch, and please share widely. This is the moment Americans must decide whether our gratitude is ceremonial or real. We need you in this fight. Right now. Today. This is not abstract policy. This is a man's eyesight. A father's presence. A veteran's life. A family's future. A nation's integrity. We are doing everything we can legally, politically, publicly, and morally. And we need your help. 👉 Please share Zahid's story. 👉 Please stay loud. 👉 Please help us keep public pressure on the Ninth Circuit. 👉 Please support the organizations doing this work - highlighting this week: , , , and the film . And if you want to support our family, the legal fight, and the broader movement: ➡ ️ Visit: ➡ ️ If you can, please become a paid subscriber to this Substack. Your support matters more than ever. Thank you for standing with us. Thank you for standing with veterans. Thank you for standing for peace. --Melissa (All photos credit to: Bryan Richardson) | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- You 're currently a free subscriber to "It's a Matter of Integrity" by Melissa Chaudhry. To support the mission and access the full experience, upgrade your subscription. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Melissa Chaudhry 6727 Martin Luther King Jr Way S, Suite M, #1117 Seattle, WA 98118 ? ?

body:
Every day, women across America search online for answers.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztm2f52bcbbh2alq3cf0go2t3q0575dvr2qjs84o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5geep72cph2bs)

Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That’s where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God’s love for her. As our thank-you, we’ll send you PreBorn!’s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0o1fqa9475rknvu1vos1ueg48p5tfjsh7jaq7uo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5geep72cph2bs) Calendar — a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. Inside, you’ll also find a **monthly prayer guide** to keep you connected to this mission all year long.

# Aaron Siri Inspires Texas
---
| |
---
| Last week, medical liberty advocates braved the bustling Austin-area traffic to welcome one of the **most prolific vaccine-choice attorneys of the decade, Aaron Siri** , to the Lone Star State. Avid supporters traveled from every corner of Texas - and even from as far as New Mexico, Kentucky, and California - to be part of this extraordinary evening. With pen in hand and genuine compassion, Aaron took time with each guest, listening to their personal vaccine-related stories as he signed copies of his instantly popular book, _Vaccines, Amen_. During his keynote, he revisited **memorable moments from his famed deposition of Dr. Stanley Plotkin** , whose name drew audible jeers from the crowd, and walked attendees through the **Hepatitis B vaccine trial** , including the shocking revelation that participants were monitored for only five days post-immunization. Aaron also sprinkled in **vaccine trivia** throughout the evening, to the delight of the nearly 200 guests in attendance. He seemed awestruck with the room’s **depth of knowledge** , smiling each time correct answers were called out from the audience. The night concluded with a **robust Q &A session**, where Aaron offered valuable insights on topics ranging from vaccine exemptions in private schools to repealing the National Childhood Vaccine Injury Act of 1986. Team TFVC is still **riding high from such an inspiring evening**. We are honored to lock arms with families across the country in our mission to uplift voices like Aaron Siri’s - **champions who devote their lives to protecting the rights of children and parents everywhere**.

---
| |
---
|
---

**She’s a radical Left Democrat who is rabidly anti-ICE, brags about “bullying” agents during raids, and pushes to defund cops while shielding sanctuary policies.**

Listen, I serve in the House. I watch "The Squad" operate every day. They do not need more company.

**But here’s the good news: President Trump just dropped a massive endorsement on Matt Van Epps. West Point grad. Combat-decorated Army pilot. Nine tours including deployments to Afghanistan and Iraq. The guy’s a warrior.**

President Trump said it himself: “**Matt Van Epps is a WARRIOR who will fight for YOU!** ” I’m proud to stand tall with both of them.

The Democrats are counting on us to be asleep at the wheel. They're flooding money into the district and looking to take it right from under our noses. And who are they putting all their money and energy behind? I watch "The Squad" operate every day. They do not need more company. But here’s the good news: President Trump just dropped a massive endorsement on Matt Van Epps. West Point grad. * * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7f2a431-8484-4d1c-9c16-9570aea14eb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Mexico City 's main plaza, the Zocalo, was rocked by riots over the weekend** as Mexicans are getting increasingly frustrated with the power the cartels have and federal government not aggressively responding to them.
The spark that lead to the explosion of violence outside the National Palace started in the state of Michoacan. The mayor of Uruapan, Carlos Manzo, was gunned down in front of his family during Dia de Muertos, once of the biggest holidays of the year. Manzo had been an outspoken critic of the cartels and President Claudia Sheinbaum.
**Watch the chaotic riots here:**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1be18171-3add-4f97-af26-d6429511d42c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Michoacan is a state that has been dealing with cartel violence for a long time, as different groups fight each other for control of the region. Thousands of civilians have been killed during the war, with just as many having been disappeared. The Mexican War on Drugs was started in Michoacan when the president ordered the military into the state in 2006.
Sheinbaum has repeatedly said her administration will not pursue a similar war because it resulted in too many deaths.
Manzo's murder has enraged Mexicans. His killing was yet another in a long list of politicians, activists, and journalists who had spoken out against the cartels and ended up dead. Right before Manzo was killed, the president for a union of lime growers was also tortured and killed in Michoacan because he publicly advocated for the farmers to not pay the cartels' extortion tax.
_**A message from our sponsor (Piece continues below)**_

**[Together with Health Sciences Institute](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# Dems fear new list more than Epstein?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear patriotic American,
Why are the Dems so obsessed with the Epstein list?
Is it because they're trying to take attention away from **[this new list](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**?
The top names are...
**[See the full list here.](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. If you ask me, every name on the list has blood on their hands. **[[Click to see the truth.]](https://substack.com/redirect/68ef83ba-c149-4cbc-a6f0-447d00edf69a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Shortly after the assassination, riots and protests have broken out in Michoacan. City halls in Morelia, the state capital, and Apatzingan were attacked and stormed by angry crowds, calling for the removal of the ruling Morena party.
This past Saturday, dozens of marches took place to protest the "narco-government," with the largest taking place in Mexico City. The marchers said Sheinbaum's government was responsible for Manzo's killing.
Once the march entered the city's plaza, the crowd started to immediately attack the security wall that was protecting the National Palace. It was one of the most intense riots I have covered in my career, as both rioters and police threw chunks of concrete and rocks at each other for hours.
Most of the security wall was eventually torn down. It took hours for police to expel the angry crowd from the plaza. Over 20 people were arrested and hundreds on both sides were injured.
The main question is what happens next? The prosecutor's office in Mexico City are pursuing attempted murder charges for some of the rioters for their attacks on police.
Sheinbaum said on Monday that was march was not filled with young people and their attempts to disrupt her government's policies will fail. Another march is planned in Mexico City on Thursday, which is the holiday that marks the country's revolution in the early 20th century.

name: BoebertCare
subject: How about a 15 hour wait at your ER?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
Boebert doesn’t care how many lose healthcare as long as she gets to pretend to be somebody important in D.C.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v8Ra2gf8VPnOziEhGsK1PYV2UD0adiZBx6x5OxRD48RZ_wWMdkAelBR7v9sI11x_uqUnNAgoKaRw3ZFSBMxuJcR_MDsgwt_eVahDQcnfPJ_vBGADiXzjU80f8Rf65uGJdNqBnBTaJermqupJRLnTzoU45MM_KeORYWGra-gb0pMVFHP-Guwipgh1gEIJDsWLLLWZ3WLQd3_NdC6MjOalPhxGMxy0g7wr9mNawv_1Hz4=&c=O_A4IuF2fgo3Zu8iaed_H667oFHztVv1UBVPYtjzVXFlIxXEQxKc6Q==&ch=QMyNxjfzskeBA_a5f9YBzmntIvphK6xwnHGy0nz3k7ylmpMiG98vCQ==)
---
|

Peter,
The future of healthcare is here. But it's much worse than Trumpcare--it's BoebertCare.
In Boebert's relatively short time in office--and even shorter time as a "resident" of Colorado's Fourth District, my home district Boebert only carpetbagged to in order to stay in office--she has given us a frightening vision of what healthcare looks like with her leadership:
Rural hospitals, critical national infrastructure our agriculture communities rely on, shuttering at record rates.
Massive insurance companies posting record profits while jacking up premiums and denying even more claims -- loading working people with impossible debt.
Hundreds of thousands of families, mostly children, kicked off of Medicaid because of Boebert's vote for the "Big Beautiful Bill." Hundreds of thousands of mothers, babies, children with nowhere to turn and no access to basic care for preventable illnesses.
Critical research into cancer and other fatal illnesses slashed.
All thanks to BoebertCare.
I cared for my parents when both my mom and my dad were terminally ill with cancer at the same time. I watched them pass just days apart. It is heartbreaking and, frankly, infuriating to think that we were on the brink of curing and treating so many diseases, including many forms of cancer--and Lauren Boebert voted to take that from us.
Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county. I can and will beat Lauren Boebert.
[America deserves better than BoebertCare. We need leaders who know what it's like to struggle and to care for our families and our communities. I am going to fire Lauren Boebert this election and fight for real healthcare reform in Congress. Will you chip in any amount to my campaign to help me do this?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v8Ra2gf8VPnOziEhGsK1PYV2UD0adiZBx6x5OxRD48RZ_wWMdkAelBR7v9sI11x_uqUnNAgoKaRw3ZFSBMxuJcR_MDsgwt_eVahDQcnfPJ_vBGADiXzjU80f8Rf65uGJdNqBnBTaJermqupJRLnTzoU45MM_KeORYWGra-gb0pMVFHP-Guwipgh1gEIJDsWLLLWZ3WLQd3_NdC6MjOalPiR0hEzLrNuKQbf-_nuSHuA=&c=O_A4IuF2fgo3Zu8iaed_H667oFHztVv1UBVPYtjzVXFlIxXEQxKc6Q==&ch=QMyNxjfzskeBA_a5f9YBzmntIvphK6xwnHGy0nz3k7ylmpMiG98vCQ==)

clean_body: Boebert doesn’t care how many lose healthcare as long as she gets to pretend to be somebody important in D.C. | | | | | == | Peter, The future of healthcare is here. But it's much worse than Trumpcare--it's BoebertCare. In Boebert's relatively short time in office--and even shorter time as a "resident" of Colorado's Fourth District, my home district Boebert only carpetbagged to in order to stay in office--she has given us a frightening vision of what healthcare looks like with her leadership: Rural hospitals, critical national infrastructure our agriculture communities rely on, shuttering at record rates. Massive insurance companies posting record profits while jacking up premiums and denying even more claims -- loading working people with impossible debt. Hundreds of thousands of families, mostly children, kicked off of Medicaid because of Boebert's vote for the "Big Beautiful Bill." Hundreds of thousands of mothers, babies, children with nowhere to turn and no access to basic care for preventable illnesses. Critical research into cancer and other fatal illnesses slashed. All thanks to BoebertCare. I cared for my parents when both my mom and my dad were terminally ill with cancer at the same time. I watched them pass just days apart. It is heartbreaking and, frankly, infuriating to think that we were on the brink of curing and treating so many diseases, including many forms of cancer--and Lauren Boebert voted to take that from us. Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county. I can and will beat Lauren Boebert. == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you for your support, Peter. Trisha Calvarese Democrat for CO-04 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | |

name: Terry Fye
subject: Put your frustration to good use
body:
Vote today in SD 35 and help boost election awareness in two upcoming special elections
| | | | |
---
| Year Round. On the Ground. That's our ethos at Greater Georgia.
In the run-up to the 2025 statewide and municipal elections, we pushed GOTV contacts into the regions that needed it most, and because of our efforts, 84,000 conservatives were mobilized in a low-turnout election.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| Of more than 406,000 total GOTV voter contacts, over 84,000 voters were successfully mobilized to vote either early or in-person.
---
| While we aren't the type to pat ourselves on the back when there's so much more to be done, we do want to recognize the hard work of countless volunteers, interns, and team members and say thank you.
And the work continues!
Today: Special Election -- Senate District 35 December 9: Special Elections -- House Districts 23 & 121
This is why Greater Georgia exists: Year-round. On the ground.
Registering. Educating. Mobilizing.
If watching conservative policies get trounced in November left you fired up, don't sit on it.
Turn that frustration into action.
Join us December 6 for Red Wave Weekend and let's turn the tide together.
---
| | [SIGN ME UP](mailto:dylan@greatergeorgia.com)
---
| |
---
|
Greater Georgia, founded by former U.S. Senator Kelly Loeffler in 2021, is working to register, engage, educate, and mobilize voters in communities across the Peach State. Our year-round work is focused on growing our movement by registering voters who may not be captured by Georgia's "Motor Voter" program, mobilizing diverse and underrepresented communities, promoting issue advocacy, and fighting to restore trust and integrity in our elections.
###

body:
Boebert doesn’t care how many lose healthcare as long as she gets to pretend to be somebody important in D.C.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VrA4hScsFbFFSZM0WQeg8TSLXolY9ztR4R-k6BF_mxQc-Fl9RHRc8vZ-e7e09TN2UvjBf_5Rc--QC8Ze5INpvBVmnp2va7d9d5a24g9TMvuqFzmeNR109HC1vCfVMhER_KKVKMd6VJYjfn19-MHBKnWsX3jR_OcJ_ueBWhaLf83nAuh3vwXhr382oCzMPyQ3AdID1dFS0fSs4tZq1PHEgcnufayEKsXi&c=oYRLkT7YAlCh7h_CFS2BTT6AogeHb368fq2VHAXDUaIFdegVKuR9kg==&ch=k5giBshBP3_HWgX-loNeOW6ut5BsKupeQSXszoJ4IvGXR17yT5t16g==)
---
|

Peter,
The future of healthcare is here. But it's much worse than Trumpcare--it's BoebertCare.
In Boebert's relatively short time in office--and even shorter time as a "resident" of Colorado's Fourth District, my home district Boebert only carpetbagged to in order to stay in office--she has given us a frightening vision of what healthcare looks like with her leadership:
Rural hospitals, critical national infrastructure our agriculture communities rely on, shuttering at record rates.
Massive insurance companies posting record profits while jacking up premiums and denying even more claims -- loading working people with impossible debt.
Hundreds of thousands of families, mostly children, kicked off of Medicaid because of Boebert's vote for the "Big Beautiful Bill." Hundreds of thousands of mothers, babies, children with nowhere to turn and no access to basic care for preventable illnesses.
Critical research into cancer and other fatal illnesses slashed.
All thanks to BoebertCare.
I cared for my parents when both my mom and my dad were terminally ill with cancer at the same time. I watched them pass just days apart. It is heartbreaking and, frankly, infuriating to think that we were on the brink of curing and treating so many diseases, including many forms of cancer--and Lauren Boebert voted to take that from us.
Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, I had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county. I can and will beat Lauren Boebert.
[America deserves better than BoebertCare. We need leaders who know what it's like to struggle and to care for our families and our communities. I am going to fire Lauren Boebert this election and fight for real healthcare reform in Congress. Will you chip in any amount to my campaign to help me do this?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VrA4hScsFbFFSZM0WQeg8TSLXolY9ztR4R-k6BF_mxQc-Fl9RHRc8vZ-e7e09TN2UvjBf_5Rc--QC8Ze5INpvBVmnp2va7d9d5a24g9TMvuqFzmeNR109HC1vCfVMhER_KKVKMd6VJYjfn19-MHBKnWsX3jR_OcJ_ueBWhaLf83nAuh3vwXhr382oCzMPyQ3AdID1dFS0fSs4tZq1PHEgeWeBJcJYfNb&c=oYRLkT7YAlCh7h_CFS2BTT6AogeHb368fq2VHAXDUaIFdegVKuR9kg==&ch=k5giBshBP3_HWgX-loNeOW6ut5BsKupeQSXszoJ4IvGXR17yT5t16g==)

name: Reid Rasner, CEO
subject: When retiring early isn't a dream come true
body:
| Hi Peter, What if you have to retire earlier than planned? If you do, you'll be in the same boat as most retirees today. Nearly 6 in 10 end up retiring earlier than they expected.1 That may sound like a dream come true. And for 1 in 10 retirees who stop working because they've saved enough, it probably is.1 But for everyone else, early retirement can come with unforeseen challenges. That's especially true for the 46% who retire early due to health problems, not financial freedom.1 So, it may not be a surprise, then, to find out that a lot of people are less satisfied in retirement than they imagined.2 After all, it's no secret that retiring early can dramatically change how long your money needs to last. That can disrupt any plans for retirement, and it's not the only curveball that may be on the horizon.
---
|
---
[Want to see some of the biggest financial threats to retirement savings and how to guard against them? Click here.](https://financeinsights.net/E7nliZXxgIWK6zJfprA8vfaPWMw?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) Warmly,
---
**Reid Rasner - CEO**
Omnivest Financial
(307) 337-1223
[https://www.omnivestfinancial.com](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cub21uaXZlc3RmaW5hbmNpYWwuY29tIiwiaGFzaCI6InJ3NnJmR2VrNHVCQWsycSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)
* * *
---
P.S. If you were forced to retire tomorrow, what would your retirement look like? Hit "reply" and share your thoughts. I'd love to hear your perspective, how you'd adapt, and whether you'd be excited (or not) about retiring early. Sources 1 - CNBC, 2024 [URL: [https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/27/early-retirement-comes-as-a-surprise-for-many-workers-study-finds.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjRcLzExXC8yN1wvZWFybHktcmV0aXJlbWVudC1jb21lcy1hcy1hLXN1cnByaXNlLWZvci1tYW55LXdvcmtlcnMtc3R1ZHktZmluZHMuaHRtbCIsImhhc2giOiJydzZyZkdlazR1QkFrMnEiLCJjb250YWN0X2VtYWlsIjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20ifQ)] 2 - CNBC, 2024 [URL: [https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/29/key-elements-for-retirement-wellbeing.html](https://snpy.io?djJ7InVybCI6Imh0dHBzOlwvXC93d3cuY25iYy5jb21cLzIwMjRcLzExXC8yOVwva2V5LWVsZW1lbnRzLWZvci1yZXRpcmVtZW50LXdlbGxiZWluZy5odG1sIiwiaGFzaCI6InJ3NnJmR2VrNHVCQWsycSIsImNvbnRhY3RfZW1haWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9)]

body:
Help me continue to show up in red districts, MAGA podcasts, and conservative spaces. It’s working.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MxUM0W6h5quq8pYawWqph2CJPcUvNQoPeuvREj0jAv32oKye-IM8Vebx0NQImwRKY6G6YfBFdUFILx27AW3keFABlonYipwt61XEIw_xF5xM-2bJXnxF4Rcvw6NYCeaMa_mRCMLKIKoQZgPpxv_Dfx7qW3m1-FLruBfUF_bNPxML257FA4dx6VOBi400tG2nB9wcH88zE5mxdhWhuzlEkmRHhBHLRMUmdsRnFz--1O5BwMnpqL2_QAlrf3cGdoId&c=-XamQZqo7d_Vo6-R5xiMzTECFetsveFy0CFQ3QAjtpewyeq8BfCVWQ==&ch=7cuNjVaGV45focuhVXoXHRrQF3rHYZ1Tlcqr-Bx-yectcLFbcecuzQ==)

| Peter,
I'm going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, we have split the MAGA base, and we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans are ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn't happen by accident.
It happened because I've spent months:

* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect -- not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn't believe this strategy would work. But it's working.
It's the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade - since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President.
And if we can break Trump's coalition on transparency and a government for the people, not the rich, powerful, and well-connected, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
[Will you rush a split $25 to my campaign and Defend Our Courts to help us keep building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MxUM0W6h5quq8pYawWqph2CJPcUvNQoPeuvREj0jAv32oKye-IM8Vebx0NQImwRKbTVKHz8KAOAoO4jusabhlvFMSILrzSLTK13_9_2RwN1mY6uLL3gcJvLpZ4HWYpCAMqMInjnjtuYxqcInd2bCZNU8ciWXOQYJ7fEtyLzdhoGckBXtnabWOyDFKKb5IrhMWZMmnnS-clZgu6TTBgJqbGzXCw4hSdTuB7Xwhb3Z6TV1qb1kbfk5Ohlja1ihpCTHPwCxstPBH3M=&c=-XamQZqo7d_Vo6-R5xiMzTECFetsveFy0CFQ3QAjtpewyeq8BfCVWQ==&ch=7cuNjVaGV45focuhVXoXHRrQF3rHYZ1Tlcqr-Bx-yectcLFbcecuzQ==)

We don't take lobbyist money. We don't take corporate money. Our campaigns are powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* Travel and event logistics to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* Promotion and organizing to bring new people into the movement.
* Security and operations so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn't understand. Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
