name: Chris Deluzio
subject: corrupt, corporate bootlickers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress.
Peter,
Growing up right here in Western PA, I learned the values we all know: hard work, service, love of country. Those values shaped who I am.
Stepping up after this country was attacked on 9/11 was an easy choice for me because of those values.
I went off to the Naval Academy at 17 years old to serve my country. I was commissioned as an active-duty naval officer, and led Americans at sea and in Iraq.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96729?refcode=em20251118-9727&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9727%2E614464%2EJd_AQ1)
Two deployments at sea and a tour on the ground in Iraq shaped who I am and my worldview, and strengthened my love of country and my love of Western Pennsylvania.
I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: "Ship, Shipmate, Self." You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress.
But in Washington, I see politicians acting, instead, like a bunch of corrupt, corporate bootlickers.
You’ve got the VA Secretary saying the planned firing of 80,000 VA workers won’t hurt veteran care. You’ve got Elon Musk accessing *your* private data and calling Social Security benefits a “Ponzi scheme.” You’ve got the Trump administration push to slash Medicaid and hand more tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy.
They’re gutting the programs hardworking families rely on, turning their backs on veterans, and raiding government resources—all to line the pockets of billionaires and corporate elites.
Peter, I don’t know about you, but those aren’t the values I was raised with in Western PA.
I learned to fight for what matters, to stand by the people who have my back, and to never walk away from a fight that needs fighting. And I’m sure as hell not backing down now.
**[I will always stand up for Western PA, but I need you with me. Help me keep up the fight for your rights and our democracy by making a split donation between Heartland Patriots and me today →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96729?refcode=em20251118-9727&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9727%2E614464%2EJd_AQ1)**

clean_body: I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress. Peter, Growing up right here in Western PA, I learned the values we all know: hard work, service, love of country. Those values shaped who I am. Stepping up after this country was attacked on 9/11 was an easy choice for me because of those values. I went off to the Naval Academy at 17 years old to serve my country. I was commissioned as an active-duty naval officer, and led Americans at sea and in Iraq. Two deployments at sea and a tour on the ground in Iraq shaped who I am and my worldview, and strengthened my love of country and my love of Western Pennsylvania. I learned a simple lesson in the Navy: "Ship, Shipmate, Self." You put the mission first, you put others before yourself. I hold that same belief today, and it guides my work in Congress. But in Washington, I see politicians acting, instead, like a bunch of corrupt, corporate bootlickers. You’ve got the VA Secretary saying the planned firing of 80,000 VA workers won’t hurt veteran care. You’ve got Elon Musk accessing your private data and calling Social Security benefits a “Ponzi scheme.” You’ve got the Trump administration push to slash Medicaid and hand more tax giveaways to the ultra-wealthy. They’re gutting the programs hardworking families rely on, turning their backs on veterans, and raiding government resources—all to line the pockets of billionaires and corporate elites. Peter, I don’t know about you, but those aren’t the values I was raised with in Western PA. I learned to fight for what matters, to stand by the people who have my back, and to never walk away from a fight that needs fighting. And I’m sure as hell not backing down now. name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture for good
body:
Charlie didn’t just talk about it. He built a movement that’s changed history.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1tcorshjq9e4hhh2sucqcgoas0ss5976eua8vd0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zun0ac5mmlg42tec0knfdtrvnvv71rp3s3n15ft0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjkkq2shi71lpa1l7pnppcichvstqnfiqk2ap7lg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv6naqgt2sklv4djjeru709imf783l3vqe8r2010_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhtmum8bd5nmna8pe0ntt1sk143gb59ppqqm8gu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrg4orv065sp8f8nsod0ld5v5jcmgtpemve8bpu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie6o32c3h2bs)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**

subject: The Principle That Guides My Life.
body:
Washington is full of talkers. Virginia needs a doer.
| | |
---
| | [](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Faction-over-talk%3Futm_campaign=20251114_Reeves_ActionOverTalk%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/1/0100019a978a800b-1dd5a7c1-df34-4ede-b30a-2fc627c90f2e-000000/U9G3em62gx4gpBpS7ULtT5FAdx0=453)
---
| |
---
| Peter, I've lived my entire life by one principle: **You can 't talk it up. You have to put it up.** That's what I carried with me as an Army Ranger. That's what guided me as a narcotics detective. And it's what drives me every day as a Virginia State Senator. **Service isn 't about speeches – it's about action. Leadership isn't about promises – it's about results.** And right now, Washington is overflowing with people who talk big and deliver little.
---
| | [STAND WITH REEVES](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Faction-over-talk%3Futm_campaign=20251114_Reeves_ActionOverTalk%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/2/0100019a978a800b-1dd5a7c1-df34-4ede-b30a-2fc627c90f2e-000000/U5kkA7-Iwp_cMPozv_eAckOTSTo=453)
---
| After decades in the Senate, Mark Warner has become exactly the kind of politician Virginians are tired of: someone who puts politics first and results last. That's why I'm running. Virginia deserves a U.S. Senator who will take the fight head-on, defend our conservative values, and work with President Trump to get real results for our families, our economy, and our future.
---
| | [SUPPORT REEVES FOR U.S. SENATE](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Faction-over-talk%3Futm_campaign=20251114_Reeves_ActionOverTalk%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/3/0100019a978a800b-1dd5a7c1-df34-4ede-b30a-2fc627c90f2e-000000/90y1HPcDSD8Yp1hN3lStL7Z2zgU=453)
---
| I'm not in this to make noise. I'm in this to make a difference. But to take this fight to the next level, I need you standing with me from the start. [** _Will you add your name today to become a founding supporter of our campaign? >>>_**](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Faction-over-talk%3Futm_campaign=20251114_Reeves_ActionOverTalk%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/4/0100019a978a800b-1dd5a7c1-df34-4ede-b30a-2fc627c90f2e-000000/EUCIxy2khc1yXIWLT_aodjHpPwk=453)
---
| | [ADD YOUR NAME - STAND WITH BRYCE REEVES](https://xbdizvxp.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Freeves-for-senate%2Faction-over-talk%3Futm_campaign=20251114_Reeves_ActionOverTalk%26utm_id=CE%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=ac/5/0100019a978a800b-1dd5a7c1-df34-4ede-b30a-2fc627c90f2e-000000/F4MRWY_Bgtr6z6B6VtSkpykj2l8=453)
---

name: Ro Khanna
subject: We just showed Democrats how to defeat Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Help me continue to show up in red districts, MAGA podcasts, and conservative spaces. It’s working.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-t-RWtXvx1a4wPOSdUbdePDMTaJ1nZi6oC2vBww_lf0xnM0TgcHr0ZdGnybs8ah4RF8ovaU4J7abaIjKxC4m306Qct55Q7ByZic4umklLoh_bvOR7BhV_GInGSMMjHujVfiMmqgZvWBLnTD4LfHYUUgtjFYM8fr6ePRXO5xwMVuSiYWexxMenJ082qd6O6xIkO3AcSm6qLSncHOhTer0n3HJFwZOLR8Nj_k22m4X6m3eekvq49aDgu6hcUmQtOe&c=7gzWyePlhtsNkwVV-GN9mHOvqDF_6Dy8UufV0JapiIGI4-SZFhjkUQ==&ch=Y9_Ddw5fBLw6fy3GuWfQFENF4qiDz_ZcBgOVR5iMkTl1fcQZfDDWJQ==)
---
| Peter,
I'm going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, we have split the MAGA base, and we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.
Up to 40 MAGA Republicans are ready to support my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act, even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn't happen by accident.
It happened because I've spent months:

* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect -- not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn't believe this strategy would work. But it's working.
It's the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade - since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President.
And if we can break Trump's coalition on transparency and a government for the people, not the rich, powerful, and well-connected, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
[Will you rush a split $25 to my campaign and Defend Our Courts to help us keep building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-t-RWtXvx1a4wPOSdUbdePDMTaJ1nZi6oC2vBww_lf0xnM0TgcHr0ZdGnybs8ahFEnhR8vXDHkhGKV2RZqZiIEpnsQFWq5n0du7N1g6sqV1d9olk656_hm6acHwfba_krbwHvr1vf9wNHpnUQcqaY1HOfvpWXEEaMtbSwpGMsOdM3oisL718atiebdApg9bFckoyZDSmI8BmYRPPDbAqxPViNEuWSogxCsoE4h6SywDYwHq6VDu3CvdwEveYGZgEOZGMBHRDBs=&c=7gzWyePlhtsNkwVV-GN9mHOvqDF_6Dy8UufV0JapiIGI4-SZFhjkUQ==&ch=Y9_Ddw5fBLw6fy3GuWfQFENF4qiDz_ZcBgOVR5iMkTl1fcQZfDDWJQ==)
---
| | | | | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001M-t-RWtXvx1a4wPOSdUbdePDMTaJ1nZi6oC2vBww_lf0xnM0TgcHr0ZdGnybs8ah4RF8ovaU4J7abaIjKxC4m306Qct55Q7ByZic4umklLoh_bvOR7BhV_GInGSMMjHujVfiMmqgZvWBLnTD4LfHYUUgtjFYM8fr6ePRXO5xwMVuSiYWexxMenJ082qd6O6xIkO3AcSm6qLSncHOhTer0n3HJFwZOLR8Nj_k22m4X6lvlFn-bfnlJjOuJ5b6adHP&c=7gzWyePlhtsNkwVV-GN9mHOvqDF_6Dy8UufV0JapiIGI4-SZFhjkUQ==&ch=Y9_Ddw5fBLw6fy3GuWfQFENF4qiDz_ZcBgOVR5iMkTl1fcQZfDDWJQ==)
---
| | | |
We don't take lobbyist money. We don't take corporate money. Our campaigns are powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* Travel and event logistics to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* Promotion and organizing to bring new people into the movement.
* Security and operations so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn't understand. Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
---

**🚨 BREAKING NEWS FROM CNN 🚨** _" 'Humbly, I'm sorry': Marjorie Taylor Greene says she's turning a new leaf after years of divisive comments"_ After years of stoking division and attacking anyone who disagrees with her, now Marjorie Taylor Greene wants us to believe that she's "sorry" and is ready to be a voice of unity.
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/VgQUfCgp3_GjIKH3xTYrow~~/AAPPABA~/K7zBidvBxg0Cdz-5kSfpLZGPkLtg1scbGl-E1BprJZl40k7-KzYHikf92rsE48Dhihnh4qBs5NvjtRYmDEB9-C79n8-uUghfnoxn4ll-4RJDrY-qRgIw-EfIXGIP8obYlntbkG-852C3Uyz5B2QrDxDP37RZd-ScAgfE6QQIE4M_iTG72IxWKBfrvcDJXZJhUFyfTpejqvtjo-lIule0eW69NgML8sNoE8NMF67ruIUp4dadoaSznRjzv3mr8REFWzHSjsBbYpdeMYrpJR9VU9MRfZe8Ans7rLoQL19t2RBxWcdxyeLhTiNbGbKFcJFb)
---
I'm Democrat Shawn Harris. I've led troops in combat. I've been responsible for the safety and well-being of thousands of Americans in moments when every decision mattered. **And I 'll tell you this plainly: character isn't measured by what someone says when they're backed into a corner -- it's measured by what they do when no one is looking.** MTG's long record of insults, threats, conspiracies, and attacks didn't happen by accident. It was her brand. It was her strategy. And now that her political standing is slipping, we're supposed to forget all of it? **It doesn 't work that way, folks. That's why I want to hear directly from you: Do you believe Marjorie Taylor Greene is sincere in her apology? Add your name to the official Team Shawn petition. >>**
---
| [ ](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/VgQUfCgp3_GjIKH3xTYrow~~/AAPPABA~/K7zBidvBxg0Cdz-5kSfpLZGPkLtg1scbGl-E1BprJZl40k7-KzYHikf92rsE48Dhihnh4qBs5NvjtRYmDEB9-C79n8-uUghfnoxn4ll-4RJDrY-qRgIw-EfIXGIP8obYlntbkG-852C3Uyz5B2QrDxDP37RZd-ScAgfE6QQIE4M_iTG72IxWKBfrvcDJXZJhUFyfTpejqvtjo-lIule0eW69NgML8sNoE8NMF67ruIUp4dadoaSznRjzv3mr8REFWzHSjsBbYpdeMYrpJR9VU9MRfZe8Ans7rLoQL19t2RBxWcdxyeLhTiNbGbKFcJFb)

I've led troops in combat. I've been responsible for the safety and well-being of thousands of Americans in moments when every decision mattered. And I 'll tell you this plainly: character isn't measured by what someone says when they're backed into a corner -- it's measured by what they do when no one is looking. And now that her political standing is slipping, we're supposed to forget all of it? It doesn 't work that way, folks. | | _READ TIME: 2 MINUTES_ Peter, I’m an organizer at heart, so I’m not used to talking about myself when I _could_ be talking about the work at hand. But I want to take a minute and reintroduce myself. **I’m Maxwell Alejandro Frost – and damn proud to be.** You may have heard about me on the news as the first member of Gen Z elected to Congress, the first Gen Zer _re_ -elected to Congress, and _still_ the only Gen Zer in Congress. But before that, I was houseless and driving Ubers to pay the bills while I ran to represent my people. Before that, I was organizing with March for Our Lives, because kids _can’t_ keep dying from gun violence while NRA lobbyists get rich. And before that? I was an Afro-Latino kid from Florida, raised in a working-class family. Now, I’m making real change for young and working class folks. To legislate for justice. To build the world we deserve. I’ll never forget the people who believed in me before I “made it,” and helped me get here. **But that just makes it all the more clear how urgently I need to _stay_ here – especially given who's wreaking havoc in Washington.** [**_Will you donate right now to make an investment in the fight against the fascist administration and their billionaire buddies trying to destroy our democracy? >>_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/-bwSReBJDYwzQKSg4MNDEg~~/AAPPABA~/Z-OWlA1MSG6kYcKBa-lgkBQMUktb5v4aslKOaeUfZFw7LzgXepPuwTYfW_E_TvYeQMo9DmTNx2wuJcki4HhGbjvLA_2yqT9whkiPqgYQ2TF7LUBkX-pnA5F6K6qzsXykMTft4nIxGLay4WW4E7kg-G3g-YE7BL5Ujrg3SozTNF9XYFNVoSV2feWD32aerNdyNwKhmbsKrhjyvr_kt4uSCcW9ekIHRSWuuWLs7Rv8_l4OlVzuOU87yhB-CM_2-UE6i0N-qp1hWcsGRe_AFa2He9NY5KUjyISV-lh5qyxPbn9SjM32wOdjngR6ZPPTUxbi5Wu8S9QXKTJ-QPcLLgLheGiP4LkG6-EIKN8fEKFj-sM~) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 ➔](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/5cU6um9QlYiRo8oVbxW-Iw~~/AAPPABA~/h7Q3UaF65gtliCfEREUAuUqrI7QVMD51krrTotWvlm38XM7SCV-wW7WG_K-NqGCiiI9n8ZfEMixp8EI8gtli-vTRRt0ktIyMweIzwTb99YkXE3D327M8JZfbzrnP8DuPKb1OR-Q2Xgsz4Yko9WRQjn-hKvNOrS1rxQeWNwvOZLJgXuHYoXA-6_RaGuyW2A_XgqhRLM-sXkV3MTsvWc-35mDzlGLr9azd4qwuV3upqttN2y8H43C-KSPullgklmuZhwdKh1IZGh0f_zxWaVLUeOMtGADdkJOap5TwLrSyV2Y3EdAx8tdWpZtuN6g46jz1Rf-fa_p9ayySOJ2BCgARotmQ1Mn07xbOGCOGRyntQQNWvT1P6Kp9ThXOBAJmihYI)

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: His words are now our mission
body:
Charlie didn’t just talk about it. He built a movement that’s changed history.

| | |
---
Friend,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for** ** truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. _He built a movement that's changed history._ **And long before he left us... he wrote ****_How We Win_**** -- the playbook that lays it all out.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zf4lc88f9tdtp3kcgfqdselfj0n9ekhm8qiooo6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---
Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward.
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zm3fs8mvmjs4jq0t0ejn7e2n6mqajf8trhbjg35g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---
Friend, this isn't just a book... **It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to:** 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states
🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists
🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. **He showed us HOW WE WIN.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zeeo9o39je59i66qti4o0dhaogdk4deqa0n21cgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---
Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Friend. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. **Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth.** The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. [**Make your gift to join Turning Point USA today, and we'll send you your FREE copy of ****_How We Win_****today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5jqsvlarhbtmnqr72a4qol0rorfmrk2rmkam6b8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---
[ **Make My Gift &**
**Claim My FREE Book**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkmmfo03bj0cubiuim1fm0fn7cg3uu38rr24d4r8_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---
Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies.Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. **For Charlie,** **Justin Streiff**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztjo8geh35o9mh42h9tqf5deta1jds1ndb8f1g50_rp22sh2s8i6eor6c5ie1pr4cph2bs)
---

name: Letitia James
subject: This sham indictment is a blatant abuse of justice.
body:
Peter, I want to be direct with you about Trump’s blatant abuse of our justice system that has just happened.
But if you don’t need to read any further because you’re already fed up and have seen and heard enough of his political revenge tour, rush a rapid-response donation right now to help me stand firm against the sham indictment that’s been filed against me. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=111825_1]
RUSH A RAPID RESPONSE DONATION NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=111825_1]
So here’s what happened: Donald Trump fired the U.S. attorney who refused to bring baseless charges against me and then replaced them with someone who is blindly loyal to him – not the rule of law.
But, Peter, this is not just about me. It’s about the dangerous precedent being set for our justice system – where any president can install their own prosecutor to punish their political rivals.
That’s not democracy. That’s authoritarianism.
The truth is simple: My office is doing its job. We’ve followed the facts, the evidence, and the law – and judges have upheld our case that not only has Donald Trump and his company committed fraud, but many of his administration’s heinous executive orders have been unconstitutional.
So now, instead of facing accountability, he’s trying to rewrite the rules and discredit me for holding him accountable. But I refuse to back down.
This is a historic moment in our nation’s history – not just for me, but for the rule of law in America and defending our justice system. And that’s why I need your voice and your support today.
Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my campaign and Real Texas PAC before midnight to stand with me against this dangerous abuse of our justice system? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=111825_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Letitia James and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:

Thank you for standing with me in this fight for justice.
– Letitia James

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. clean_body: Peter, I want to be direct with you about Trump’s blatant abuse of our justice system that has just happened. But if you don’t need to read any further because you’re already fed up and have seen and heard enough of his political revenge tour, rush a rapid-response donation right now to help me stand firm against the sham indictment that’s been filed against me. >> [] RUSH A RAPID RESPONSE DONATION NOW >>> [] So here’s what happened: Donald Trump fired the U.S. attorney who refused to bring baseless charges against me and then replaced them with someone who is blindly loyal to him – not the rule of law. But, Peter, this is not just about me. It’s about the dangerous precedent being set for our justice system – where any president can install their own prosecutor to punish their political rivals. That’s not democracy. That’s authoritarianism. The truth is simple: My office is doing its job. We’ve followed the facts, the evidence, and the law – and judges have upheld our case that not only has Donald Trump and his company committed fraud, but many of his administration’s heinous executive orders have been unconstitutional. So now, instead of facing accountability, he’s trying to rewrite the rules and discredit me for holding him accountable. But I refuse to back down. This is a historic moment in our nation’s history – not just for me, but for the rule of law in America and defending our justice system. And that’s why I need your voice and your support today. Will you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can to my campaign and Real Texas PAC before midnight to stand with me against this dangerous abuse of our justice system? body:

This Sunday, [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13665.1.1369d6387ad1115c112d2df02c40bf31) will be celebrating **74 years of God's faithfulness**! I am super excited to have **Darryl Strawberry** back with us to share his _incredible story_ of how God can take our messes and turn them into a message of His goodness. If you do not have a home church _then_ consider joining us this Sunday at 10am CT in Tulsa or you can watch online at [www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13666.1.e1ca4309b178f4985cdfed63bad88f5b) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13678.1.b2cb532d5d06d273a1e5f6f4d1728aeb) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13679.1.dd6ffcb2886b50dbeca5aa08f906f97a)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13680.1.c61963443eecb4d912bb32909a6a6447)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13681.1.ea7fd0e0244e102515fb31d42d848612). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13682.1.1437813ebcb668b6d2bb2e34723a8fea) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13683.1.bbd216382d107cf1b06b9e36d3e3a59d) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=26466059.13684.1.e8c21848f7bbad19fd9581401098a80d) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

clean_body: Peter, Republicans now have an 8-POINT LEAD over Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But here's the thing... ... None of that matters unless EVERY Republican completes and verifies their Voter Profile for 2025. We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we 'll lose to the Democrats. Thank you, Voter Verification Questionnaire 2025 Polling Team ********** ** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. |

subject: I want to hear from you, Derek
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119497593/583285134/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYwYjQ5Zi05N2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObOY13IKmKLRtTm1E1rft7PEPphrrJH2TvCLz8edFPw=&emci=0617c6bb-fbc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3df0b49f-97c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) Derek,

One of the greatest honors of my life is serving the good people of Western PA, and I’m so grateful to have your support.

Your continued support helps me take on the tough fights in Washington and deliver for PA-17. From working to lower costs to standing up for my fellow veterans and fighting for decent healthcare, I’m committed to standing up for the issues that matter most to you.

**As we look ahead to the new year, I want to make sure I’m hearing about what matters to folks like you.**

[**So I want to hear from you, Derek: will you take a moment to fill out my Priorities Survey and let me know what issues are most important to you and your family right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119497605/583285156/-1021251719?refcode=email_111825_survey&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYwYjQ5Zi05N2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObOY13IKmKLRtTm1E1rft7PEPphrrJH2TvCLz8edFPw=&emci=0617c6bb-fbc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3df0b49f-97c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894) | | [Take The Survey →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119497610/583285174/-1021251719?refcode=email_111825_survey&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGYwYjQ5Zi05N2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ObOY13IKmKLRtTm1E1rft7PEPphrrJH2TvCLz8edFPw=&emci=0617c6bb-fbc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3df0b49f-97c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13185894)

Chris

The Latest from MAHA: The Plan to Make America Healthy Again

Less than a year into the second Trump administration, we are encouraged. Although the battle is on, they aren’t backing down from
key issues across the board, from healthcare to defense, education, commerce, affordability, and the numerous quality of life
issues Americans face. Plans are being formulated, while others are already underway to “Make America Healthy Again."

Read on for updates on the MAHA and what is next for the Trump Administration:

So many Americans are struggling under a broken healthcare system. From exorbitant costs, lack of choice for providers, and
massive insurance companies dictating the terms of our medical care, many of us are seeking an alternative. Christian health share
ministries have been on the rise.

Our guest, Mike Sharman, is the Chief Legal Counsel for Share HealthCare, an alternative to traditional insurance companies. He
received his JD from the University of Wyoming. Mike and his wife Nancy are also homesteaders who are passionate about promoting
Biblical values and religious freedom. Like, subscribe and share.

clean_body: Americans continue to face challenges in healthcare. We're talking to an expert on a promising alternative and looking at what is next in the MAHA movement. If you are having trouble viewing this email click here to view in your browser. [] [] [] November 18, 2025 • Newsletter Moms for America Weekly Blog [] [] The Latest from MAHA: The Plan to Make America Healthy Again Less than a year into the second Trump administration, we are encouraged. Although the battle is on, they aren’t backing down from key issues across the board, from healthcare to defense, education, commerce, affordability, and the numerous quality of life issues Americans face. Plans are being formulated, while others are already underway to “Make America Healthy Again." Read on for updates on the MAHA and what is next for the Trump Administration: Read the Blog [] Challenges in Our Healthcare Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] [] Moms for America Weekly Podcast [] So many Americans are struggling under a broken healthcare system. From exorbitant costs, lack of choice for providers, and massive insurance companies dictating the terms of our medical care, many of us are seeking an alternative. Christian health share ministries have been on the rise. Our guest, Mike Sharman, is the Chief Legal Counsel for Share HealthCare, an alternative to traditional insurance companies. He received his JD from the University of Wyoming. Mike and his wife Nancy are also homesteaders who are passionate about promoting Biblical values and religious freedom. Like, subscribe and share. View the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast [] Listen to the Podcast on Spotify [] [] In Truth & Liberty, Kimberly Fletcher Founder and President Moms for America® [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [] Copyright © 2025 Moms for America, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Moms for America 1440 State HWY 248, Suite Q304 Branson, MO 65616 Visit our Website [] Visit our Store [] Visit us on Truth Social [] DONATE TODAY []

name: DNC HQ
subject: You deserve transparency…
body:
---
Derek, As we reflect on the 2025 election season and gear up for the 2026 midterms, we wanted to explain how your support makes a difference, and what our path to flipping Congress next year looks like. If you’ve been considering making a contribution to the DNC but haven’t been convinced yet, **you deserve to have a transparent look into how we’ll put that donation to work.** At the DNC, we know that we have to organize everywhere to win anywhere. That’s why this year, we invested heavily in _every state_ — red, blue, and everywhere in between — to ensure that local Democrats had the resources they needed to reach voters. And it paid off: We won BIG in states like Virginia and New Jersey, where we invested millions of dollars to contact voters across both states. That’s the type of work your donation helps fund. We’re building long-term infrastructure that won’t just disappear after Election Day. And we’re going to build on the work we did this year to flip Congress in the midterms next year — and ensure Trump doesn't have another two years of unchecked power. **To be transparent, we wouldn’t be able to do this work without the help of grassroots supporters just like you.** [**So Derek, can we count on you to contribute $7 to the DNC as we begin to ramp up towards the 2026 midterms and beyond?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251118_5293_fr&amount=7&refcode2=5293_22930333_Fb8PJi&akid=5293%2E22930333%2EFb8PJi) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251118_5293_fr&refcode2=5293_22930333_Fb8PJi&akid=5293%2E22930333%2EFb8PJi)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-november-2025?refcode=em_20251118_5293_fr&refcode2=5293_22930333_Fb8PJi&akid=5293%2E22930333%2EFb8PJi)**
---
****
Thank you for your support,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

| After a landslide victory in the Pennsylvania Supreme Court retention election earlier this month, Defend Our Courts is already getting back to work.
Why?
Because in 2026, there are three more State Supreme Court elections in key swing states--Arizona, Georgia, and Michigan.
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1m9WLw0vZXNqnmzDr5K_O9p-UDopgcOLzXnl9za3vhtPZ6aq4n5xUmA8wivwK_hHmPl_G3pmcRCl8dccIT819vld8rPiHp61BNh-VxMvCwKwHu3gUShV3z3WmArICUEmb8O2Dy50bSKuWsOdxo9ybTLW3WNkus28K2PY0qo-qJxrx3gfWsD2kKUiX3Isa8lA9tJG8r7abXMnsitWPggU5CnkwNQnOdo&c=RDRaXMAwvcyJWS6zeiG3pwIE4WRwJFSVNRQBaKnkvnDs0VgQv-_CvQ==&ch=FFOf0BrFnt17ZV2MVcTtGEhME5gZvFj0EgluQSKrOQ60mvF7Ni1dTg==)
---
The stakes will be the same as PA for these elections--MAGA seizing control of these courts will give them control over election laws in each respective state, allowing them to issue decisions that could suppress Dem votes, and tilt the odds in MAGA's favor in future elections. This would all but make the Democrats path back to the White House impossible in 2028.
So our team is already looking ahead, crunching the numbers and identifying the Democrats that we need to turn out in each of these states to prevent a MAGA takeover.
But we haven't fully turned the page on PA despite our best efforts--we spent every last penny we had to fuel Tuesday's massive blowout victory. We have bills and staff to be paid first before we can go full steam ahead in AZ, GA, and MI.
We know we've asked a lot of you recently, and we wouldn't have had the success we did without your support. But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26.
[So we're asking you today: Can you please make a donation of $50, $25, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to help us pay our team, close the books on PA, and move on to leading the defense of courts in GA, AZ, and MI?](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y1m9WLw0vZXNqnmzDr5K_O9p-UDopgcOLzXnl9za3vhtPZ6aq4n5xUmA8wivwK_hHmPl_G3pmcRCl8dccIT819vld8rPiHp61BNh-VxMvCwKwHu3gUShV3z3WmArICUEmb8O2Dy50bSKuWsOdxo9ybTLW3WNkus28K2PY0qo-qJxrx3gfWsD2kKUiX3Isa8lA9tJG8r7abWY38Z3vXyVCDT-p9_lGlHF&c=RDRaXMAwvcyJWS6zeiG3pwIE4WRwJFSVNRQBaKnkvnDs0VgQv-_CvQ==&ch=FFOf0BrFnt17ZV2MVcTtGEhME5gZvFj0EgluQSKrOQ60mvF7Ni1dTg==)

But that's also why we are planning to triple down, and take our winning formula to defend three more crucial courts in '26. == | | | | | == | == | == | == We truly appreciate all that you do for us and for Democrats everywhere. # [Can Someone Like Marjorie Taylor Greene Really Change?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179259309&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MjU5MzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM0ODI1MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2NjA3NDUyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CRS_FguFkTxkbbktImU8dvK_XbAAVmcC_u83vo-CTYQ)
### Not without some meaningful accountability.
| | [Mike Nellis](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---
| Nov 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mikenellis)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179259309&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MjU5MzA5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzQ4MjUyMywiZXhwIjoxNzY2MDc0NTIzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNDI1ODExNSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Vyj9-cIkeBUr-EqR_LRN5SjVPveerHNk7UgHIBMFYPg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179259309&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MjU5MzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM0ODI1MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2NjA3NDUyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CRS_FguFkTxkbbktImU8dvK_XbAAVmcC_u83vo-CTYQ&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4258115&post_id=179259309&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MjU5MzA5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM0ODI1MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2NjA3NDUyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTQyNTgxMTUiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CRS_FguFkTxkbbktImU8dvK_XbAAVmcC_u83vo-CTYQ)

---

_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/dbe3b3d7-7c56-49fd-816f-8bdb832dc66a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/dbe3b3d7-7c56-49fd-816f-8bdb832dc66a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
I _badly_ want to believe in the power of people to change, grow, and evolve from this tense political moment we're in--but I just can't shake the feeling that Marjorie Taylor Greene is completely and totally full of shit.
There's this furious debate online about whether MTG has actually broken away from Trumpism, or if it's just a cynical attempt to run for president because she sees the writing on the wall: Trump is falling apart over Epstein, the economy, and his corruption. My guess? It's the more cynical version. And maybe it's just the political consultant in me, but I can very plainly see a path for Marjorie Taylor Greene to try and carve out a lane for herself--to become some kind of power broker inside whatever new coalition the Republicans try to build to win in 2028.
I could definitely see her teaming up with someone like Tucker Carlson, who in his own way is also breaking from MAGA and trying to define his own identity for a future presidential run. But that's a rant for another time.
I think about all this in the context of my buddy Joe Walsh--a former Tea Party congressman from the great state of Illinois. He and I do a weekly show, _Welcome To The Party, Pal!_ , every Friday. He's by far one of my favorite people in this space. I told Joe when we first met: Don't look up my tweets from 20 years ago--I can't imagine they were flattering to you. We both had a good laugh about it.
And with Joe, I still hear from people who doubt whether his conversion--from Tea Party congressman to member of the anti-Trump resistance--is sincere. I was skeptical at first too. But as I got to know Joe, listened to him talk, had private and public conversations with him, I realized the depth of his sincerity runs far deeper than I ever imagined. He's a good, decent man and a man of principle. He took the path he did to get where he is, but he genuinely believes what he says about Trump being a danger to this country. And I've seen that over time.
And it's not just that Joe changed--he took a blowtorch to his own career to do it. He walked away from the right-wing echo chamber. He gave up access, power, and money. He alienated himself from people who used to cheer for him. All because he knew Trumpism was wrong and he had to stand against it. That's what real risk looks like. That's what real courage looks like. That's what walking the talk looks like.
And I just don't see anything like that--real self-accountability--from Marjorie Taylor Greene... yet.
* * *
_**[Endless Urgency is free to read, but we're hustling to launch our new content studio and expand our team with a video editor. If you've been enjoying the work, now's the time to back it. Paid subscribers make it possible--just $8/month makes a huge difference: ](https://substack.com/redirect/dbe3b3d7-7c56-49fd-816f-8bdb832dc66a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/dbe3b3d7-7c56-49fd-816f-8bdb832dc66a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
She hasn't sacrificed anything. If anything, she's maneuvering to gain more power, not less. More attention, not less. So how courageous is it really?
Joe captured this perfectly in a post he shared this week:
> "Quick, initial take on @mtgreenee: As a onetime divisive right-wing political asshole, I publicly came out against Trump & stopped being a divisive asshole over 7yrs ago. Since then, I've spent every day these past 7yrs proving the sincerity of my conversion, and doing all I can to defeat Trump/Trumpism. MTG will have to walk down this same road. I appreciate her pledging to no longer be a divisive asshole, but now she's gotta prove it. And btw, does she still support Trump?"
That's the core of it. This is a road. It takes time. It takes showing up over and over again--in public and in private--with humility and grace and doing the damn work. Not just saying the right things for one news cycle.
I've often said I'm okay with a Democratic coalition that ranges from Zohran Mamdani to Joe Walsh. We need that kind of big-tent coalition right now to defeat the fascist forces actively corrupting our country.
But then I saw Congressman Jamie Raskin--someone I deeply respect--say that we need a coalition that reaches all the way out to Marjorie Taylor Greene. And that's where he loses me. Because MTG has not earned the trust and attention she's currently getting.
Yes, I'll be the first to admit: as she's turned on Trump, she's gone much further than I ever expected. I figured the most she'd do was go on _The View_ and complain about the economy. But she's gone further. Trump is attacking her now. And outwardly, it looks like a genuine break. _Maybe._
But again, the more cynical version? She wanted to run statewide in Georgia and was told not to by GOP insiders. So now she's decided the only way forward is to run for president--to get the attention and access she wants. She's reading the same polling I am. She sees how deeply unpopular Trump is. The rest of the MAGA movement might be in total denial, but their dear leader is absolutely in political danger.
So yes, it's cynical. But let's pretend for a moment it's sincere. What do we do?
I believe we should embrace people who are waking up to what's happening in this country--waking up to the corruption, the rot, the terrible economic decisions that are dragging this economy off a cliff. People like my dad. He's not suddenly a Democrat, but he sure as hell sees what's going on in Washington, and he's pissed about it. We'll have him back on the show soon to talk about that.
But when it comes to Marjorie Taylor Greene--we have to be more cynical. She can be useful in reaching certain people who need an exit ramp off the MAGA train. And that's fine. I'm happy to do that. But we should always keep one eye on her. Because this can absolutely come back to bite us.
If she wants to earn trust, she has to earn it over time--with her engagement, her apologies, her votes. She needs to confront the harm she's caused--especially to gun violence victims and the Jewish community. She needs to stare into the abyss and reckon with it. And she needs to show her evolution in policy and in the people she surrounds herself with.
If she does the real work--maybe there's a path. _Maybe._ I want to leave room for grace. I want to believe people can change. That someone--even someone like MTG--could be pulled into something as horrific as MAGA and still find a way out of it.
But we've also got to be mindful of the WWE-style politics we're in--where people flip their "gimmick" all the time. We've seen plenty of heel and face turns in recent years. Trump's done it. Gavin Newsom's arguably done it. A host of grifters have too--Lindy Li comes to mind. Plenty of others have too.
So if Marjorie Taylor Greene is pulling a gimmick change? Fine. But let's not get sucked into it.
Find the ways she can be useful in the short term politically. If she helps defeat Trump--great. But keep one eye on her. Stay skeptical of everything she says and does for a long time.

Illinois Review Meets with Senior French Diplomats as Embassy Prioritizes Direct Engagement with U.S. Media (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/illinois-review-meets-with-senior-french-diplomats-as-embassy-prioritizes-direct-engagement-with-u-s-media.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9377e742f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/illinois-review-meets-with-senior-french-diplomats-as-embassy-prioritizes-direct-engagement-with-u-s-media.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9377e742f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(Source: Illinois Review)
By Illinois Review

In a continuation of the deep and historic alliance between the United States and France – an alliance stretching back nearly 250 years – a senior French diplomat visited Chicago this week and met with Illinois Review leadership as part of a broader effort to strengthen dialogue with non-traditional media outlets across the country.

Sébastien Fagart, Spokesperson for the French Embassy in Washington, DC, has made direct engagement with American media a personal priority. Fagart’s outreach reflects a deliberate effort to gather perspectives from diverse news organizations on both domestic and global issues, better understand regional viewpoints, and evaluate how media throughout the U.S. interpret rapidly shifting geopolitical events.

Fagart was joined by Consul General Charlotte Montel, Deputy Consul General Clément Calais, and Pascale Furlong Thome of the Consulate General of France in Chicago. Representing Illinois Review were General Counsel Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/illinois-review-meets-with-senior-french-diplomats-as-embassy-prioritizes-direct-engagement-with-u-s-media.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9377e742f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
French Embassy Spokesman Sébastien Fagartm (third from right), Consul General Charlotte Montel (second from right), Deputy Consul General Clément Calais (far left), Pascale Furlong Thome (far right) of the Consulate General of France in Chicago, and Illinois Review’s Mark Vargas (center) and Scott Kaspar (center-left). (Photo credit: Illinois Review)
The Chicago Consulate plays a particularly important role in advancing French-American cooperation in the Midwest – especially in the rapidly expanding fields of technology, innovation, and advanced manufacturing. Under the leadership of Consul General Montel, the Consulate has strengthened partnerships with major research universities, supported French tech companies operating in the region, and helped connect Midwestern companies with France’s growing tech ecosystem. These efforts have positioned Chicago – and the U.S. as a key hub for transatlantic collaboration in artificial intelligence, quantum computing, and emerging digital industries.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/11/illinois-review-meets-with-senior-french-diplomats-as-embassy-prioritizes-direct-engagement-with-u-s-media.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9377e742f4-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
The wide-ranging discussion covered U.S.-European relations, global security challenges, trade and economic cooperation, cultural exchange, and the evolving media landscape. French officials emphasized that maintaining strong ties with American journalists remains essential to reinforcing the U.S.-France partnership – one of the oldest and most consequential bilateral relationships in the world.

By prioritizing conversations with media outlets beyond Washington and the coasts, Fagart hopes to ensure that French policymakers hear the perspectives of Americans from every region, including the Midwest.

For Illinois Review, the meeting provided an opportunity to share insights into the issues shaping public opinion in Illinois – from national security and international trade to economic pressures and cultural diplomacy. Kaspar and Vargas underscored the importance of robust transatlantic dialogue, especially at a time when global alliances are being tested in unprecedented ways.

As Fagart continues engaging with media organizations across the United States, the goal is clear: to strengthen the foundation of trust, cooperation, and mutual respect that has defined the U.S.-France alliance for centuries.

Illinois Review looks forward to continued dialogue with French diplomatic leaders as both nations navigate a complex and rapidly changing world.

Illinois Review is the largest conservative media source in Illinois, and the only source in Illinois that has been shared by President Donald Trump. Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Illinois Review Meets with Senior French Diplomats as Embassy Prioritizes Direct Engagement with U.S. Media () (Source: Illinois Review) By Illinois Review In a continuation of the deep and historic alliance between the United States and France – an alliance stretching back nearly 250 years – a senior French diplomat visited Chicago this week and met with Illinois Review leadership as part of a broader effort to strengthen dialogue with non-traditional media outlets across the country. Sébastien Fagart, Spokesperson for the French Embassy in Washington, DC, has made direct engagement with American media a personal priority. Fagart’s outreach reflects a deliberate effort to gather perspectives from diverse news organizations on both domestic and global issues, better understand regional viewpoints, and evaluate how media throughout the U.S. interpret rapidly shifting geopolitical events. Fagart was joined by Consul General Charlotte Montel, Deputy Consul General Clément Calais, and Pascale Furlong Thome of the Consulate General of France in Chicago. Representing Illinois Review were General Counsel Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas. French Embassy Spokesman Sébastien Fagartm (third from right), Consul General Charlotte Montel (second from right), Deputy Consul General Clément Calais (far left), Pascale Furlong Thome (far right) of the Consulate General of France in Chicago, and Illinois Review’s Mark Vargas (center) and Scott Kaspar (center-left). (Photo credit: Illinois Review) The Chicago Consulate plays a particularly important role in advancing French-American cooperation in the Midwest – especially in the rapidly expanding fields of technology, innovation, and advanced manufacturing. Under the leadership of Consul General Montel, the Consulate has strengthened partnerships with major research universities, supported French tech companies operating in the region, and helped connect Midwestern companies with France’s growing tech ecosystem. These efforts have positioned Chicago – and the U.S. as a key hub for transatlantic collaboration in artificial intelligence, quantum computing, and emerging digital industries. The wide-ranging discussion covered U.S.-European relations, global security challenges, trade and economic cooperation, cultural exchange, and the evolving media landscape. French officials emphasized that maintaining strong ties with American journalists remains essential to reinforcing the U.S.-France partnership – one of the oldest and most consequential bilateral relationships in the world. By prioritizing conversations with media outlets beyond Washington and the coasts, Fagart hopes to ensure that French policymakers hear the perspectives of Americans from every region, including the Midwest. For Illinois Review, the meeting provided an opportunity to share insights into the issues shaping public opinion in Illinois – from national security and international trade to economic pressures and cultural diplomacy. Kaspar and Vargas underscored the importance of robust transatlantic dialogue, especially at a time when global alliances are being tested in unprecedented ways. As Fagart continues engaging with media organizations across the United States, the goal is clear: to strengthen the foundation of trust, cooperation, and mutual respect that has defined the U.S.-France alliance for centuries. Illinois Review looks forward to continued dialogue with French diplomatic leaders as both nations navigate a complex and rapidly changing world. name: Congressman Al Green, TX-09
subject: BREAKING: The FEMA chief has resigned
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP61/1/111773/images/AL%20Green/486705787_1040387954570523_78538824492684419_n.jpg]
Friend,
I want to be direct with you. The Acting FEMA Chief has just resigned.
This comes after months of chaos and a response to the tragic floods here in Texas earlier this year that left too many of our neighbors behind.
I have been on the ground in our disaster recovery centers. I have seen the pain in our community. And I have said from the beginning: We cannot trust our recovery to an agency that is being dismantled from the inside out.
While the leadership at FEMA plays musical chairs, families in Houston are still waiting for help.
This is why I re-introduced the Reforming Disaster Recovery Act (RDA) . We need to permanently authorize disaster relief programs so they aren't subject to the whims of political appointees who are here today and gone tomorrow. We need resilient infrastructure and clean energy jobs to protect our neighborhoods before the next storm hits.
The government is back open, but our fight for a functional, funded government that serves the people is just beginning.
I need your help to keep fighting for the funding and reforms Texas needs. Can you chip in $25 today to help us catch up?
[ DONATE NOW ]
In the fight, Congressman Al Green
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251025txftbackeml]
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
Checks can be Mailed to:
Keep Al Green in Congress Campaign
PO Box 56761
Houston, TX 77256
United States
To Keep Al Green in Congress, click here to make a donation online [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/251101em]

name: Rep. Joe Sweeney
subject: We cannot afford to sit back now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Granite Solutions, Joe Sweeney Chairman
body:
They're up to their old tricks again

| | | | |
---
| | Derek,

New Hampshire is at a turning point, and the people trying to take our state in the wrong direction are not letting up. They are organized, loud, and well-funded. They want higher taxes, weaker borders, softer laws, and more control over your life. They think Granite Staters are too distracted to push back. **They are wrong.** Every time they try to chip away at our safety, our prosperity, or our Live Free or Die values, we stop them. Not by accident. Not by luck. We win because people like you step up when it matters. Right now, I need you with me again. We are fighting to keep New Hampshire strong, competitive, and safe. That means standing with our police, keeping taxes low, expanding energy independence, securing our communities, and making sure state government works for the people who pay the bills, not the special interests who whisper in the back rooms. But here’s the truth the insiders never say out loud: In politics, if you’re not driving the conversation, you’re losing it. And I refuse to let the loudest, most extreme voices define the future of our state. [**That’s why your immediate support is so important.**](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100019a97d21aa8-3961794e-f7b4-4754-b9a6-34043da1c1dc-000000/2V1Je42JbXIJofR4MbXSQ_pmGJU=453) When you contribute today, you are not just donating - **you are taking a stand.** You are putting real muscle behind the agenda that keeps New Hampshire the greatest state in America. You are helping us stay on offense, tell the truth boldly, and drown out the noise coming from the people who want to drag us backwards. I need your help today. [Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, $100, or anything you can spare?](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/0100019a97d21aa8-3961794e-f7b4-4754-b9a6-34043da1c1dc-000000/p1nsEWTkW915yiPNetSaXKn-F2A=453)
Together, we can keep New Hampshire moving in the right direction. Not someday. Not eventually. Right now, when it matters most. [Every dollar we raise stays right here in New Hampshire — defending our values, our economy, and our freedom.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100019a97d21aa8-3961794e-f7b4-4754-b9a6-34043da1c1dc-000000/AHwD1Wvj6FrSarom-mCjmU9AzeA=453)
Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Let’s make this the GOP’s WORST bet!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Please let me cut to the chase.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97570?refcode=em20251118-9729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9729%2E614464%2EiFJgBm)
Peter — JB Pritzker here.
Let me cut to the chase: **New Hampshire’s Senate race could decide whether Democrats take back the majority — _and Republicans know it._**
Donald Trump and the MAGA GOP see this seat as one of their best shots to expand their power.
They’ve already got a Republican governor in New Hampshire, and they’re betting they can flip the Senate seat next. If they win here, our chances of taking back the Senate drop to zero.
_We can’t let that happen._
Chris Pappas is a proven fighter for working families — taking on Big Pharma, defending reproductive freedom, and making sure our government actually works for the people it serves.
I’ve seen what happens when leaders like Chris have the platform and the power to make change — and _I want him in the Senate._
I know Chris can win, but there’s no way around it: **_This isn’t a safe blue seat, folks._**
The GOP is ready to flood New Hampshire with attack ads and dark money. The only way to beat them is with early, grassroots support. That’s where you come in, Peter:
**[If you can, please split a $15 donation right now between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to put Democrats on the path to a Senate majority.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97571?refcode=em20251118-9729&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=2&akid=9729%2E614464%2EiFJgBm)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

body:
| | | Peter, did you see the news out of the White House? **President Donald J. Trump has officially endorsed our campaign for re-election in North Carolina’s 13th District!**
---
| | [](https://link.bradknott.com/s/c/m7xIXQ8fRTJRHCdc130Xb2sUImlCTkrGBMVdmXaw5kFxLReXu5Nfq21bd8Rq5Jaxw1U7VHgO4gbqmnT7KDdPpu-s7jPPjKuOF7BJD-d5wP-Z-CqCs_fjMcpT0p2oEQ4yKoTEFu4Q3zt_srzHdFOoFz3LvRhG71PwIlMYq6cwy4FaA15gZxXMHinMDzTYzqxJURO71S-sQTGtJwjSjCoyN3MaZCtYSXdL7zkiFDIA0odSzSO6b5SR32vAWCuKVpE1ngC24eNFQ48k2fO2pz27jK5Q0UomSUXuAxWA4x5z9TjLVVFWOoBKY6TXKIgBf8lBHW-lRZAGAwtE3WDXO4qqrrH1Ovrcj6WKSy__Bi0AH68A7dhm05iZjy3HGySMEdiC1_yn3-AZHgFESgOk7IFaPAwQWjdQDR_AjRpV42dgTo9xsieyYJdCEcNxagK_zOAtdqWzFEjcI9ZSkKUKNc5DEANJES1BOWyk_SUUb7ogwwlQjwT0pNQuwuNd7mJZqtEN4O1b1Ef2vXsjTK9jqJ6fMYlBxLOkCkSpXJyU-tAObhWosJQI47xh8CoDpHRf4bX8jY19CwiXugn0CoWQVtkj2BXUxpfEuvrw_MHb5c854IzDHB7K5z2MvzwmUfFxYDHJTPnARzZh71y_K2pYMEwmte-k5pqmXDH6gcmNO7vwRUkG8uHWbQrhuxXqZoPapSogF4ua6iDBUfXBYuyJjuNNTz68jFQ8oLChzDmSWK8T7Gxx6JRNcDvEz6FdCH_ur6rsI2g52UlVy2FewFO9uMwvqLjaM8lkYJGt-jfWVXhoOf4p0hkXIP1RaXBcMpHV5G4jHaDeAcU4QsCauMgMcEyQ5tdEXVEWyTiHdTbgxcRn2smeSDEcixehmaYIG7GaLTdW0WZHVzDDhtdkuBTkeA/Ma89AfnrhXRq1UcGQEa4cmoCA-HGkB-0/15)

| | I’m honored, I’m grateful, and I’m ready to keep this train moving full steam ahead. Since President Trump took office, we’ve worked side by side to **restore law and order** , **revive our economy** , and **deliver critical wins** for North Carolina and the American people. No one— _and I mean no one_ —works harder for this country than President Trump. And with his support, we’re going to fight even harder to keep America strong, free, and prosperous. I would be so grateful if you would consider [**making a contribution of any amount to my campaign**](https://link.bradknott.com/s/c/waGVadfAILDPEVngKrnsFUqVQY87475_a7xYVMWRZEFwICs4uVTE2lFofUl6zTIwURwlYpVLtfib--N68iClewp2Ka7Tg0sJJ89Rv4Xy6Rjnl-ViN8NfgVCjNopK0NkgO_LXdLS--RD7DOJ-wxqafy7gOjqRrqKsODNRtq6LfFJCZ6YYQcGWHbugttg8XyU_Kp_xusBBcnQdGBK37ITyvbJjGSMnvbgmGQ_Lz5pMVrq34ieUHAyJY-lKo4HeySbo0E0Enfq6LyvVBzUprO3fSOPeXm9UFzpuEyI_e18p5koEoyM81k77ArUTgwvPnJdGSzpv2XIVdMbxk9f3hSrWUwyuiWCbSnjFiAPJU9lsRZwp2XxnyUDOfRuBagHwd-wUA0htsIxtkf54HRQNHX_qQAoHu_TA_vcK5UYJtyeeUEOgQeNCQE0uyoW6nDkYfZglYcESkJd6EaZBTIzDlys45an-mxSUBiitPkanGcHOX-3kQWffRg2mBLdj9faIlbjGucnIfgw7gS6XD1FR8yAJPAeQixRufO8mw4CPsmChOduuQimegZraWadMDTlmgAo9iC6HSxJj71_jCEXYJM--jWiOpIX8S4iXodGWA5PaV898JQX25bXtGdNYiw_GLCvePbM4sIvxMziwDAiCH0Nsf7fHz9E3tGbT0E-5g0o2B839ALiNLNQI81iTblmRnaZQM4AXyshUK8NvzCJy4JUSRkJcAtm-QhQwltciej7voMJ0C-1T22-DAx2HRK7lvlA6Vk2mwPrWf3XerlgKLpo_3o02hSDoJoE9_9ve2rp_P0HYFtKV2ll7KZOhqSa6R0Ne9lvirmzGscYfE1SdHtXbfSRnQdlQ9rRqpgYrwHL-qMNCCuClfuH2muqTJe_GPb1nVKfZQUQJDEgJ7yh7Xw/IHnyDp2jJvWTtI_laZhac8_jUU_zy0ea/15) to celebrate this endorsement and build off its momentum. name: Team Downing
subject: Americans LOVE the Trump administration!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, do you approve of President Trump? (don’t answer if you’re a Democrat).

body:
Dear Treasury Secretary Bessent: The other day, you said something I couldn’t ignore.

| _**[Click here to co-sign Emily’s letter to Treasury Secretary Bessent (text below) →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119504265/583299531/-773427766?contactdata=EwFaIah4X78AH1dQQNzkdrk6AR7/XeLVQyPGz1O3Qag2gCwml7qY67ZkMZOcRoAuYMRO7TO7xfRF6GnlJM2ZoTfEVyZ5pV32QEaIq0fU5eLKziPca4xB+k5H1mtyXZ+DTbfmaFnMWHdZ8Dc0MUxiTAy00oVnyNqDrHvsvkkz/DA=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.18_Bessent_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRlOGMxZC05ZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGpRNFRLFzfw6QJrdKFQEh_SE4yoymsWZeodiFLlVcw=&emci=18f66bba-cfc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9a4e8c1d-9ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442)**_ Dear Treasury Secretary Bessent, The other day, you said something I couldn’t ignore. You were on Fox News defending President Trump’s comments that American workers aren’t skilled enough, and that we need to bring in trainers from other countries. The host asked: “Do you understand the concern that some people have? ‘Hey, an American could have that job.’” [You responded:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119504267/583299532/-803653937?v=HmRUvdLreUs&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.18_Bessent_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRlOGMxZC05ZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGpRNFRLFzfw6QJrdKFQEh_SE4yoymsWZeodiFLlVcw=&emci=18f66bba-cfc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9a4e8c1d-9ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) **“An American can’t have that job. Because we haven't built ships or semiconductors here for years.”** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119504269/583299535/1565166852?contactdata=EwFaIah4X78AH1dQQNzkdrk6AR7/XeLVQyPGz1O3Qag2gCwml7qY67ZkMZOcRoAuYMRO7TO7xfRF6GnlJM2ZoTfEVyZ5pV32QEaIq0fU5eLKziPca4xB+k5H1mtyXZ+DTbfmaFnMWHdZ8Dc0MUxiTAy00oVnyNqDrHvsvkkz/DA=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.18_Bessent_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRlOGMxZC05ZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGpRNFRLFzfw6QJrdKFQEh_SE4yoymsWZeodiFLlVcw=&emci=18f66bba-cfc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9a4e8c1d-9ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442) _**Guess what. Here in Washington’s 6th District, we build ships!**_ It’s too bad your work as a hedge fund manager never took you to beautiful Puget Sound. You would see ships built by American workers who were trained by other Americans, using expertise they learned in America. Our state's maritime industry generates nearly $50 billion. That might not mean much to a billionaire like yourself, but it means a lot to us. You should also talk to some of the workers at the School for Wooden Boats, at WSF’s Eagle Harbor Maintenance Facility, or at the Puget Sound Naval Shipyard and Intermediate Maintenance Facility — where workers spent weeks working without pay while Republicans shut down the government and went on vacation. I look forward to your visit. I can meet you at the ferry. – Rep. Emily Randall _**[Can you take a minute to co-sign Emily’s invitation to Treasury Secretary Bessent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119504271/583299536/-773427766?contactdata=EwFaIah4X78AH1dQQNzkdrk6AR7/XeLVQyPGz1O3Qag2gCwml7qY67ZkMZOcRoAuYMRO7TO7xfRF6GnlJM2ZoTfEVyZ5pV32QEaIq0fU5eLKziPca4xB+k5H1mtyXZ+DTbfmaFnMWHdZ8Dc0MUxiTAy00oVnyNqDrHvsvkkz/DA=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.11.18_Bessent_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTRlOGMxZC05ZWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZGpRNFRLFzfw6QJrdKFQEh_SE4yoymsWZeodiFLlVcw=&emci=18f66bba-cfc3-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9a4e8c1d-9ec4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=23483442)**_ clean_body: Dear Treasury Secretary Bessent: The other day, you said something I couldn’t ignore. | Dear Treasury Secretary Bessent, The other day, you said something I couldn’t ignore. You were on Fox News defending President Trump’s comments that American workers aren’t skilled enough, and that we need to bring in trainers from other countries. The host asked: “Do you understand the concern that some people have? ‘Hey, an American could have that job.’” “An American can’t have that job. Because we haven't built ships or semiconductors here for years.” Guess what. Here in Washington’s 6th District, we build ships! It’s too bad your work as a hedge fund manager never took you to beautiful Puget Sound. That might not mean much to a billionaire like yourself, but it means a lot to us. You should also talk to some of the workers at the School for Wooden Boats, at WSF’s Eagle Harbor Maintenance Facility, or at the Puget Sound Naval Shipyard and Intermediate Maintenance Facility — where workers spent weeks working without pay while Republicans shut down the government and went on vacation. I look forward to your visit. I can meet you at the ferry. – Rep. Emily Randall | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Gabby Giffords
subject: This is unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot let this become reality.
#

| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Hi there, it's Gabby Giffords. Today, I’m reaching out to respectfully ask you to make your first contribution of $3 to GIFFORDS PAC.

**This is urgent: House Republicans are preparing to pass a bill for a nationwide concealed carry mandate.**

If passed, it would force states to allow people to carry hidden, loaded guns anywhere—even if they don’t meet the safety standards of that state or locality.

That means someone from a state with no rules about who can buy or carry weapons could come into your town, neighborhood, or business—and there’s nothing we could do to stop them.

This is unacceptable. GIFFORDS is working to build the largest mobilization program since Donald Trump took office. All of this takes a lot of resources, which is why I’m asking:

[**Will you please chip in before midnight to help GIFFORDS PAC defeat the GOP’s concealed carry mandate?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251118-1-b&t=1&akid=11047%2E3935704%2Eoz5Vzy) Gabby Giffords |
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251118-1-b&t=2&akid=11047%2E3935704%2Eoz5Vzy)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=11047%2E3935704%2Eoz5Vzy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Identity crisis at the Art Museum + special announcement
body:
Thom Nickels | B+L Featured Columnist | | | |
---
| | |
---
| **Special Announcement**
---
| Fideri News Network Welcomes **Thom Nickels** as new Editor-At-Large of Arts & Culture
---
| If you’ve been reading _Broad + Liberty_ for any length of time, you already know Thom’s work — the intellectual curiosity, literary craftsmanship, and unflinching honesty that make him one of Philadelphia’s most compelling cultural storytellers.

A prolific, award-winning author, historian, and chronicler of the city’s architectural soul, Thom has spent decades capturing the character, contradictions, and quirks that make our region what it is, in a way few writers can.

**We’re thrilled to share that Thom is now officially joining our team as Editor-at-Large of Arts & Culture**. Here’s to bold ideas, bigger conversations, and an exciting new era for _Broad + Liberty_ and the entire Fideri News Network.
---
|
---
| **_Thom Nickels_ : Renamed, rebranded, and reduced — What happened to the Philadelphia Museum of Art?**
---
| [ ](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0025a4b518&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| "The Philadelphia Museum of Art, now the Art Museum of Philadelphia, has been in decline for a number of years.

Director Timothy Rub attempted to hold the line and keep up appearances for a good while. To a large extent, he succeeded. Exhibition openings (for the press) were well-organized and still special events with speeches and tables of breakfast delicacies for journalists on assignment. The old guard at the museum took the press seriously, a tradition going back to Anne d’Harnoncourt’s tenure when press events were actual sit-down diners (white table cloths and wine), where a Philadelphia journalist might find him or herself seated beside someone from the _Wall Street Journal_.

Under Rub’s tenure, most press events were held in the Grand Court, something of a scale-down from the d’Harnoncourt era but still respectable and something to look forward to..."
---
| [Read Article Here](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=720cf770b0&e=b7b3eddce2 "Read Article Here")
---
|
---
|
## About Thom Nickels:
---
| | [ ](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a7661e94a1&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
_Thom Nickels is a Philadelphia-based journalist/columnist and the 2005 recipient of the AIA Lewis Mumford Award for Architectural Journalism. He writes for _City Journal, New York _, and _Frontpage Magazine _. Thom Nickels is the author of fifteen books, including “_[ _Literary Philadelphia_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=65ff9109f7&e=b7b3eddce2) _” and ”_[ _From Mother Divine to the Corner Swami: Religious Cults in Philadelphia_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7b70ca9596&e=b7b3eddce2) _.” His latest is “_[ _Death in Philadelphia: The Murder of Kimberly Ernest_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1918168023&e=b7b3eddce2) _.” He is currently at work on “The Last Romanian Princess and Her World Legacy,” about the life of Princess Ileana of Romania._
---
|
---
| | We at [_Broad + Liberty_](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ef5ea209b3&e=b7b3eddce2) are proud to provide readers across our region, state and beyond, with insightful, original investigative reports, and thought-leadership, on education, crime, business and government.

Read more columns on [w](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=56e4b749c1&e=b7b3eddce2)[ww.broadandliberty.com](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=35b0898136&e=b7b3eddce2) — updated daily and as news breaks.
---
| [Support Broad + Liberty](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bdaf66a092&e=b7b3eddce2 "Support Broad + Liberty")
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ac31c92f0d&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| | [](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=2afa0e40bb&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| | [](www.broadandliberty.com)
---
|
---

Fideri News323 W Front St Fl 2Media, PA 19063
