name: Brett Lindstrom
subject: A quick update from our team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress
body:
Thank you for standing with us.
| | | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---
| | Peter,
As we move through November, I’m continually reminded of how special this community is. From honoring our veterans to celebrating Nebraska families, this past week was filled with meaningful moments and strong conversations across the district. I’m grateful for everyone who took the time to stop, talk, and share what matters most to them. There’s real momentum building, and together, we’re moving this campaign forward one connection at a time.
---
|
---
**Ride to Washington** I am now 420.32 miles into the Ride to Washington! Every mile represents the commitment we’re bringing to this campaign, staying focused, disciplined, and moving forward one step at a time.
Thank you to everyone who continues to cheer me on. Your encouragement keeps this momentum going, and we’re excited to keep pushing toward the finish line.
|
---
**Last Week Recap** Veterans Day started early as we greeted and served veterans at the annual Hy-Vee Veterans Day Breakfast. That evening, we had the honor of getting a special preview of America’s Wall of Honor, a powerful tribute to our armed forces and first responders.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
On Thursday, we attended the SperaVita Hope for Life Ball, where Riley Gaines shared an inspiring message about perseverance and the challenges she has overcome.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
By Saturday, we were back out in the community, starting the morning with great conversations at Black Sheep Coffee House in Springfield and ending the evening at the Cheers to Children’s Ball, supporting Nebraska kids and families.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Sunday was all about family time. Brett spent the day traveling between soccer and basketball games and enjoyed some much-needed time with his kids.
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
|
---
**Spotlight: My Op-Ed on Sports Complexes**
This week, I shared an op-ed on an issue that resonates with families across Nebraska — the future of youth sports complexes and how we invest in them as a community. In the piece, I highlight the economic impact these facilities bring, the opportunities they create for our kids, and the importance of thoughtful planning to make sure growth benefits families, small businesses, and taxpayers alike.
Youth sports are a big part of so many Nebraska households, including my own. My op-ed lays out a clear, practical vision for how we can support these facilities in a way that strengthens our communities and ensures families continue to have access to safe, high-quality places to play.
If you haven’t had a chance to read it yet, we encourage you to take a look — it’s an important conversation for our district. Read it [HERE >>](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
|
---
| | As we head into another busy week, I’m grateful for each of you who continue to stand with us. Your support, your conversations, and your willingness to stay engaged are what make this campaign so special. We’re building something rooted in Nebraska values, hard work, family, service, and a deep belief in what our communities can accomplish.
Thank you for being part of this effort. Together, we’re not just running a campaign, we’re shaping the future of Nebraska’s Second District, and I’m proud to have you on this team.
Let’s keep moving forward.
---
[VOLUNTEER](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
And if you’re able, please consider making a contribution to help us keep up the momentum. Every dollar goes directly toward reaching voters and ensuring our message is heard loud and clear.
[DONATE TODAY](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Thank you for continued support,
[](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
Brett Lindstrom Republican Candidate for NE-02
|
---
**Stay Connected with Team Lindstrom**
| | | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.) | [](https://link.win.lindstromforne.)
---|---|---
|
---
Paid for by Brett Lindstrom for Congress.
You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com To unsubscribe from Brett Lindstrom for Congress please click [here](https://link.win.lindstromforne.com/click/e83181/VaHR0cHM6Ly9sZmMubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/Sd2luX2xpbmRzdHJvbWZvcm5lX2NvbTI1MTExOA/LbmNsOWVHaXg0/qP2hpZHM9bmNxTGtmOVlpUnB6bHM/gaRymZg/s0mb8694d96).

## The left cries foul at Trump's new lawsuit...
The media's at it again.
You'd have thought they'd learn their lesson after 2024's election results, along with their declining numbers.
Yet they're back with the same playbook as always.
The headline this week was President Trump suing the BBC for a libelous edit.
We'll get into the details, but suffice it to say, it's clear that producers were purposely biasing the spin.
Yet, the mainstream media is now going after Trump for his"attack on press freedom."
That's rich.
It's literally the media's job to tell the story straight, but when they get caught tilting the scales, they go right to playing the victim.
They attacked first--Trump's just setting the record straight.
If you ask me, it's peak hypocrisy.
Let's break it down. ...

name: Jason Crow
subject: Snake wranglin’
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Team, by now, you’ve probably heard about my service. I was honored to lead soldiers in three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan.

What you might not know about are the other jobs I held before serving in Congress.

I come from a working-class background, so like many Americans, I made do with what I had.

At a young age, I started working as an Arby’s Cashier. I worked construction. I served in the National Guard. At one point, I even worked as a rattlesnake wrangler. (Safe to say, I don’t think many members of Congress have had that experience...)

That’s just the beginning.

I’m proud of these experiences because they shaped me to be who I am. I worked to put myself through college. I know what it’s like to put in a hard day’s work and struggle to make ends meet.

My story isn’t unique. Millions of Americans go through that struggle every day. And it’s important that we bring these everyday stories to the halls of power.

Those are the values I bring to my job in Congress. Hard work. Honesty. Integrity. As your Congressman, my job is to represent your values and fight so everybody — no matter the zip code — can achieve their American Dream.

If you’re ready to work with me toward the same mission, make a donation today: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-nov25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

Thank you,

Jason

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
---

Dear Fellow American,
I am reaching out with a **critical** request.
For decades, the radical left has allowed open borders that flooded their states with illegal immigrants. Now, they want to turn them into voters - but not on our watch.

name: Team McBride
subject: Sarah needs your help before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Supporters like you always show up for Sarah when she needs you most.
#
Our mid-month fundraising deadline is at midnight tonight, and [**Sarah needs your help in the final push to hit our $23,000 goal.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251118-1.2UQAoQ&refcode=em20251118-2512&amount=5&t=1&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)
Here’s why this goal is so important:
**1️⃣ Republicans are creating a health care crisis — again.** They’re trying to dismantle our health care system, revive “Trumpcare” policies, and leave millions without coverage. Sarah has been one of the strongest voices fighting back — but with the midterms only a year out, missing this goal means she’ll have to spend more time making fundraising calls and less time fighting on the House floor.
**2️⃣ We’re heading into the time of year when fundraising really drops off.** The holiday season is always one of the slowest periods for campaigns like ours that rely on grassroots donations. That means every dollar we raise _right now_ will determine how competitive we are heading into 2026 and whether Sarah can stay laser-focused on defending our care.
3️⃣**We’re still falling short — and the deadline is tonight.** There are just hours left to hit this goal, keep our campaign on track, and show national Republicans that Delawareans and grassroots supporters across the country are standing with Sarah in her fight to make sure working families aren’t left behind.
That's why we're asking: [**If you’re in a position to do so, can you pitch in $5 or even $1 to support Sarah and help us reach our goal?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251118-1.2UQAoQ&refcode=em20251118-2512&amount=5&t=2&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251118-1.2UQAoQ&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-2512&t=21&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)**
Thank you for your support,
Team McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251118-1&t=22&refcode2=2512_21716_xMAWJz&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2512%2E21716%2ExMAWJz)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: The moment she saw her baby everything changed
body:
Every day, women across America search online for answers.

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2PnDAM_TXhNiPsQGAOHEaLqCp1qz21R-QJDkQiH0oyrPrvK6rZX9Cb7ff07Of3-31-J7tbv_4kx4M-7JzyXDZ2wbEveeNMnxunBz3-8MEz1theAC7QnzwfYuJHSH6Gahn0oiRWPECnZNMrwK7aBim7m0Y2CozsQZu-IYON0bW5UWO6trLDqQkAPXTQorwu5oFSw00ZhqatO9HUz7hQ4XzVwWdOBxV7sPU-nFXwVx1ctQ9bKTELeRc4CZxWe_D1dd1JEDi9OoETxci0ZyGnrIUc3-4_oMb224dARa4IObZKoFqzkCOxQPUsbs7hmTQLOcYUcmRdrF9fkOPFPp2QIzuy-2uoyUWyqxdy1LSzXyh9IcEX9ueaj_vl7df3y9cDqjQs8dPuu83qtL2ecv_clf9J5hjwbwAAAP__jDyg9g)

Hi Advocate for Life, Every day, women across America search online for answers. They are scared, uncertain, and convinced abortion is their only option. That's where **PreBorn!** steps in. Our Network Clinics across the nation provide **free ultrasounds** , **holistic** **compassionate care** , and the **gospel of Jesus Christ** to women in crisis. Because when a mother sees her baby for the first time, when she hears that heartbeat, everything changes. In fact, 81% of women who receive an ultrasound, can see their baby and hear the heartbeat, will choose life for their babies. And your **$28 gift provides one life-saving ultrasound** and gives her the chance to meet her baby and hear of God's love for her. As our thank-you, we'll send you PreBorn!'s [**_Tiny Miracles, Mighty Futures_ 2026**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJykUU2PnDAM_TXhNiPsQGAOHEaLqCp1qz21R-QJDkQiH0oyrPrvK6rZX9Cb7ff07Of3-31-J7tbv_4kx4M-7JzyXDZ2wbEveeNMnxunBz3-8MEz1theAC7QnzwfYuJHSH6Gahn0oiRWPECnZNMrwK7aBim7m0Y2CozsQZu-IYON0bW5UWO6trLDqQkAPXTQorwu5oFSw00ZhqatO9HUz7hQ4XzVwWdOBxV7sPU-nFXwVx1ctQ9bKTELeRc4CZxWe_D1dd1JEDi9OoETxci0ZyGnrIUc3-4_oMb224dARa4IObZKoFqzkCOxQPUsbs7hmTQLOcYUcmRdrF9fkOPFPp2QIzuy-2uoyUWyqxdy1LSzXyh9IcEX9ueaj_vl7df3y9cDqjQs8dPuu83qtL2ecv_clf9J5hjwbwAAAP__jDyg9g) Calendar -- a celebration of the lives your gift helps save and the futures your faith helps build. name: Berrett Gall
subject: Building a winning campaign
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
I’ve been crunching our latest fundraising numbers, and I have some good news and bad news.
#
Peter,
I’ve been crunching our latest fundraising numbers, and I have some good news and bad news.
**The good news:** since launching this campaign, Governor Walz has seen a tremendous outpouring of support across Minnesota. We’ve not only hit all the goals we’ve set so far — we’ve exceeded them.
**The bad news:** we’re currently behind pace to reach our most important goal — our end of year public fundraising deadline.
We’re building a campaign that will reach out to folks in every corner of Minnesota. And to do that, we need to make sure we hit all of our fundraising goals.
**Investments in this campaign now are crucial to winning next November.**
**[Can you chip in $5 to help close our fundraising gap and make sure we’re in a winning position?](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251118.O0xT-I&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-116&t=1&akid=116%2E34582%2E7l8Shn)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=em_tw_20251118.O0xT-I&amount=5&refcode=20251118-116&t=20&akid=116%2E34582%2E7l8Shn)**
Thank you,
Berrett Gall
Senior Advisor
Walz for Governor

Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose.
We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more.
**[Now we need your help to stop MAGA Republicans from dragging us backward. Pitch in $5 today to help us win this race and keep moving forward — together.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251118-116&t=21&refcode2=116_34582_7l8Shn&akid=116%2E34582%2E7l8Shn)**
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251118-116&t=22&refcode2=116_34582_7l8Shn&akid=116%2E34582%2E7l8Shn)**
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)

clean_body: I’ve been crunching our latest fundraising numbers, and I have some good news and bad news. Peter, I’ve been crunching our latest fundraising numbers, and I have some good news and bad news. The good news: since launching this campaign, Governor Walz has seen a tremendous outpouring of support across Minnesota. We’ve not only hit all the goals we’ve set so far — we’ve exceeded them. The bad news: we’re currently behind pace to reach our most important goal — our end of year public fundraising deadline. We’re building a campaign that will reach out to folks in every corner of Minnesota. And to do that, we need to make sure we hit all of our fundraising goals. Investments in this campaign now are crucial to winning next November. Thank you, Berrett Gall Senior Advisor Walz for Governor Under Governor Walz’s leadership, Minnesota is showing the world what’s possible when we come together with grit, compassion, and a shared sense of purpose. We secured free school meals for every student, cut child poverty, passed Paid Family Leave, delivered record investments in education, and more. Email us: mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org

Remember when Donald Trump promised to release the Epstein files? _Did anyone really think the sexual predator president who used to party with Jeffrey Epstein was going to release the Epstein files?_ Instead, he’s been busy taking away your health care to cut taxes for the rich and threatening to strip Americans of their citizenship and send them to foreign prisons. We were told Donald Trump’s new GOP cared about working people. But you can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund their hospitals and nursing homes. You can’t claim to be for working men and women when you defund school lunch programs that help feed little boys and girls whose hard-working parents are struggling to fill the fridge. *** I know it can feel like the Republic is falling apart. But what I need you to hear is that the only way out of this spiral is to win in the midterm elections. That’s the whole ballgame. _2026 is our only hope to recover Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule._ And here in Georgia I am the only Democratic U.S. Senator nationwide up for reelection in a state Trump won. I am therefore MAGA’s #1 target for defeat. _There is no path back without defending this seat — the seat that secured the Democratic majority five years ago._ [If you share my outrage at this unprecedented corruption and abuse of power — and if you are determined to WIN — please chip in to my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119509142/583313614/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111825_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzk0ZDRkMC1hMmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBhv0fR4zIhZZrmCNo25_bn4GnG9ScA3EYuieGDc5i8=) This is the most important Senate race in the country, and I can’t win without you. | | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119509144/583313616/-1748950076?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_111825_OSSOFFSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYzk0ZDRkMC1hMmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nBhv0fR4zIhZZrmCNo25_bn4GnG9ScA3EYuieGDc5i8=)**

Five years ago, here in Georgia, we lit a beacon of hope and possibility for the whole nation. It’s still shining.
And come next November, we will raise it higher.
In a landslide, we will do our part to end this spiral into chaos and corruption.
Thank you for your support.
— Jon

In the other corner, you have the most anti-consumer and anti-average-person administration in history; where if your net worth isn’t over half a billion, they just don’t care about you. That is not a place to compromise for the sake of compromise. People need cheaper groceries, affordable healthcare, and lower rents now, not next year. It is also true that next year presents an opportunity to fundamentally change this equation. And the reality is, while I can and will ensure that we progress on these issues in the face of Trump’s obstruction, a Democratic majority will go a long way in making average people feel like part of the process again. [**That’s why, as we reach the mid-point of our FEC fundraising deadline, I’m asking for your support. Is your neck drooping, hair dry and flaky or maybe your nails are getting brittle? These are WARNING signs that you’re collagen-deficient, and it’s going to get worse if you don’t do something about it.

Believe it or not, collagen deficiency strikes nearly everyone over the age of 30. Because after 30, you start losing 1% of collagen per year.

And that’s no good because... the fact is, collagen is the glue that holds your body together. Without it your body literally starts falling apart (FAST!). So if you have those signs, it's time to act, now, not later.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=52684d9dc6a74001624398ff2f71492b85736ec7b21a6cc20ea7e8b197b1ae8618e2a147feb594f6e2d93659dbdacc43949870f8a5683a76cf88ee44e5246547

A lot of people turn to expensive collagen powders for help. Only problem? They're pretty useless, for a reason...

Because they are INCOMPLETE. They are missing 4 of the 5 MOST important types of collagen. These 5 "super collagens" work TOGETHER to support glowing skin, gorgeous hair and thick, healthy nails.

Fortunately, there IS one collagen powder that is truly complete. And works. It's got ALL 5 "super collagens". Plus, it's loaded with a special vitamin that fully activates the collagen inside your body.

# Epstein files expose Harvard President's romantic pursuit of Chinese Communist Party linked professor
In a **[bombshell fallout from Jeffrey Epstein's unsealed files,](https://substack.com/redirect/9613a773-f6d8-4f5e-b378-4152753b8c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** former Harvard president and Bill Clinton's Former Treasury Secretary, Larry Summers, confessed deep shame Monday over emails revealing his pursuit of Chinese female mentee while married--with the convicted sex offender acting as his sleazy "wing man"--prompting a retreat from public life and calls for his ouster from the Ivy League School.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9613a773-f6d8-4f5e-b378-4152753b8c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Emails Reveal Wingman Role:** Newly disclosed 2018-2019 communications show Epstein advising Summers - was selected by President Obama as the Director of the National Economic Council in 2009 - on romantic overtures to his mentee - despite Epstein's 2008 underage prostitution conviction..
* **The Scandal Deepens:** The Harvard Crimson **[alleges](https://substack.com/redirect/59f679cd-f139-43c3-b979-26405232ebe9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the woman being discussed by the two men is Keyu Jin, a macroeconomist tenured professor at the London School of Economics and that Jin's father is _" a former high-ranked **[Chinese Communist Party official](https://substack.com/redirect/59f679cd-f139-43c3-b979-26405232ebe9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and the founding president of the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank, who Summers had long been close with."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b06f7596-a44f-4a9b-b7c3-549141eb8084?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Summers Admits Misjudgment:** In a stark statement, Summers expressed profound regret for sustaining ties with Epstein post-scandal, vowing accountability while prioritizing teaching duties.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/580af384-4b7b-49ed-a517-17e6e1178cf2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Warren Demands Severance:** Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren blasted Summers' _" monumentally bad judgment,"_ on CNN urging Harvard to cut all affiliations and deeming him unfit to influence students or policy.
* **Federal Probe Looms Large:** Acting on Trump's directive, AG Pam Bondi launched a DOJ inquiry into Summers' Epstein links alongside Clinton and Hoffman, as Congress eyes forcing more file disclosures.

# **Bitcoin dives below $90K, Erasing ALL of 2025 ' gains**
Bitcoin **[tumbled below $90,000](https://substack.com/redirect/7b26876e-2a1e-4100-8b87-b9a68fec7b22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for the first time since April on Tuesday, wiping out its year-to-date gains amid a broader investor flight from speculative tech assets, as the cryptocurrency--once peaking above $126,000--signaled a deepening market risk-off mood.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b26876e-2a1e-4100-8b87-b9a68fec7b22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record Peak Now Vanished** : Bitcoin's value soared to over $126,000 in early October 2025 before a steady slide erased all yearly progress, leaving it down 2% year-to-date at around $91,000.
* **Tech Sell-Off Correlation** : Nasdaq-100 plunged 4% this month as investors dumped AI-linked holdings, with Bitcoin's $1.8 trillion market cap eerily foreshadowing the $32 trillion index's downturn.
* **Proxy Stocks Hammered** : MicroStrategy shares, a key Bitcoin lever, cratered 27% in November, reflecting amplified pain in crypto-tied equities during premarket trading.
* **Expert Alarm Sounded** : Strategist Mike O'Rourke called the Bitcoin-tech link "undeniable" and "alarming," warning that a speculative asset now drives global market cues like a tail wagging the dog.

**Traders grapple with a potential four-year market cycle and[$19 billion in liquidations](https://substack.com/redirect/46c25ea3-607b-4475-9e0e-a7218f1b72cf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) fueling a self-fulfilling sell-off prophecy amid fading post-election euphoria.**
* **Self-Fulfilling Sell-Off Accelerates** : Bernstein analysts warn Q4 2025 downturn stems from trader expectations of cycle peaks, triggering profit-taking by long-term holders without historical 60-70% drawdowns.
* **Institutional Adoption Stabilizes Trends** : Unlike past cycles, ETF inflows and "higher quality ownership" from institutions signal structural growth, not peak fragility, according to experts.
* **Historical Timing Heightens Caution** : Decline hits 400-600 days post-April 2024 halving, aligning with prior bull-to-bear shifts and stalled buyer appetite since October 10.
* **$80K Bottom Beckons Buyers** : Analysts eye post-Trump election lows as entry points, bolstered by MicroStrategy's $835 million token buys at a $102,171 average.

* * *
* * *
# Peter Thiel sells all his Nvidia stock and half of his Tesla stock in massive risk rebalance.
Peter Thiel's Mithril Capital Management **[stunned Wall Street](https://substack.com/redirect/3641948d-5f7e-4c77-9416-cea344ea61e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by completely offloading its Nvidia stake and halving its Tesla position in the third quarter, signaling a bold pivot away from AI and EV darlings amid soaring valuations and market volatility.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3641948d-5f7e-4c77-9416-cea344ea61e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Nvidia Stake Eradicated** : Mithril Capital fully exited its Nvidia holdings, previously valued at over $100 million, as the chipmaker's explosive AI-driven growth prompted a strategic reevaluation of over-concentration risks.
* **Tesla Position Halved** : The fund reduced its Tesla shares by 50%, from a significant stake to about $50 million, reflecting caution over the EV giant's high multiples despite ongoing innovation in autonomous driving.
* **Portfolio Reallocation Strategy** : Proceeds from the sales fueled investments in undervalued sectors like biotech and traditional energy, aiming to diversify beyond tech hype and capitalize on emerging global opportunities.
* **Thiel 's Contrarian Philosophy**: Echoing Thiel's "zero to one" mentality, the moves underscore a hedge against bubble territories in megacaps, potentially foreshadowing broader investor shifts as economic headwinds loom.

* * *
* * *
# Toyota drops $912 million on US production in "build where we sell" plan
In a bold push amid surging demand, Toyota Motor Corp. is pouring **[$912 million into U.S. plants](https://substack.com/redirect/cd64408d-efd5-4e83-9f21-c3e5ce94124a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** across five Southern states to ramp up hybrid production, creating 252 jobs and unveiling hybrid Corollas by 2027--echoing President Trump's call for an American manufacturing revival.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd64408d-efd5-4e83-9f21-c3e5ce94124a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive Multi-State Expansion** : Toyota is allocating funds to facilities in West Virginia, Kentucky, and Mississippi, with $453 million for hybrid engines in Buffalo and $204 million in Georgetown Kentucky.
* **Job Creation Boost** : The investment spawns 252 new positions, reinforcing Toyota's "build where we sell" ethos as the top U.S. hybrid seller with 51% market share.
* **Hybrid Model Innovations** : The Blue Springs plant gets $125 million to convert Corolla line for hybrids, targeting completion by 2027 to meet customer demand.
* **Strategic Tariff Navigation** : The investment is part of $10 billion U.S. pledge by 2030, Chairman Akio Toyoda eyes collaborative tariff solutions to safeguard industry and consumers.

* * *
* * *
# Cloudflare crash blacks out the web for hours
In a stunning **[global internet blackout,](https://substack.com/redirect/47536646-f560-47e4-8b27-5b649762ba50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Cloudflare's mysterious traffic surge Tuesday knocked out Elon Musk's X, OpenAI's ChatGPT, Shopify, Uber and many other blue chip names for hours, exposing the web's fragile underbelly just months after major cloud meltdowns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/47536646-f560-47e4-8b27-5b649762ba50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Mysterious Surge Sparks Outage** : The unusual traffic spike hit Cloudflare at 6:20 a.m. ET, triggering errors across its network. The cause is still unknown despite rapid response.
* **Widespread Service Disruptions** : Beyond X and ChatGPT, outage hammered e-commerce giant Shopify, job site Indeed, AI chatbot Claude, Trump's Truth Social, and NJ Transit's digital tools, briefly sidelining web status tool **[Downdetector.com](https://substack.com/redirect/3a0f6fa2-d272-48f0-a51c-e658799908dc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **Swift Resolution Achieved** : The full fix deployed by 9:57 a.m. ET, restoring services as Cloudflare mobilized teams for monitoring, though shares plunged over 3%.
* **Echoes Recent Cyber Woes** : This latest crash follows October's AWS daylong failure, Microsoft's Azure collapse, and July's CrowdStrike glitch that grounded flights and snarled finance, highlighting persistent infrastructure risks due to reliance on large centralized web companies

Daughter of a former high-ranked Chinese Communist Party official named as the target of Harvard president's affections | | | Nov 18 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, Here is everything you should be following today: Epstein files show he was Larry Summers "wing man" Married Summers pursued Chinese professor mentee Her father was high ranking Chinese Communist Party Official Bitcoin dives below $90K Peter Thiel sells all his Nvidia stock Toyota embraces "build where we sell" Cloudflare crash causes global internet outage Today 's markets + assets: 🔴 DOW: 46094.99 (⬇️ 1.06%) 🔴 S&P: 6624.61 (⬇️ 0.72%) 🔴 NASDAQ: 22467.08 (⬇️ 1.06%) ⚠ ️✅CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 24.34 (⬆️ 9.34%) 🔴 Gold: $4070 (⬇️ 0.12%) 🔴 Silver: $50.50 (⬇️ 0.42%) ✅ Bitcoin: $93,343 (⬆️ 3.75%) The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism Epstein files expose Harvard President's romantic pursuit of Chinese Communist Party linked professor In a former Harvard president and Bill Clinton's Former Treasury Secretary, Larry Summers, confessed deep shame Monday over emails revealing his pursuit of Chinese female mentee while married--with the convicted sex offender acting as his sleazy "wing man"--prompting a retreat from public life and calls for his ouster from the Ivy League School. | | ---|---|--- Emails Reveal Wingman Role: Newly disclosed 2018-2019 communications show Epstein advising Summers - was selected by President Obama as the Director of the National Economic Council in 2009 - on romantic overtures to his mentee - despite Epstein's 2008 underage prostitution conviction.. The Scandal Deepens: The Harvard Crimson that the woman being discussed by the two men is Keyu Jin, a macroeconomist tenured professor at the London School of Economics and that Jin's father is " a former high-ranked and the founding president of the Asian Infrastructure Investment Bank, who Summers had long been close with." | | ---|---|--- Summers Admits Misjudgment: In a stark statement, Summers expressed profound regret for sustaining ties with Epstein post-scandal, vowing accountability while prioritizing teaching duties. | | ---|---|--- Warren Demands Severance: Massachusetts Sen. Elizabeth Warren blasted Summers' " monumentally bad judgment," on CNN urging Harvard to cut all affiliations and deeming him unfit to influence students or policy. Federal Probe Looms Large: Acting on Trump's directive, AG Pam Bondi launched a DOJ inquiry into Summers' Epstein links alongside Clinton and Hoffman, as Congress eyes forcing more file disclosures. Bitcoin dives below $90K, Erasing ALL of 2025 ' gains Bitcoin for the first time since April on Tuesday, wiping out its year-to-date gains amid a broader investor flight from speculative tech assets, as the cryptocurrency--once peaking above $126,000--signaled a deepening market risk-off mood. | | ---|---|--- Record Peak Now Vanished : Bitcoin's value soared to over $126,000 in early October 2025 before a steady slide erased all yearly progress, leaving it down 2% year-to-date at around $91,000. Tech Sell-Off Correlation : Nasdaq-100 plunged 4% this month as investors dumped AI-linked holdings, with Bitcoin's $1.8 trillion market cap eerily foreshadowing the $32 trillion index's downturn. Proxy Stocks Hammered : MicroStrategy shares, a key Bitcoin lever, cratered 27% in November, reflecting amplified pain in crypto-tied equities during premarket trading. Expert Alarm Sounded : Strategist Mike O'Rourke called the Bitcoin-tech link "undeniable" and "alarming," warning that a speculative asset now drives global market cues like a tail wagging the dog. Traders grapple with a potential four-year market cycle and fueling a self-fulfilling sell-off prophecy amid fading post-election euphoria. Self-Fulfilling Sell-Off Accelerates : Bernstein analysts warn Q4 2025 downturn stems from trader expectations of cycle peaks, triggering profit-taking by long-term holders without historical 60-70% drawdowns. Institutional Adoption Stabilizes Trends : Unlike past cycles, ETF inflows and "higher quality ownership" from institutions signal structural growth, not peak fragility, according to experts. Historical Timing Heightens Caution : Decline hits 400-600 days post-April 2024 halving, aligning with prior bull-to-bear shifts and stalled buyer appetite since October 10. $80K Bottom Beckons Buyers : Analysts eye post-Trump election lows as entry points, bolstered by MicroStrategy's $835 million token buys at a $102,171 average. Peter Thiel sells all his Nvidia stock and half of his Tesla stock in massive risk rebalance. Peter Thiel's Mithril Capital Management by completely offloading its Nvidia stake and halving its Tesla position in the third quarter, signaling a bold pivot away from AI and EV darlings amid soaring valuations and market volatility. | | ---|---|--- Nvidia Stake Eradicated : Mithril Capital fully exited its Nvidia holdings, previously valued at over $100 million, as the chipmaker's explosive AI-driven growth prompted a strategic reevaluation of over-concentration risks. Tesla Position Halved : The fund reduced its Tesla shares by 50%, from a significant stake to about $50 million, reflecting caution over the EV giant's high multiples despite ongoing innovation in autonomous driving. Portfolio Reallocation Strategy : Proceeds from the sales fueled investments in undervalued sectors like biotech and traditional energy, aiming to diversify beyond tech hype and capitalize on emerging global opportunities. Thiel 's Contrarian Philosophy: Echoing Thiel's "zero to one" mentality, the moves underscore a hedge against bubble territories in megacaps, potentially foreshadowing broader investor shifts as economic headwinds loom. Toyota drops $912 million on US production in "build where we sell" plan In a bold push amid surging demand, Toyota Motor Corp. is pouring across five Southern states to ramp up hybrid production, creating 252 jobs and unveiling hybrid Corollas by 2027--echoing President Trump's call for an American manufacturing revival. | | ---|---|--- Massive Multi-State Expansion : Toyota is allocating funds to facilities in West Virginia, Kentucky, and Mississippi, with $453 million for hybrid engines in Buffalo and $204 million in Georgetown Kentucky. Job Creation Boost : The investment spawns 252 new positions, reinforcing Toyota's "build where we sell" ethos as the top U.S. hybrid seller with 51% market share. Hybrid Model Innovations : The Blue Springs plant gets $125 million to convert Corolla line for hybrids, targeting completion by 2027 to meet customer demand. Strategic Tariff Navigation : The investment is part of $10 billion U.S. pledge by 2030, Chairman Akio Toyoda eyes collaborative tariff solutions to safeguard industry and consumers. Cloudflare crash blacks out the web for hours In a stunning Cloudflare's mysterious traffic surge Tuesday knocked out Elon Musk's X, OpenAI's ChatGPT, Shopify, Uber and many other blue chip names for hours, exposing the web's fragile underbelly just months after major cloud meltdowns. | | ---|---|--- Mysterious Surge Sparks Outage : The unusual traffic spike hit Cloudflare at 6:20 a.m. ET, triggering errors across its network. The cause is still unknown despite rapid response. Widespread Service Disruptions : Beyond X and ChatGPT, outage hammered e-commerce giant Shopify, job site Indeed, AI chatbot Claude, Trump's Truth Social, and NJ Transit's digital tools, briefly sidelining web status tool Swift Resolution Achieved : The full fix deployed by 9:57 a.m. ET, restoring services as Cloudflare mobilized teams for monitoring, though shares plunged over 3%. Echoes Recent Cyber Woes : This latest crash follows October's AWS daylong failure, Microsoft's Azure collapse, and July's CrowdStrike glitch that grounded flights and snarled finance, highlighting persistent infrastructure risks due to reliance on large centralized web companies The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism * You're currently a free subscriber to . subject: Ilhan knows the Constitution. Trump doesn’t.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251118-1628-foote&t=1001&akid=1628%2E342411%2EGF8Sjw ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

ICYMI: Donald Trump attacked Rep. Ilhan Omar, again, and she didn’t back
down:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251118-movement.ADzzN3&refcode=em20251118-1628&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1628%2E342411%2EGF8Sjw ]Trump on Ilhan Omar: 'I look at someone who comes from Somalia... and
she comes in and tells us how to run our country. 'The Constitution says
this, the Constitution says that.' The whole thing is crazy.' Ilhan Omar's
response: 'Unlike you, I can read and that's why I know what the
Constitution says.'

This isn’t just a personal attack. It’s part of a larger pattern we’ve
been seeing from the far-right: rising attacks on the Squad, spreading
lies about their legitimacy, and trying to intimidate anyone fighting for
justice, equality, and democracy itself.

The stakes are real. When elected officials are attacked, it sends a
chilling message to everyone fighting for a fairer, more just country:
that standing up can make you a target. But the Squad has proven time and
again that courage wins.

Now, more than ever, we need to make sure our leaders can fight without
fear.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251118-movement.ADzzN3&refcode=em20251118-1628&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1628%2E342411%2EGF8Sjw ]The Squad isn’t backing down — and neither are we because when the
attacks rise, so does our fight. Will you chip in $3 to
keep our Squad strong, our movement loud, and our democracy safe?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20251118-movement.ADzzN3&refcode=em20251118-1628&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1628%2E342411%2EGF8Sjw ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1628%2E342411%2EGF8Sjw

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Help me keep up the fight for our free and fair elections
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1009%2E181023%2EbP8Mbu)
Hey there,
As Secretary of State, I know that Michigan’s elections are safe, secure, and the results we see are an accurate reflection of the will of the people. Period.
So I wanted you to know about the latest ploy from Michigan Republicans and ask for you to help me call it what it is: a dangerous scheme to get in the way of our free and fair elections.
Let's be clear about the facts: several of my predecessors have run for office while completing their term as Michigan’s Secretary of State. Candice Miller ran for Congress in 2002. Ruth Johnson ran for State Senate in 2018. The law hasn't changed. The facts haven't changed. And the commitment of over 1,500 local election officials to free, fair, and secure elections won't change either.
**Getting the Justice Department — led by Pam Bondi, a former lawyer for Donald Trump himself — involved is a way to breed _more_ uncertainty, _more_ chaos, and _more_ skepticism about our election results.**
These shenanigans have one goal and one effect: to undermine trust in our elections and our democracy. And I won’t stand for it.
And what’s more, this rhetoric potentially puts hardworking election officials in harm’s way (I’ve unfortunately been there).
I am deeply committed to safe and transparent elections — now and always. And the way these GOP lawmakers are acting suggests that they’d rather politicize our elections and play footsie with Trump than work across the aisle to protect our democracy. That’s exactly why we need to keep them _far away_ from the governor’s office.
**[Help me keep up the fight for our secure elections. Rush in a donation today →](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251118_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1009%2E181023%2EbP8Mbu)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hey there, As Secretary of State, I know that Michigan’s elections are safe, secure, and the results we see are an accurate reflection of the will of the people. Period. So I wanted you to know about the latest ploy from Michigan Republicans and ask for you to help me call it what it is: a dangerous scheme to get in the way of our free and fair elections. Let's be clear about the facts: several of my predecessors have run for office while completing their term as Michigan’s Secretary of State. Candice Miller ran for Congress in 2002. Ruth Johnson ran for State Senate in 2018. The law hasn't changed. The facts haven't changed. And the commitment of over 1,500 local election officials to free, fair, and secure elections won't change either. Getting the Justice Department — led by Pam Bondi, a former lawyer for Donald Trump himself — involved is a way to breed more uncertainty, more chaos, and more skepticism about our election results. These shenanigans have one goal and one effect: to undermine trust in our elections and our democracy. And I won’t stand for it. And what’s more, this rhetoric potentially puts hardworking election officials in harm’s way (I’ve unfortunately been there). I am deeply committed to safe and transparent elections — now and always. And the way these GOP lawmakers are acting suggests that they’d rather politicize our elections and play footsie with Trump than work across the aisle to protect our democracy. That’s exactly why we need to keep them far away from the governor’s office. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | Thank you for standing with me — and our democracy. Jocelyn

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I am officially running for governor of New York
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Governor
body:
You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.

You deserve to be among the FIRST to know.
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq96vcav301hbblhnt73l12tnbfiet1a41u54t0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clg6ap74chh2bs)
---
**_OFFICIAL ANNOUNCEMENT FROM REP. ELISE STEFANIK_**
---
Friend,
---
As one of my biggest grassroots supporters, I wanted to tell you this HUGE news personally...
---
**_I’m officially launching my campaign for governor of New York – and I’d like _YOU_ to be one of our very first Founding Members!_**
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7e1qmg2gj2po41k9fdrhj63r2up4deh45ioocv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clg6ap74chh2bs)
---

Kathy Hochul is the WORST governor in America, and she’s brought our once great state to its knees with her crippling taxes, crushing government regulations, and pro-criminal agenda.
---
__But her embrace of communist jihadi Zohran Mamdani was the FINAL straw.__
---
**As I watched the results come in on election night, I felt it was my duty to step up to the plate and fight with everything I have to SAVE New York from this communist takeover!**
---
This isn’t just another election, Friend.
---
**_It’s the _FINAL_ _BATTLE_ to SAVE New York before it’s lost forever!_**
---
Hochul will rubber stamp Mamdani’s dangerous communist agenda that seeks to abolish prisons, seize private property, drown us in taxes, let violent illegal aliens torment U.S. citizens, and tyrannically weaponize the power of the state against anyone who disagrees.
---
**But as the next Governor of New York, I will be the _FINAL_ _FIREWALL_ that protects New Yorkers from this insanity!**
---
We’re starting off in a strong position. Back-to-back polls just showed us with a _**ONE-POINT LEAD**_ – _and that’s before I even officially launched our campaign!_
---
As long as we raise the funds we need to fight back against Hochul’s attacks, cut through her multimillion-dollar ad buys, and get every last Republican to the polls, we have a clear path to victory.
---
That’s why the most important thing we can do right now is show a SURGE of grassroots support with thousands of Founding Members joining the ranks of our campaign.
---
Make no mistake, this will be the KEY to victory. Your support today could help us move one step closer to unlocking MILLIONS of dollars in matching funds from New York state!
---
**_That’s not a gimmick – it’s a REAL, authentic,_600% MATCH_!_**
---
When I’m sworn in as the next Governor of New York, I’ll know exactly who I have to thank...
---
**_Our Founding Members like _YOU_ who had my back on day one!_**
---
[**So please, make a contribution of ANY amount to become an official Founding Member of my gubernatorial campaign to FIRE Kathy Hochul – and help unlock a 600% MATCH.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl5m68aolr2lp30f2gbt2bmhimtgtoev13tebecg_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clg6ap74chh2bs)
---

[ACCEPT YOUR
FOUNDING MEMBERSHIP >>](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z50tok387epptqlcfuhd320pd31knnves2ud2lo0_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clg6ap74chh2bs)
---

Thank you,
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd5lt6pssnu5pt3lj3t7admfp8578sadufjfndag_rp22sh2s8i6eor6clg6ap74chh2bs)
---
Rep. Elise Stefanik
Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership
---

---

---
PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801
---

name: Sarah McBride
subject: As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be times like this
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119512510/583320184/-1516755731?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1ZjFiNjYtYThjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VOgGKUvNLHbWHbbHZ6AFQMe_vDMVIP0Up-mIiRv4Vkg=)
Hi there, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride.

Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me.

**As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues.**

I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day.

I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like Derek Tran standing with me.

**[If I can count on your support too, please split a donation of $10 or whatever you can between my campaign and Derek Tran today. Every donation helps us defend the LGBTQ+ community and keep up the fight for working families in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119512511/583320187/1639839510?refcode=em-11.18.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1ZjFiNjYtYThjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VOgGKUvNLHbWHbbHZ6AFQMe_vDMVIP0Up-mIiRv4Vkg=)**
| **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119512513/583320188/1639839510?refcode=em-11.18.25-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDg3ODciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWM1ZjFiNjYtYThjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VOgGKUvNLHbWHbbHZ6AFQMe_vDMVIP0Up-mIiRv4Vkg=)**
---

Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me.

Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible.

**Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it.**

clean_body: | = Hi there, it’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. Right now, the GOP is using LGBTQ+ people as pawns. They’re not offering solutions to make everyone's lives better. Instead, they’re busy launching attacks — on our rights and yes, on me. As the first openly trans member of Congress, I knew there would be moments like this. But I didn’t run for Congress to debate which bathroom I use or entertain cruelty from my Republican colleagues. I ran to deliver for working families. To fight for paid leave. To protect our freedoms. And I will never stop defending the LGBTQ+ community from attacks, manufactured distractions, and the hostility too many of us endure every day. I won’t let the GOP’s pettiness and bullying derail my work. Has it been easy? No. These fights never are. But I’ve never felt alone — because I have people like Derek Tran standing with me. = | = Growing up, I couldn’t imagine a future like mine. I wasn’t sure this country’s heart was big enough to love someone like me. Over the last decade, though, I’ve been able to bear witness to change that once seemed so impossible to me as a kid that it was almost incomprehensible. Because people believed it could. Because we fought for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you! Sarah | www.derektranforcongress.com Use of Derek Tran's military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Dept. of Defense or U.S. Army. I’m reaching out to let you know that I’ve endorsed Randy Villegas for Congress in California’s 22nd District, and to ask you to support his campaign with a **[donation of $27](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119512499/583320170/-1934691120?refcode=em-11.18.25-rs&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWQ1ZjFiNjYtYThjNC1mMDExLTgxOTYtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FuSJokTXwMeXVwPqry6m5pkQ0bED4I8mFTejQwgFAz0=)** today. Randy is an educator and small business owner from a working class family who understands the struggles that so many millions of Americans are facing everyday. He is rejecting corporate PAC money because he understands the outsized influence that big corporations have on our political process and that we need to return the power to the people. Now he’s running in one of the most competitive races in the country against a Republican incumbent backed by those very same corporate interests and billionaire donors who’ve rigged the system for themselves. I’m reaching out to let you know that I’ve endorsed Randy Villegas for Congress in California’s 22nd District, and to ask you to support his campaign with a = today. Here’s why your support matters: At a time when the billionaire class is raking in record profits while millions of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, we need working-class fighters in Congress who will take on the corporate greed that’s rigged our system. Randy Villegas is one of those fighters. I am proud to endorse Randy because we need more working-class people in Congress who are not beholden to the corporations and special interests that have rigged our political system in favor of the billionaire political class. Randy is an educator and small business owner from a working class family who understands the struggles that so many millions of Americans are facing everyday. He is rejecting corporate PAC money because he understands the outsized influence that big corporations have on our political process and that we need to return the power to the people. Now he’s running in one of the most competitive races in the country against a Republican incumbent backed by those very same corporate interests and billionaire donors who’ve rigged the system for themselves. If we want to flip this seat and send a working-class champion to Congress, we need to show that grassroots power can beat big money. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Bernie Sanders | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. name: Ro Khanna
subject: This is how we splinter the MAGA base – and win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
Help me continue to show up in red districts, MAGA podcasts, and conservative spaces. It’s working.
[](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251118-1-ak.eOramT&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-1312&t=2&akid=1314%2E251025%2EIiugBR)
Peter,
I’m going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, **we have split the MAGA base, and we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.**
Up to **40 MAGA Republicans** are ready to support my **Khanna Epstein Transparency Act** , even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.
It’s the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade — since Trump came down his golden escalator and announced his candidacy for President. And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency and a government for the people, not the rich, powerful, and well-connected, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
[**Will you rush a split $5 to my campaign and Abdul El-Sayed to help us keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251118-1-ak.eOramT&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-1312&t=3&akid=1314%2E251025%2EIiugBR)
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251118-1-ak.eOramT&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-1312&t=22&akid=1314%2E251025%2EIiugBR)**
We don’t take lobbyist money. We don’t take corporate money.
Our campaigns are powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* **Travel and event logistics** to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* **Promotion and organizing** to bring new people into the movement.
* **Security and operations** so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you, so thank you for reading this message. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails?t=23&akid=1314%2E251025%2EIiugBR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=24&akid=1314%2E251025%2EIiugBR)

Email us: [info@abdulformichigan.com](info@abdulformichigan.com)
Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: California, Maryland, and more
body:
Peter, it’s Kamala. I am reaching out because this is too important not to face head-on.
Republicans across the country are trying to rig Congressional maps and silence the will of the people.
They have figured out that they will not win if they do not cheat. Because they know that taking health care and SNAP benefits from working families is not a winning argument.
**Democrats know: We have to fight fire with fire.**
I am proud of the California voters who passed Prop 50, and I am grateful for leaders like Senator Angela Alsobrooks and Governor Wes Moore who are spearheading the fight in Maryland to protect our democracy.
It is time to take it to the voters, take it to the streets, and take it to the people. We must not allow the people who want to cheat democracy to win.
**If you are with me in this fight for fairness, I am asking you to pitch in what you can to help build the fire we need. This is important work, and I cannot do it alone. No one can.**
[**So please, Peter: Will you make a contribution to support my work promoting Democratic redistricting efforts across the country? The amount does not matter as much as the donation itself. Together, every contribution shows that there are thousands of people ready to stand up for our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?refcode=em251118&refcode2=793_2563979_KD6oa-&akid=793%2E2563979%2EKD6oa-)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ftp-em?refcode=em251118&refcode2=793_2563979_KD6oa-&akid=793%2E2563979%2EKD6oa-)**
Together,
Kamala

KDH For The People Inc. is a nonprofit social welfare organization that is exempt from federal income tax under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Please note that contributions to this organization are not generally tax-deductible. The mission of KDH For The People Inc. is to strengthen communities across America through the promotion of economic opportunity, justice, and protection of fundamental freedoms.
This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com**. Thank you so much for being a supporter. But we don't want to bother you. If you’d like to unsubscribe, you can **[click here.](https://harris.actionkit.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=793%2E2563979%2EKD6oa-)**

subject: I want to hear directly from you.

body:
I value your opinion, Fellow Conservative. No one understands what's at stake in these midterm elections better than you—because the outcomes will directly impact your daily life, from the cost of groceries to the safety of your neighborhood. |
---
I value your opinion, Fellow Conservative.

No one understands what's at stake in these midterm elections better than you--because the outcomes will directly impact your daily life, from the cost of groceries to the safety of your neighborhood.

As the past Governor of South Dakota, I delivered real results by following conservative principles that don't fail. I brought that same approach to Washington as your U.S. Senator, where I'm fighting every day to fix our broken government.

I want to hear what's on your mind. _How are things going? Are you satisfied with the direction our country is heading? What would you change?_ These are all important questions that I would like to hear your opinion on.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I guess I shouldn't put the cart before the horse…
body:
I don’t know what to think of this, {{name}}...

| | | | I guess I shouldn't put the cart before the horse.

But I've been sending emails exactly like this one for weeks and haven't had any luck.
I thought support from MAGA Patriots was at an all-time high, but I fear I was wrong.
So, I'm choosing to cut to the chase and pray for a different outcome.
My name is Marsha Blackburn. I'm a top ally of Donald Trump and a vigorous supporter of the America First Agenda. I’m sure you think this message is just another drop in the bucket, but I'm pleading with you to hear me out.
Here's the deal: Democrats across the country have never been hungrier for revenge after their miserable defeat in 2024. They’re riding high after their recent victories in New Jersey and Virginia, and I fear that this momentum will carry them to victory in 2026.
We're TOAST if conservatives stay on the sidelines! George Soros is writing blank checks to any Democrat who asks, and if we don't go on the offensive, they'll turn every state into a battleground overnight.
So, I'm going to ask you what I know is no small favor: Will you pledge just a few bucks before deleting this message to help?
[](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[These messages aren’t cheap to send, so I'm praying you've made it this far and will be willing to pitch in even just $5.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.) | [ CHIP IN HERE >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
Every single dollar matters in battleground races where corrupt Democrats are prepared to spend, say, and do anything to win. If Republicans are going to stay in the majority and continue to implement President Trump’s agenda, we must act like it. Not tomorrow, next week, or next year. Now.
[ CHIP IN HERE >> ](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)
---
God bless you. Thank you for your time today.

Marsha Blackburn
Pro-Trump Republican

| |
---
| | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---

Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

This message reflects the opinions and representations of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund's online community.
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTE4XzdSLTBPLjExMDExN190MTc1NDQzNS0xMDQzJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTExOF83Ui0wTy4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTQ0MzUtMTA0MyJ9/KkDrhg5J7H85UomIDc_thw)

To unsubscribe from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund , [click here](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._)
---

subject: The shutdown is over, but the problems remain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| | Hi there — The government shutdown is finally over, but **problems remain for millions of Americans who will see their healthcare costs skyrocket.** I voted NO on the funding bill because it did nothing to address the healthcare crisis. Throughout my time in Congress, I have always been consistent: I will not vote for any bill that will cause more harm and more problems for my constituents. Unfortunately, Republicans exacerbated the problem with this funding bill. **Our work to hold them to account continues — and every day between now and next year’s election, we will remind voters of how Republicans turned their backs on millions of families to give billionaires a tax cut.** **[I am ready to get back to work to lower healthcare costs, ensure families receive the necessary nutrition assistance to put food on the table, and make lives easier and more affordable for my constituents. clean_body: | | Hi there — The government shutdown is finally over, but problems remain for millions of Americans who will see their healthcare costs skyrocket. I voted NO on the funding bill because it did nothing to address the healthcare crisis. Throughout my time in Congress, I have always been consistent: I will not vote for any bill that will cause more harm and more problems for my constituents. Unfortunately, Republicans exacerbated the problem with this funding bill. Our work to hold them to account continues — and every day between now and next year’s election, we will remind voters of how Republicans turned their backs on millions of families to give billionaires a tax cut. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district.
