name: George Whitesides
subject: Asking for your input, not a donation.
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515585/583329271/148511826?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=)
Hi Peter, I hope you’re doing well and staying dry. ☂️

A lot has happened in recent weeks, so instead of asking for a donation toward my re-election campaign, I want your input on where we go from here.

**[Will you take a minute to complete my November priorities survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515587/583329273/-600794686?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=&emci=8e516868-a9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=03d8e996-acc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Take the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515589/583329275/-600794686?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=&emci=8e516868-a9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=03d8e996-acc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)****
---

Let me explain why this moment matters:

While we’ve come out of the longest shutdown in American history, the deal did nothing to address rising costs and the healthcare crisis facing thousands in CA-27 and millions nationwide.

It’s why I voted against it. House Republicans left Washington for two months and refused to work with us to make a difference for our constituents. Instead, they’re bending over backwards to please the Trump Administration.

Back at home, California voters overwhelmingly passed Proposition 50 – setting new congressional maps statewide into motion. This is a win for fair representation in our democracy and pushing back against extreme GOP gerrymandering, but it also adds thousands of new voters to my district.

**[I’m laser-focused on delivering results in Congress despite the GOP majority, and that’s why I’m asking for your thoughts today – will you take the survey to help form our next steps?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515592/583329278/-600794686?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=&emci=8e516868-a9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=03d8e996-acc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)**
****[Click to begin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515593/583329280/-600794686?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=&emci=8e516868-a9c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=03d8e996-acc4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=36198509)****
---

Thank you,

George
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515594/583329281/-2104984614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515596/583329282/-723877621?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515598/583329284/1617125231?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=) George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. [Chip in to George's campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515601/583329287/148511826?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=)

To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: [GeorgeWhitesides.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119515603/583329289/-1896241937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2Q4ZTk5Ni1hY2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_hSlVgUrIZeT9XlkD2hdfgzZEVGbhlz8H26Aj0x7K4Y=)

We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7Lng7fM74EmfvnJSCPSYrg2?unsubscribedata=zCBWSShGZdD%2FyxriHpfGqNJxD6aYI1yAJnaeHSz0SHY52i5U3VILIj6riCP3u3U0UxgQ%2FciQWPcxtruSTvNf%2B9OkoLP5l1zrh7%2FZKemm%2BKXvQL2XYj0ni%2BM3kZDvTbYHtFol0yLczvcwUzAuOE39rt%2Fez4wJT5bAzJMVGXXm19CRKas%2BNGoWBPYH0Opbk7U8IsnhWq7ne12t%2FTAcyABmeLQOgugnCoQe%2BtFwE7yFGiOOTkARHB4tJFe8Y35narLxL%2BgizPhfCXD91mV%2FstIjHWT3xUUWoLhsdK78%2BTGoFpZ0UjJKBTmOKkFSKBF4tohkIIfjwEdWELCy8HAnyz%2BmlUf3tIHIRDXrqQaAyow5MAO9YevnS2HOsyCuAU74t8Xv2X7llDjc%2FCrye3eeqmicqbMXngxGTj%2FALFVXc%2BWRjkDyJWXBAdPRZtvZRwvikn8A).

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Something’s happening in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
It’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, just jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you rush $5 or more to elect Chris Pappas and keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251118_1_pritzker.Wkyjhs&refcode=em20251118-1&t=1&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
And most recently the NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you chip in $5 or any amount today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251118_1_pritzker.Wkyjhs&refcode=em20251118-1&t=2&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251118_1_pritzker.Wkyjhs&amount=5&refcode=em20251118-1&t=21&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)**
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251118_1_pritzker.33O6zR&refcode=em20251118-1&t=22&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)**
With gratitude,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20251118_1_pritzker.33O6zR&refcode=em20251118-1&t=23&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251118-1&t=24&refcode2=3552_582294_rS5YKh&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=26&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=3552%2E582294%2ErS5YKh)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Join Us for Our Black Friday Silent Auction!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Join Us for Our Black Friday Silent Auction!**
---
|
---
| Looking for the perfect holiday gift that makes a real difference? This year, shop with purpose at our **Black Friday Silent Auction** and treat your loved ones — or yourself — to meaningful, one-of-a-kind items that support a powerful mission. Every bid helps fund **Autism Health Inc.** , providing research, education, resources, and hope for families impacted by autism. Our **top auction items** include two exclusive collector’s pieces:
* A custom baseball bat signed by **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.**
* A custom baseball bat signed by **General Michael Flynn**

Other exciting items include:
* Various **Supplement Packages** designed for optimal wellness
* A **Private Health Coaching Session** with our President, **Tracy Slepcevic**
* A **Private Gun Range Experience** with **Steve Slepcevic** , Co-Founder of Autism Health

This is your chance to give a gift that inspires, empowers, and heals — while contributing to programs that make a real impact in the autism community. **Bidding is open and closes Nov 30th at 9 PM PST!**
Don’t miss your opportunity to shop for a cause and make this holiday season truly meaningful.
---
| [Visit our Silent Auction Page HERE](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=2d11c24248&e=3a42edfdc4 "Visit our Silent Auction Page HERE")
---
|

|

---
|
---
| We invite you to our next **Autism Support Group** , held via Zoom — a compassionate space created for parents, caregivers, and professionals who support individuals with autism spectrum disorder. Whether you’re just beginning this journey or have years of experience, this is a place where your voice, knowledge, and story are valued. This live group call provides an opportunity to:
* **Connect** with others who truly understand the challenges and joys of autism
* **Share experiences and strategies** that help children and adults thrive
* **Ask questions** and collaborate on solutions that matter
* **Discover resources** for biomedical care, communication, therapies, education, and advocacy
* **Build hope** through community — because none of us should navigate autism alone

Our support group is open to:
* Parents and caregivers of autistic children and adults
* Educators, therapists, practitioners, and healthcare professionals
* Anyone seeking a supportive, collaborative environment committed to improving the lives of those with autism

By coming together, we learn from one another, expand our support network, and create a stronger pathway for every individual we serve. If you’ve been searching for community — this is for you.

name: BREAKING! [via VPP]
subject: Trump: “Seth Meyers must be fired IMMEDIATELY”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
The FCC pulling the plug on NBC?!
| **MAJOR BREAKING:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96669?t=6&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu) _Trump had Stephen Colbert cancelled. He had Jimmy Kimmel suspended. Now, Seth Meyers is his next target!!_

The American people banded together to save Kimmel, **so we need a SURGE of that same momentum to defend Seth Meyers before NBC CAVES!**

[**By adding your name, we’ll show that MILLIONS of Democrats have Seth’s back! Please: Chip in $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96669?t=7&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96669?t=8&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu)
---
TO: Seth Meyers
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I have your back. Dear Seth Meyers,

**Thank you.** Your commitment to journalistic integrity and the truth over the years has been truly inspirational and has kept us all laughing through the MAGA madness.

Trump knows that you’re right — but he would rather silence you and PULL THE PLUG on NBC than have his fragile ego hurt!

**This isn’t just an attack on you, it’s an attack on the free press and our very democracy. I won’t stand for it, not now and not EVER.**

[**So I’m signing this letter today by chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to thank you for exposing Trump’s lies and stand with you in the fight ahead. It is _absolutely critical_ that Democrats get up off the sidelines at this moment! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96669?t=9&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/96669?t=10&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21885%2E878179%2E7Uh_Xu)

name: Team Cooper
subject: the MOST competitive race on the map
body:
Right here in North Carolina.
| [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2025?t=5&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=1&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?t=2&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?t=3&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=4&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=6&akid=50%2E124072%2ENb5_UI)

Will you join him with a contribution of any amount right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119516424/583331983/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmEwZDg1Zi1iMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_nphR8RKcgywH4UBbthWEyHNFNghFLIzuHqD2IMGo4=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119516425/583331984/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmEwZDg1Zi1iMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_nphR8RKcgywH4UBbthWEyHNFNghFLIzuHqD2IMGo4=)
---
By firing and forcing out federal workers, the Trump administration has put our public lands more at risk than ever before.
Martin spoke with a former lead wilderness ranger who was fired by the Trump administration. **Without rangers caring for our public lands, there’s no one checking for abandoned campfires left burning. There’s no one on standby to rescue lost hikers. There’s no one ensuring that protected wildlife is respected. **
Republicans may see New Mexico’s public lands as a line item on a budget, but Martin sees them as the most physical manifestation of democracy. He will always stand by our public lands and the dedicated people who steward them.
[_**Donate now to help Martin flip the Senate and elect a majority who cares about preserving public lands:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119516426/583331985/944546612?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251118_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmEwZDg1Zi1iMGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S_nphR8RKcgywH4UBbthWEyHNFNghFLIzuHqD2IMGo4=)

There’s no one on standby to rescue lost hikers. There’s no one ensuring that protected wildlife is respected. Republicans may see New Mexico’s public lands as a line item on a budget, but Martin sees them as the most physical manifestation of democracy. subject: Former Republican Congressional Nominee Endorses David Flippo!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada]( "Paid for by David Flippo for Nevada")
body:
Conservatives from across the country are rallying behind David Flippo! |
---

| | Peter ,

I proudly announce that **Former Republican Nominee Sam Peters** has officially endorsed my campaign for Congress in **NV-04**. Sam Peters is a fellow Air Force veteran and understands the ways that Steven Horsford has failed our district. He knows that we need to eliminate corruption in Washington, D.C., and that starts with defeating Steven Horsford!

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: We’re facing an uphill battle. I need folks like you by my side to make it to the top.
body:
I know you’re likely getting a ton of emails from candidates and causes right now, Peter.
But I have to ask: Is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $25 between Real Texas PAC and my Senate campaign in Ohio? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=101725_2]
What if I told you that right after I joined this race, experts at The Cook Political Report increased our odds of winning?
What if I told you that CNN and The New York Times report that Ohio is “in play” – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions against me?
What if I told you that misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves – and that whether we’re able to counter these smears and reach voters with the truth depends on people like you?
This grassroots, small-dollar donor movement is our best chance to flip Ohio’s Senate seat. But we’re facing an uphill battle, and I need folks like you by my side to win.
So please, split $25 or more between Real Texas PAC and me to power our campaign forward, win in Ohio, and keep up the fight for working people. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=101725_2]

subject: Trump’s 2008 2.0
body:
Trump’s 50-year mortgage could trigger a crash

[](https://go.m.democratically.org/l/_JoIaE11TamGTngLc6FAfswrvPr5Gh8OTnllbhRdocU)
Peter,

Trump’s new “solution” to the housing crisis is a 50-year mortgage that experts warn would keep families paying interest for decades with little equity to show for it.

Housing analysts say it mirrors the predatory tactics that fueled the 2008 financial crash.

All profit for banks, zero relief for working families.
Democrats are pushing real affordability reforms, not lifelong debt.

name: Voter Registration Team @ Voter Action Project
subject: Year-round engagement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
The 2025 elections showed us a valuable truth, folks: Civic participation is increasing in all the right ways.
Voter registration activity increased across the country. According to the team at National Voter Registration Day, New York recorded more registrations for their 2025 events than in 2024, and California saw similar increases. Earlier this fall it looked like voter participation was going to make a real jump, even in a so-called "off-year".
Then Election Day came. New Jersey had more voters turn out for a gubernatorial election than they had in 20 years. Crucial counties in Pennsylvania saw their highest turnout levels in almost 15 years. New York City reached a turnout percentage unseen in over five decades.
We can inspire even higher levels of participation when voters understand the stakes and feel like their vote matters, just like it did a few weeks ago. That's why our voter registration efforts are so important.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111825_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=111825_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111825_1&amount=36]
The key is getting young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights across the country -- to see the importance of voting now more than ever. Pundits in Virginia said they could have called the election results when they saw the first turnout numbers from the major college campus locations around the state. That's the kind of impact these young voters can have.
Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The 2026 midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at a cost to us of just about $3 per new voter -- can be game-changing. Can you pitch in with $24 or however much you can to help us register a tidal wave of new voters ahead of next year's voter registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=111825_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=111825_1&amount=20]

He even pressured House Republicans to kill the effort. Then, when he realized he was going to lose, he suddenly claimed he supports releasing the files. Here's the thing: Trump doesn't need Congress to release these files. He's the president. He controls the Justice Department. He could order the files released this very minute. But he won't. Because this was never about doing the right thing. It's about political theater. It’s the same playbook we’ve seen from our top leaders here in Florida — including Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier. Big promises. Zero follow-through. clean_body: We deserve better. | | | Peter — Let's be crystal clear about what's happening with the Epstein files: Donald Trump spent months throwing everything but the kitchen sink to block their release. He calls it a hoax. He even pressured House Republicans to kill the effort. Then, when he realized he was going to lose, he suddenly claimed he supports releasing the files. Here's the thing: Trump doesn't need Congress to release these files. He's the president. He controls the Justice Department. He could order the files released this very minute. But he won't. Because this was never about doing the right thing. It's about political theater. It’s the same playbook we’ve seen from our top leaders here in Florida — including Ron DeSantis and Attorney General James Uthmeier. Big promises. Zero follow-through. All talk when it helps them politically. Silent when Florida families need real action. Floridians are tired of the lies and self-serving leadership in the Sunshine State. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = ‐ Team Rodriguez | = = PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL Jose Javier Rodriguez for Attorney General 701 S. body:
I'm sending you this text today in hopes of a miracle.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-6SE0gZIyOLQHQxX-Onw)Hide & seek with the Grim Reaper.
I'm sending you this text today in hopes of a miracle.
**After reaching out 3 times and hearing nothing, I'm deeply concerned about what will happen if this doesn't work.**
I've had my back against the wall before - I know how to stay calm under pressure.
My name is Troy Downing. Just a guy from Montana who is taking a huge leap of faith.
Peter, I'm also a U.S. Air Force combat veteran, a God-fearing Christian, a husband, and a proud dad.
**I'm fighting against the Deep State in Congress and advancing President Trump's MAGA agenda.**
But I've just learned that Democrats in key battleground districts have amassed a staggering war chest, each with an average of over $1 million in cash.
The Democrat Political Machine is take this pro-Trump House seat & remove every other red-blooded American who opposes their radical agenda so they can take over the House Majority.
They're putting my campaign on the chopping block.
[I hate to do this, but could I humbly ask you to help me out by chipping in just a few bucks today?](https://trk.emails.troydowning._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjUxMTE4XzgzLUJMLjExMDExN190MTc1NDg0MS0yODk5JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MTExOF84My1CTC4xMTAxMTdfdDE3NTQ4NDEtMjg5OSJ9/IiaP6z0a3xYfiNbztr7z-g)[SEND HELP ASAP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)I'll be upfront with you - this is a Hail Mary pass, but I believe God led me to this moment for a reason.

I give you my word as a veteran and as an American: **I'll never let you down.**
My candidacy is in your hands. Will you help out an old combat vet?
Thank you,
Troy Downing _Conservative Veteran in Congress_| |

Peter,
The New York Times just published a major profile on how we split the MAGA base and forced Trump to fold with my Khanna Epstein Transparency Act. Here’s how I beat Trump:
* I’ve spent months showing up on MAGA podcasts, red-district town halls, and direct conversations with conservative voters.
* I built personal relationships across the aisle, like those with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* I listened to MAGA voters and treated them with respect, not mockery.
* I stood up against the corrupt Epstein class and for a new economic patriotism.
Washington said it wouldn’t work. But it’s working so well that Trump had to retreat .
https://www.nytimes.com/2025/11/18/opinion/ro-khanna-epstein-files-trump.html [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/11/18/opinion/ro-khanna-epstein-files-trump.html]

Dozens of Republicans were ready to defy Trump and vote for a Democratic bill until he finally reversed himself when it became clear he was losing his base on this issue.
I hope you’ll read and share the Times interview. Every time you amplify this message, it shows the country that there is a new generation of Democrats willing to listen, to fight, and to lead.

name: Pastor Lucas Miles, TPUSA Faith
subject: The Church is rising again across America
body:
This is the movement Charlie prayed for
This is our moment to build a strong, unshakable Church.

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3f602049c58a4e588915e5bd1795cf4b&_e=y2JNOA57_cZFYHvPlohlvn8-t_fRmLcDef1rFni8N-w_Az5FxR_x6tN58dOnPX0tyLWc9fWMeECdJUPNn3-dTcnY3DfZF3geK2XcQ574CVE8LiayHaZ6oKLcxHgWyQH1X63Gr-inXvGHHjDClsN465WsOBjk0Sx1gfnKs5TBs-ecEJak_Nyb1Zl9xXTHWaEUIowTiQBVExPkbxYLENjdpDPPv_H5lfqJQm_EOsqMwfSwUUAykjjReHhXWXowhYDDDAG1H_wvH9OQXxmiUfWRSyZ7X_QKSva4eM_3iM2JRjnHrFuShwcHQycpONzs67pOz6h-o8rNXQN39E9-Pp9WY_ypij3kkzQggFpmqJ_K6Q_Temdv7rpAZS3b1Z9iF_o09zyPCuDaSNDFtSJUjlrM_GZfQ8Z3F3eeFAWC2jiG-ZuJUR99gzaJiWxK94Z6BfffPp7eDsy1G7mnKGhhfyTKZ4mgie03ddxGMqDQ0kud2SE2JAlG3ELQ0ux73huLjVNbIA_Z9GdupP7w4fNRvwz7zRHLYsu6SIFQQsvR-3ngeP60XpaZbFjYwLZOGg_YthCDAlfnH38_REFGn8mlOn-sJ-AC2HMFL7wRI_2lV8TxqoYlEgY-gYXcNU815ZR1wgGpFxaWyXWy3weEcGgW6qFvCQ_LbjAkMyW3tQvCgZeVxA9b6W-sp2ysWUT1MnRZMOdOMUx0jW8TjXRDIbbYb1irAq5vO42pRApPoSoZtQC_GbVfxJHVe_J_PMG_STZHgCjgrtAUNIASpX3OT94FbkmcV5dhFLKWHoj-g33l7PWorHE%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Something remarkable is happening in America right now. People are coming back to church.Pastors are finding their courage again.And young people -- yes, _young people_ -- are opening their Bibles and asking for truth.This is exactly what **Charlie **dreamed of when he launched **TPUSA Faith.** He wanted to see a generation return to God, and a Church unafraid to preach the truth -- no matter the cost.And today, that vision is becoming reality.📈 Our church network has **doubled** , now connecting with more than ** 8,000 congregations** across America. 💥 Our online reach has **surged by 1,000%** , spreading the message of biblical truth and courage farther than ever before.🙌 And over **200,000 new people** -- pastors, parents, and America- loving young believers -- have joined this movement of faith and conviction.

name: Fideri News
subject: Welcome to the Sunday Bulletin
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Reader,

Chances are, you are familiar with at least some of our [Fideri News Network](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=eab6840238&e=b7b3eddce2) family. Now, you can experience the best of all our sites, and all in one place.

We proudly present to you our Sunday Bulletin, a weekly newsletter delivered right to your inbox to bring you articles from your favorite publications, but also introduce you to a few new ones, too.

Each Sunday morning, we aim to wake up your weekend with a round-up of our top headlines, gathering the Greater Philadelphia area’s top news from the Suburbs to the Shore, the City to the Capitol. _Broad + Liberty’s_ usual Sunday newsletter will move to Wednesdays, instead.
---
| [ ](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c3a499786f&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| [ Make Sure You Get This Week's Sunday Bulletin](https://onpattison.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cb0c43a2b0&e=b7b3eddce2 " Make Sure You Get This Week's Sunday Bulletin")
---
| Our family includes a plethora of options in the news world with a variety of media and a massive geography encompassing area sports, politics, entertainment, and news.

It can be tough to keep tabs on it all. But with a familiar Sunday newspaper look and feel, our digital newsletter summarizes the region’s top headlines right at your fingertips, gathered for your convenience, and delivered freely to your inbox.

We want to welcome you to the Fideri family, and we hope you enjoy meeting some new faces along the way. Keep an eye out too for new upcoming newsletter editions coming soon to an inbox near you!

Sincerely,
The Fideri News Network Team

_P.S. Want to be sure the Sunday Bulletin always lands in your inbox? Add News@FideriNews.com to your contacts so it never goes to spam.

You’re getting this email because you’re subscribed to one or more Fideri News Network newsletters. If you’d like to opt out of the Sunday Bulletin specifically, just email us. Heads up: clicking the "unsubscribe from the list" link below will remove you from all newsletters you’re subscribed to _

We proudly present to you our Sunday Bulletin, a weekly newsletter delivered right to your inbox to bring you articles from your favorite publications, but also introduce you to a few new ones, too. Each Sunday morning, we aim to wake up your weekend with a round-up of our top headlines, gathering the Greater Philadelphia area’s top news from the Suburbs to the Shore, the City to the Capitol. Broad + Liberty’s usual Sunday newsletter will move to Wednesdays, instead. | | " Make Sure You Get This Week's Sunday Bulletin" | Our family includes a plethora of options in the news world with a variety of media and a massive geography encompassing area sports, politics, entertainment, and news. It can be tough to keep tabs on it all. But with a familiar Sunday newspaper look and feel, our digital newsletter summarizes the region’s top headlines right at your fingertips, gathered for your convenience, and delivered freely to your inbox. We want to welcome you to the Fideri family, and we hope you enjoy meeting some new faces along the way. Keep an eye out too for new upcoming newsletter editions coming soon to an inbox near you! Sincerely, The Fideri News Network Team P.S. Want to be sure the Sunday Bulletin always lands in your inbox? Add News@FideriNews.com to your contacts so it never goes to spam. You’re getting this email because you’re subscribed to one or more Fideri News Network newsletters. If you’d like to opt out of the Sunday Bulletin specifically, just email us. Heads up: clicking the "unsubscribe from the list" link below will remove you from all newsletters you’re subscribed to | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Fideri News, All rights reserved. You signed up for emails at OnPattison.com Our mailing address is: Fideri News323 W Front St Fl 2Media, PA 19063 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . Broad and Liberty, Inc. is a Pennsylvania Domestic Nonprofit Corporation classifed as a public charity under Internal Revenue Code Section 501 (c) (3).

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: BREAKING: Federal Judges Block 18th Congressional District Redrawn Maps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e]
Friend,
We have breaking news that directly impacts our race: A Federal Court just ruled that Texas cannot use the new congressional map drawn during the recent special session for the 2026 election. Instead the state must use the 2021 map.
This is a significant victory for our community. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e&refcode2=5b4e1efc-b5c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c] The Legislature’s racially gerrymandered maps won’t be allowed to disrupt communities or undermine fair representation in 2026.
For our campaign, this ruling provides clarity: the district lines remain the same, and our path forward is unchanged. We must continue organizing, mobilizing, and reaching voters across every neighborhood in TX-18.
That is why we need your help to keep up the momentum, can you chip in $25 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e&refcode2=5b4e1efc-b5c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c]
I am running to deliver real leadership and results. Today’s decision reinforces just how important this Special Election Runoff election will be.
Now we need your help. With this ruling, the path to victory is clear, but so is the urgency. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e&refcode2=5b4e1efc-b5c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c] We’re working around the clock to reach voters and expand our volunteer operations. Every dollar helps us stay ahead at this critical moment.
Can you rush a donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake_engen?refcode=11%2F18_e&refcode2=5b4e1efc-b5c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c]
Thank you for being in this fight with us.

name: EMILYs List Campaigns
subject: Wins this month = momentum for 2026.
body:
Electing women who act decisively changes everything. Pitch in to our Take Back the Gavel Fund today. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119520301/583341074/-1510725204?sourceid=1057348&refcode=WUEFEK44_20251118_25to26_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmM4ZDg5Yy1iNmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Wf889QwKHxnqlgDcp7MiHheDLdCr8uO9gVMLuwZl3E=) Peter,

We're still riding the high from this month's victories — and we hope you are too. These wins aren't just good news for 2025. **They’re proof that the momentum is on our side heading into the 2026 midterms.** And that momentum is powered by something we've always known: when we elect women who truly get it, everything changes. [**But we need your support to help keep up the momentum, Peter. Will you chip in to our Take Back The Gavel Fund to raise $75,000 to take back power in the U.S. House in 2026?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119520308/583341078/-1510725204?sourceid=1057348&refcode=WUEFEK44_20251118_25to26_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmM4ZDg5Yy1iNmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Wf889QwKHxnqlgDcp7MiHheDLdCr8uO9gVMLuwZl3E=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119520312/583341083/-1403821653?sourceid=1057348&refcode=WUEFEK44_20251118_25to26_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmM4ZDg5Yy1iNmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Wf889QwKHxnqlgDcp7MiHheDLdCr8uO9gVMLuwZl3E=)
---
Women who understand the frustrations and struggles their communities face don't just talk about solutions — they deliver.

In New Jersey, **Governor-elect Mikie Sherrill** understands the challenges facing New Jersey families: rising utility bills, increased strain on household budgets, and concerns about public schools. On the campaign trail, she promised to act, and now, she’s preparing to call a state of emergency on utility costs.

In Michigan's 10th District, **Christina Hines** is also ready to bring her lived experience and clarity to Congress. She's the mom of young kids and a former prosecutor who spent her career defending children from abuse. She's running to protect kids' safety and freedom — and to make sure they grow up with even more rights, opportunities, and possibilities than she had.

**This is what happens when we elect Democratic pro-choice women: they get things done. And EMILYs List is the only organization built to support them every step of the way.**

Wins like the ones we saw earlier this month don’t happen by accident. They happen because this community shows up early, invests in women who deliver, and keeps pushing — even when the odds are long.

[**And right now, we need you with us again. Donate today toward to our $75,000 Take Back the Gavel Fund to make sure our 2026 candidates have the resources, support, and early backing they need to flip the House:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119520316/583341087/-1510725204?sourceid=1057348&refcode=WUEFEK44_20251118_25to26_ALL_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYmM4ZDg5Yy1iNmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Wf889QwKHxnqlgDcp7MiHheDLdCr8uO9gVMLuwZl3E=)

clean_body: Electing women who act decisively changes everything. Pitch in to our Take Back the Gavel Fund today. | = Peter, We're still riding the high from this month's victories — and we hope you are too. These wins aren't just good news for 2025. They’re proof that the momentum is on our side heading into the 2026 midterms. And that momentum is powered by something we've always known: when we elect women who truly get it, everything changes. = | = Women who understand the frustrations and struggles their communities face don't just talk about solutions — they deliver. In New Jersey, Governor-elect Mikie Sherrill understands the challenges facing New Jersey families: rising utility bills, increased strain on household budgets, and concerns about public schools. On the campaign trail, she promised to act, and now, she’s preparing to call a state of emergency on utility costs. In Michigan's 10th District, Christina Hines is also ready to bring her lived experience and clarity to Congress. She's the mom of young kids and a former prosecutor who spent her career defending children from abuse. She's running to protect kids' safety and freedom — and to make sure they grow up with even more rights, opportunities, and possibilities than she had. This is what happens when we elect Democratic pro-choice women: they get things done. And EMILYs List is the only organization built to support them every step of the way. Wins like the ones we saw earlier this month don’t happen by accident. They happen because this community shows up early, invests in women who deliver, and keeps pushing — even when the odds are long. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = – the EMILYs List Campaigns Team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

**A unique Cybertruck experiment is making waves online.**
[ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=0ba4dbbace1d486bb5bbe9b7bbf8af29&_e=WpZ_pNxgCTU6cbkxtvlXSrePObBpf9vc8VoIrECllSkb7rfVW3opAC7ujwKn15_2YG5ZG-XlCTjJAQXqJiwo8AXRiPlHEJvnJLozBNpvh6gARt3zZCB_vhx5hGYozRQrKPJffJ0DG4tmhbq10aRVOsQ2Mj3ZnzfhxkWAjsC4PC86YjsoaIB0JgCsjWlcf6ehpK_eA_bP8FS3-O6qUHvtKnqdkg6oP8swycLGVAazWpC6APuol8iv0djXvxDTS19gNGCCxXsafYIk0kPbn5Kvn3cSd5-Oz4n-Gam37fzyH4UjMZ1Y5_nlINALW7glKykAyZINrLNIwMs_KjOm8Oi5GGCmHZR0ZHhjxJZ2J2pFJWSRlXYy718wCi_BfkdBHAVaMuVKwCu0GkxBkMnTts_yPId5kUKKWuKTs9ilpuJukptLBHW1Z-NF2ZlGOz3x4gqMYI0S3hnc2OvOxtcVobMZYTLH9I87HLW1-VdYW0Zy4qGQji73OZ2yiG2JU8bezHxWdh6LNKVyQLbs9Bal_JoIfPmFvlU95feQCjaqw9lGBhoERpyvRWimboKMBNuYeNp0Z1TvYO-Ov_6wfrODvyDcJQ%3D%3D)
One participant—blindfolded and hands free—set out to trial Tesla’s newest AI feature.

No remote. No driver. No contingency.

The team watched and recorded every moment.

Then the truck engaged—driven solely by AI.

Each second was authentic, every movement captured.

Engineers and industry observers have been taken aback by the results.

It wasn’t a trick—it was a direct look at the leading edge of automotive autonomy.

Early attention is building around this breakthrough.

[Watch the video that’s prompting conversation across the tech world.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=0ba4dbbace1d486bb5bbe9b7bbf8af29&_e=WpZ_pNxgCTU6cbkxtvlXSrePObBpf9vc8VoIrECllSkb7rfVW3opAC7ujwKn15_2YG5ZG-XlCTjJAQXqJiwo8AXRiPlHEJvnJLozBNpvh6gARt3zZCB_vhx5hGYozRQrKPJffJ0DG4tmhbq10aRVOsQ2Mj3ZnzfhxkWAjsC4PC86YjsoaIB0JgCsjWlcf6ehrgem3RjDyesYppsaRrzbFiJFkIFgmwbQLKPUKLltC50fSR5Vsk6geh7MVLoFbDze4BGZCaWKLuHGAO3UYLTEOilj9mcF3qLglz__RlKmn4H8jJLUbhF16lIVxPObONk7Jre3W6wqIwfHyd91OmlH8Fm16w3KJV65UsZgDfhmqYBR1fyGJuJC8TwAH1f1e7QxGmbZ655fMfnP5s_c-DL5y2rEB2w9TkoTjSZJcdVPV_Fru9qMMfh259_tMd_fH0DbKfu9GZMDV3ASGgO_Gclg4cNoB0YoHrR6JIq-kmzGchKjIgDse4JCPbSQRlU0BYYI51jN7gryXJBCwI7hR42G_o5Mi5S8j-pM_FQFt-xJUGTxEan3GVe1muAozGyfeTWUQzKELmHDvzrxi2dgShovZg%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. clean_body: One participant—blindfolded and hands free—set out to trial Tesla’s newest AI feature.| | | | November 18 | | | | | Trusting AI: An Unforgettable Cybertruck Trial | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. One participant—blindfolded and hands free—set out to trial Tesla’s newest AI feature. No remote. No driver. No contingency. The team watched and recorded every moment. Then the truck engaged—driven solely by AI. Each second was authentic, every movement captured. Engineers and industry observers have been taken aback by the results. It wasn’t a trick—it was a direct look at the leading edge of automotive autonomy. Early attention is building around this breakthrough. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. clean_body: We need to fight back...NOW. 🚨 BREAKING: ANOTHER Republican just entered the race for Washington's 8th District 🚨 Peter, A new Republican just filed to run against Kim in WA-08. That means there are now a total of three Republicans who are trying to unseat her in the 2026 election. Right now, Republicans control the House, the Senate, and the White House–and our district has suffered drastically from their "leadership." ➡️ Our state lost out on $1 BILLION in funding for the Pacific Northwest HydroHub ➡️ Our farmers are being hit by devastating tariffs that are raising costs ➡️ Over 200,000 people are losing their healthcare in favor of tax breaks to GOP wealthy donors It was failed GOP leadership that led Kim to run for this seat in 2018 and flip it blue for the first time in history. And it's failed GOP leadership that's trying to stop her from bringing progress to WA-08. Kim is the fighter we need now, more than ever. Kim is a pediatrician, a representative who actually listens to the people in this district, and someone who has never stopped fighting to protect affordable healthcare— and we can't afford to lose her voice in Congress to the GOP's latest rubber stamp. While we still don't know the opponent Kim will be facing off against, here's one thing we do know: National Republicans will do whatever it takes to flip Kim’s seat red, so we need to be prepared for the tough fight ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Survivors deserve accountability. And everyday people deserve a government that doesn’t shield the elite. In short: people who are tired of powerful figures escaping consequence finally have someone showing up for them — **and today, Becca is that someone.** [_**Before we go any further, we need your help: Can you pitch in today to ensure Becca can keep standing up to powerful interests? We’re starting the month behind our fundraising goal, and every contribution helps us catch up.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119520795/583342333/-892689125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGZmZWYxYi1iOGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AljaapIfU2tZJns-NcLBNRK6TEOv9AJw3u-olgknzso=) **What this fight means:** When the system asks “Whose side are you on?” Becca made her answer clear. But we’re not there yet, and to keep this momentum going, we’re asking for your support today! [_**Could you click here and chip in $5, $10 or even $25? _**Nancy has a plan to put Alaska on the path to prosperity for generations to come!**_ **Strengthening our economic future** means providing certainty for entrepreneurs, Alaska's economic backbone. That means stable taxes, clear rules, workforce development, and a government that doesn’t get in the way of great jobs in the industries Alaska does best. We can't expect Alaskans to raise their families right here at home without **access to top-notch education** , regardless of zip code. We must put parents in charge, hold schools accountable while supporting teachers, and ensure that education serves as a springboard rather than a barrier. **Alaskans deserve to be confident in our elections**. That means full transparency, safeguarding every vote, and ensuring Alaskans that their voices are heard, loud and clear. And of course, protecting Alaska's promise means **honoring our veterans with support beyond words** \- fully funding veterans programs and expanding access to healthcare, job training, and mental health resources for the over 10% of Alaskans who have served. Strengthening our economic future means providing certainty for entrepreneurs, Alaska's economic backbone. That means stable taxes, clear rules, workforce development, and a government that doesn’t get in the way of great jobs in the industries Alaska does best. We can't expect Alaskans to raise their families right here at home without access to top-notch education , regardless of zip code. We must put parents in charge, hold schools accountable while supporting teachers, and ensure that education serves as a springboard rather than a barrier. Alaskans deserve to be confident in our elections. That means full transparency, safeguarding every vote, and ensuring Alaskans that their voices are heard, loud and clear. And of course, protecting Alaska's promise means honoring our veterans with support beyond words \- fully funding veterans programs and expanding access to healthcare, job training, and mental health resources for the over 10% of Alaskans who have served. This campaign isn't about headlines. Nancy Dahlstrom has spent her entire 20+ years in public service putting words into action for all Alaskans. Sincerely, Team Nancy Dahlstrom Alaska's Lt. Governor and 2026 Republican candidate for governor | | | -| | ---|---|--- Paid for by Nancy Dahlstrom For Governor P.O. Box 770725,Eagle River, Alaska 99577

Please give what you can to Laura’s campaign today. **_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119521936/583345532/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-11-18_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTUxMjIyNy1iOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zAuVtKqO1Ab3nkH9g21I8oZ-O1dP9RI3J0VKNWGTdSA=)
---
* * *
**The Big Picture**

Across the country, Democrats are gaining momentum. Recent elections in New Jersey and Virginia showed that voters are rejecting extremism and chaos.

But here on Long Island, the trend is moving in the opposite direction. Republicans are gaining ground locally, and national GOP operatives see flipping this district as one of their best opportunities to hold the House.

**Where Things Stand**
* **The Only Toss-Up in New York:** Nonpartisan analysts at The Cook Political Report continue to rate this district as the state’s only true toss-up.

* **Republican Fundraising Advantage:** Trump and national Republicans have built a record-shattering war chest. For the first time in years, Democrats are being outraised.

* **Relentless GOP Attack Ads:** Republican super PACs are already running negative ads in our district, trying to distort Laura’s record and weaken her standing early.

* **Rising GOP Strength on Long Island:** While Democrats have seen strong results nationally, local Republican gains show this race will be harder than ever to hold.

**What's At Stake**

If Republicans flip this seat, they’ll have an even stronger grip on the House and a clearer path to push their extreme agenda. But if we hold it, Democrats are one step closer to taking back the House — and exposing the corruption, chaos, and abuses of power that have defined this Republican Congress.

**What Laura Needs**

We’re building the infrastructure now to win in 2026, but it’s going to take consistent support to stay competitive. The next few months are critical to:
* Fund our field and voter contact programs

* Counter GOP attack ads already running in the district

* Build the early resources needed to compete against national Republican spending

* * *
We can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal when so much is at stake.

name: War coming home
subject: MAGA pushes for predawn special forces raid on Dem candidate
body:
MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001--3hrFN6mEAlj_x5T3zxDHF9DCG_R2OXxhnrmnPwMK9SQJ28bhvSo2Xd6ZYHenvdEwgLBjM9la8pmna_vC64iGYOF21lR2nL7HWkrz01b6Fw9PJoqUlnOWwE3F61LIV4xwS_mcRAm2p-N77WVLxwJ0kk1q-oxHo3neuTNE17DUTCz5qaJ8LnjPcofJDVYgMXIKzStVqj2yOqwo-UYqizgfengjMRnaOK&c=dy5xMo6BRJ_Nfvl1_MX7OSQovrSIO-MjfSuQM4BWPhGnBuckUrtJlA==&ch=vAIa-oxx5poM9mw20fNuT4TK4HZ0TmYo-21U7jgPEBFw3zp6F9wM_Q==)
---
|
Peter,
The notorious Chicago area Broadview ICE facility is a blacksite that has served as the beating heart of Trump's Operation Midway Blitz which saw a national guard deployment to the city, the shooting down of innocent civilians, and a dragnet roundup that saw arrests of undocumented Chicagoans and black and brown US citizens alike.
Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared from this facility.
This is why this fall myself and hundreds of my peers gathered in front of the facility to protest against ICE and the Trump administration's fascist crackdown. In response ICE rammed a car through the crowd of protestors and tear gassed us. I was hit by the car as well as teargassed.
In response to the video I shared of ICE's crackdown against protestors, MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US citizen.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001--3hrFN6mEAlj_x5T3zxDHF9DCG_R2OXxhnrmnPwMK9SQJ28bhvSo2Xd6ZYHenvdEwgLBjM9la8pmna_vC64iGYOF21lR2nL7HWkrz01b6Fw9PJoqUlnOWwE3F61LIV4xwS_mcRAm2p-N77WVLxwJ0kk1q-oxHo3neuTNE17DUTCz5qaJ8LnjPcofJDVYgMXIKzStVqj2yOkdkfL1RC6xJfdkPaF3Len&c=dy5xMo6BRJ_Nfvl1_MX7OSQovrSIO-MjfSuQM4BWPhGnBuckUrtJlA==&ch=vAIa-oxx5poM9mw20fNuT4TK4HZ0TmYo-21U7jgPEBFw3zp6F9wM_Q==)
---
What he called for is disgusting, unAmerican, and evidence of our gruesome foreign wars coming home to American soil.
The War on Terror has conditioned millions of Americans to think of Muslims as terrorists. And the answers to terrorists: solutions like pre-dawn special forces raids and Guantanamo style solitary confinement and suspension of habeas corpus.
I am fighting to end America's blood soaked foreign policy. The uptick in violence in our country, the militarization of our police, the dehumanization of non-white Americans, all of it can be traced back to what we've done abroad and now we are witnessing what happens when that violence inevitably comes home.
Because IL-09 is a deep blue seat MAGA knows that they can't win here with a GOP candidate. Instead, ultra-MAGA donors and donors to the Trump aligned AIPAC organization are pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into my primary opponents campaign coffers in the hopes of having a Democrat in Congress who will collaborate, support Trump's wars, and do MAGA's bidding.
[We can't let MAGA neutralize this seat, we need to make sure Chicago elects a real Democrat who will fight the administration tooth and nail. Please can you rush a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 to ensure the real Democrat comes out on top in this primary?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001--3hrFN6mEAlj_x5T3zxDHF9DCG_R2OXxhnrmnPwMK9SQJ28bhvSo2Xd6ZYHenvdsXoc2B-zgUQcJMExW3m8cN4NYNOc9RdEQbbwxFPfNfueBGUZtpCwp0Gpkd6HEsWM3K2auChiG4Cr6IaLyssKCakrpkbhnyn6YRdvWOVja0-eJnHCGMXGsAxLPO5bdaRXXYRpk3uhXEj1D_V2qPRmgxzlUpo9_pSeZ99p2DfatHA=&c=dy5xMo6BRJ_Nfvl1_MX7OSQovrSIO-MjfSuQM4BWPhGnBuckUrtJlA==&ch=vAIa-oxx5poM9mw20fNuT4TK4HZ0TmYo-21U7jgPEBFw3zp6F9wM_Q==)

clean_body: MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US | | | | | == | Peter, The notorious Chicago area Broadview ICE facility is a blacksite that has served as the beating heart of Trump's Operation Midway Blitz which saw a national guard deployment to the city, the shooting down of innocent civilians, and a dragnet roundup that saw arrests of undocumented Chicagoans and black and brown US citizens alike. Migrants are being tortured, deprived of food and water, and disappeared from this facility. This is why this fall myself and hundreds of my peers gathered in front of the facility to protest against ICE and the Trump administration's fascist crackdown. In response ICE rammed a car through the crowd of protestors and tear gassed us. I was hit by the car as well as teargassed. In response to the video I shared of ICE's crackdown against protestors, MAGA pundit and pardoned January 6th insurrectionist Ryan Nichols called me a terrorist and demanded a special forces style pre-dawn raid against my home and that I be deprived of all rights as a US citizen. | == What he called for is disgusting, unAmerican, and evidence of our gruesome foreign wars coming home to American soil. The War on Terror has conditioned millions of Americans to think of Muslims as terrorists. And the answers to terrorists: solutions like pre-dawn special forces raids and Guantanamo style solitary confinement and suspension of habeas corpus. I am fighting to end America's blood soaked foreign policy. The uptick in violence in our country, the militarization of our police, the dehumanization of non-white Americans, all of it can be traced back to what we've done abroad and now we are witnessing what happens when that violence inevitably comes home. Because IL-09 is a deep blue seat MAGA knows that they can't win here with a GOP candidate. Instead, ultra-MAGA donors and donors to the Trump aligned AIPAC organization are pumping hundreds of thousands of dollars into my primary opponents campaign coffers in the hopes of having a Democrat in Congress who will collaborate, support Trump's wars, and do MAGA's bidding. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Ending the American empire is the only way we save the American republic. | == Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

subject: Hi, null! It’s me, Bailey 🐾
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm lending a paw to help Haley win this ruff and tumble race

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)
