[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8891?t=3&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)
**WOOF! WOOF! HI, HUMAN PERSON! 🐾
**
**It’s me,****Bailey the dog!** I’m a very good girl, a treat expert, and a proud campaign pup. My mom is Katelyn, Haley Stevens’ finance director. That means she stares at spreadsheets all day while I nap (priorities, obviously 🐶💤).
But between belly rubs, I’ve picked up some impawtant info:
🐾 **Michigan is one of the biggest Senate races in the country.** All eyes (and ears!) are on us.

🐾 **Haley has the best shot of ANY Democrat to win.** The polls say so.

🐾 **And Haley herself? She’s like me – tough, loyal, and totally pawsome at protecting the people she loves.** 🐕💙
That’s why I’m begging: **[Will you chip in $5 today to help Team Haley flip the Senate and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8892?t=4&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8891?t=5&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)
---
If you donate today, I get extra pets! And most importantly, you’ll help one of my favorite humans, Haley, win this ruff and tumble race.
Thanks fur everything,

Bailey 🐾
(on behalf of my mom, Katelyn, and the whole Team Haley pack!)
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8893?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/8890?t=7&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1388%2E49239%2EhzAa-C)

Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
There are 3 things you need to know about me:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tec402ccb-9dad-45aa-ab8c-f2c34731532b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Hi Peter, There are 3 things you need to know about me:
1. When I was 10 years old, getting sworn in as a US citizen, I first took an oath to support our Constitution. I took it again as a diplomat standing up to dictators like Putin, and again serving New Jersey in the House of Representatives.
2. In the House, I fought for affordable health care, infrastructure, and jobs, while standing up for our common values. I took on corruption, and the harm Big Tech does to our democracy and our kids. I was the first swing district Democrat in America to call for Trump’s impeachment after he extorted Ukraine.
3. I’m running in the quick special election to fill Mikie Sherrill’s House seat, now that she’s been elected New Jersey governor. This will be the first and likely only special House election of 2026. It is the next race we have to win to turn the country around, and will set the table for next year’s midterms.

[This will be a competitive race, and I need your help today, Peter. Will you split a donation of $10 or anything you can between me and Blue Amp Action today to help kickstart my campaign for Congress?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb92732e0-ca9b-4ad5-bf6a-b08e7acdf89d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $10](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70fc17aa-e781-4bb2-9d59-a4a7deb5fae5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf080d987-2cd5-4751-beb0-cec0b8dde632/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tda6fe5ff-c12c-4a46-82e7-66a857266350/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE MORE](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b9a21bc-f738-43af-9c33-651ce0e427da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Our democratic values are under renewed attack by an authoritarian President and his enablers every single day. Our future depends on electing a Congress that will claw back its Constitutional powers and fulfill its Constitutional responsibilities — and that requires not just fewer Republicans, but more Democrats with the experience and inclination to fight. The fight ahead won’t be easy. But it starts here, in the first Congressional election of 2026, and likely the only special election before the midterms. Whoever wins will gain momentum going into November. The whole country will be watching the results. This fight will set the tone for the rest of this presidency, and it begins now. [Can you chip in $10 or any amount today to help my campaign and Blue Amp Action today? Together, we can make sure we’re still governed by our Constitution, not a wannabe king.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7304b526-a633-4a5e-aaef-fcfe76ca0420/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Tom [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T581b5e96-daf7-4df3-a9ad-f2e08f3fc4f4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T251273d4-7434-496a-bf82-ebac01d4264f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)| Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| |
| **Blue Amp Action**
PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampaction.salsalabs.org/loc_em_fr_20251118_malinowski-things_b2_f1_s1_c1_warmup_rs-t0?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade, it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in a democracy, not a dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc38979ee-814a-461d-b21d-e48f26baf474/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Paid for by Blue Amp Action
---

---

name: Jon Ossoff for Georgia
subject: Absolutely pummeled

body:
Friends, As you read this, Jon Ossoff is getting absolutely pummeled by attack ads in Georgia. Republicans have spent more than _$10 million_ on TV and online already. It’s ridiculous. Why so much money, this far from Election Day? Because Jon Ossoff is the only Democratic Senator running for reelection in a state won by Trump. _That_ is why Republicans are hitting him so hard, so early in the campaign. _And it’s why we’re coming to you with this request to help fight back._ If Jon is going to defend this seat, we _really_ need to keep hitting our fundraising goals, and donations to emails like this are a huge part of how it happens. [_**Can Jon Ossoff count on you to contribute $5, $50 or whatever you can afford to help him lay the foundation for a winning Senate reelection campaign here in Georgia? Your donation will be split between his and John Hickenlooper’s reelection campaigns.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119522864/583348587/723805127?refcode=email_111825_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU0MzBkYy1iOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqOpbKkmX4f3-4b8xR2TlCLVYzXvecca2U3taEMl5bc=) | | [_DONATE NOW_ →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119522867/583348589/723805127?refcode=email_111825_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU0MzBkYy1iOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqOpbKkmX4f3-4b8xR2TlCLVYzXvecca2U3taEMl5bc=)
---
We wish we didn’t have to ask at all, but _Citizens United_ opened the dam for limitless dark money to flood into our elections.
_That’s a big part of why Congress is broken and corrupted. It’s why we have really expensive elections._
And also it’s why campaigns like ours have to build serious grassroots fundraising operations _from the very start._
Because if we don’t, we run the risk of our message getting drowned out by a flood of Super PAC spending.
So here’s the truth:
**Jon needs our help _today_.**
_He is literally MAGA’s #1 target._
They will spare no expense and try every dirty trick in the book.
So yes, this election will be tough.
But this team knows how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
Let’s do it again.
[_**Please, use this link to support Jon Ossoff and John Hickenlooper’s reelection campaigns. Every donation counts. Every donation sends a powerful message to MAGA that we’re ready to fight and win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119522869/583348592/723805127?refcode=email_111825_ossoff&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTU0MzBkYy1iOWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqOpbKkmX4f3-4b8xR2TlCLVYzXvecca2U3taEMl5bc=)

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: You gotta see this...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Patriot,
I've got some good news: our campaign just launched our new website and it looks great. It's the center stage for getting our message out, refuting lies from Tony, and getting volunteers connected to our team.
It also makes supporting our campaign much easier since we can now accept Apple Pay and GPay.
A great way to check it out is by making a donation to our campaign while also earning your chance to win the first ever AKG Occam Warfighter that I made with my own hands in my shop in San Antonio. This rifle, chambered in 7.62x39, features an Occam Defense rail, folding stock, and a suppressor-ready muzzle brake.
Every $5 you donate earns you one entry, so $20 gets you four entries and $100 earns you twenty entries.
Donate here at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/IM27QShsSvO6gUXqXdIu3w/wsT8zXYLr7H40yQYr0QQcA) and then check out the rest of the site.
Thanks for all your support.
Respectfully,

Brandon Herrera

Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee

[Unsubscribe here](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/unsubscribe/M3dKmjvhR8CwRJ801N0zlTlDygVorb8PbaawXpI4LLQ/GHbxLUJHhGugn7635ZCyW3rg/wsT8zXYLr7H40yQYr0QQcA)

|
---
| |
# Fun Fact of the Month
---
Pacific wrens are the forest's tiny fast-talkers, able to sing over 30 notes per second. Good luck attempting a duet!Hear the wren's call and more [amazing bird songs of the redwoods](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119523111/583349305/-1405979501?utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rm_11182025&sourceid=1168277&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MTlkMWI4LWJhYzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WDTtFm8Dw0cjmrK7T4aL5RBcEuklzSx_2LgYL1wiTgk=&emci=3935b641-b5c1-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7719d1b8-bac4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551).
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119523112/583349306/-1405979501?utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rm_11182025&sourceid=1168277&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MTlkMWI4LWJhYzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WDTtFm8Dw0cjmrK7T4aL5RBcEuklzSx_2LgYL1wiTgk=&emci=3935b641-b5c1-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7719d1b8-bac4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551)
---
Photo by [Sunny/Flickr](https://click.everyaction.com/k/119523113/583349312/523034371?utm_source=ea-rm&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rm_11182025&sourceid=1168277&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9TVFJXTC9TVFJXTC8xLzg5NTc0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc3MTlkMWI4LWJhYzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WDTtFm8Dw0cjmrK7T4aL5RBcEuklzSx_2LgYL1wiTgk=&emci=3935b641-b5c1-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=7719d1b8-bac4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1504551).
---

clean_body: Redwood Matters: News and stories from Save the Redwoods League| | | | | | | Redwood Matters November 18, 2025 REDWOOD RESILIENCE FUND This is what resilience looks like In times of change, we have the power to heal our forests and strengthen our communities—knowing that together we can weather any storm. | | | | COMMUNITY "I don't want this hike to end" We invited Central Valley groups to explore the giant sequoias and help shape outdoor programs at Alder Creek. | | THANKSGIVING Why redwoods deserve a shout-out The ultimate "giving trees," redwoods clean our air and water, lift our spirits, protect our planet, and so much more. | | | | STEWARDSHIP The apprentice's toolkit It takes careful training to survey a rugged and remote redwood forest. Plus a whole lot of fascinating gear. | | | Fun Fact of the Month Pacific wrens are the forest's tiny fast-talkers, able to sing over 30 notes per second. Good luck attempting a duet!Hear the wren's call and more . Photo by . | | Ready to be part of something big? | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

**In politics, it's always a good idea to follow the money, and the Americans for Prosperity Alliance points right to billionaires who use the group to secure their interests.

Since 2022, this billionaire-led super PAC has spent around $1 MILLION to keep Mariannette Miller-Meeks in Congress.** Just recently, one of their billionaire investor's companies bought a fertilizer plant in our district. Experts are saying this plant will decrease competition, drive up fertilizer prices, and eat into our local farmers' profits. But special interests like this are banking on Miller-Meeks winning the election and giving their team free rein. They know she fights for her billionaire and corporate donors, not for Iowans.

We deserve better than a representative who lets the wealthy buy her elections and barely lifts a finger to help her constituents.

**[We can help Christina stand up to this dark money by spreading her message and proving she's the right candidate to help bring a brighter future for IA-01. But we need to act fast. = In politics, it's always a good idea to follow the money, and the Americans for Prosperity Alliance points right to billionaires who use the group to secure their interests. Since 2022, this billionaire-led super PAC has spent around $1 MILLION to keep Mariannette Miller-Meeks in Congress. Just recently, one of their billionaire investor's companies bought a fertilizer plant in our district. Experts are saying this plant will decrease competition, drive up fertilizer prices, and eat into our local farmers' profits. But special interests like this are banking on Miller-Meeks winning the election and giving their team free rein. They know she fights for her billionaire and corporate donors, not for Iowans. We deserve better than a representative who lets the wealthy buy her elections and barely lifts a finger to help her constituents. = Thank you, Team Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. _** [**"Trump defends Saudi crown price, who US intelligence found ordered killing of Washington Post columnist”_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70080?t=3&akid=23636%2E4449941%2EzA-7B9) [ **Sign NOW to stand with the free press against Trump’s attacks → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70080?t=4&akid=23636%2E4449941%2EzA-7B9) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70080?t=5&akid=23636%2E4449941%2EzA-7B9)

* * *
Team – Trump’s constant attacks on the free press have been RELENTLESS...

–He’s **THREATENED** to PULL _MSNBC_ off the air.
–He **BANNED** the _Associated Press_ from White House Press Briefings.
–He **MOCKED** a reporter and called her "piggy" for simply asking a question about the Epstein files.
–And now, Trump is **DEFENDING** the[** _Saudi Crown Prince who ordered a Washington Post Columnist to be killed!!!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70080?t=7&akid=23636%2E4449941%2EzA-7B9)

Donald Trump is attacking reporters and news outlets like the _Associated Press, MSNBC,_ and the _New York Times_ because they report the **TRUTH,** not just what Trump wants people to know.

**Seriously, team:**[**It has never been more important to stand up for the free press. ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/70080?t=8&akid=23636%2E4449941%2EzA-7B9)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It isn’t easy
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, time away from my family.
#

Friend —
Back when I first decided to run for U.S. Senate, I knew it wouldn’t be easy. I knew there’d be a ton of travel, events, time spent on the phone, and time away from my family.
You have to face millions and millions of dollars in attack ads during the campaign, and square off against corporate special interests and the wealthy and powerful when you’re in office.
You have to watch the president and his supporters attack you and try to convince the country you’re some kind of terrible person, or even a traitor to the country you served your whole life.
And you have to hope that millions of people you might never meet will see all of that and still have your back.
That’s why your support means so much to me. And it’s why I tell you so often that I can’t do this without you. Contributions of $5 or $10 from grassroots supporters are by far the largest source of donations we have.
None of this happens without you. It really means a lot to me. And it’s why I’m coming around to this request:
[**Please, can you make a donation of $3?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-nov25/.mVeyuq&refcode=em251118-1-800k&t=1&akid=6247%2E6688874%2EkAmLPR)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

subject: Help me empower young people
body:
---
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e19249968/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvN0p4R0Z4NFY5Yw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTg/LbmNsNFpMUzdiUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNFbThTakIwVG1lalBscw/gaRzVtw/sdldc33fb1e)
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |

[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) Patriot,

I learned firsthand how our culture despises achievement and wishes to destroy anyone willing to challenge the status quo, big government, or the Fake News media machine.

When I was ousted from Project Veritas, two big things (one you haven’t heard about) happened to me.

FIRST: The media launched a vicious smear campaign against me like I’ve never seen before. **Make no mistake:** _They identified this as an opportunity to “cancel” me forever_ and tried everything in their power to destroy me and everything I’ve ever stood for.

They failed.

SECOND: I received an OVERWHELMING amount of support from patriots across the country. These brave men and women defended me, but more importantly, they stood up for the principles of liberty and free speech.

**One of my top supporters was The Atlas Society.**

Jennifer Grossman, the CEO of The Atlas Society, proudly stood by my side and even invited me to speak with a gathering of the organization’s top student leaders about free speech and how Howard Roark, the fictional hero of _The Fountainhead_ by Ayn Rand, remains my inspiration to act with integrity.

Which is why I am personally reaching out to you.

I told Jennifer I would help The Atlas Society raise $25,000 in the next 48 hours by personally contacting my online supporters. [Please consider making an URGENT donation of any amount to The Atlas Society by clicking here.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
[Donate >>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Let me tell you more about The Atlas Society and how they are fundamentally changing the direction of our country.

_I will also tell you HOW The Atlas Society is spreading its message in what I consider one of the most innovative methods I’ve EVER seen a nonprofit organization engage in before._

_**_So keep reading_!**_

My mentor, Andrew Breitbart, reminds us that politics is downstream from culture. But what is culture downstream from? Answer: Philosophy. That’s where The Atlas Society shines, engaging young people with the virtues of reason, achievement, and benevolent self-interest in wildly creative, artistic ways.

Have you ever read Ayn Rand’s _Atlas Shrugged_ or _The Fountainhead_?

These books changed how I saw the world and my role in it.

But they are 700+ pages long!

**Jennifer shared this terrifying statistic with me:** Daily reading of books among young people has fallen from 70% in the late 1970s to 12% today.

So, how do we preserve Rand’s role as the greatest all-time recruiter for liberty? That’s where The Atlas Society gets creative! They leverage art and technology to create programming for “ _skimmers, swimmers, and deep divers_.”
**Skimmers:** Social media memes and animated videos — every single one of their 50 posts a week gets 40K comments, shares, and likes. The “Draw My Life” videos on concepts like Capitalism, Property Rights, and Free Speech reach MILLIONS of viewers. Links invite young people on a journey for deeper intellectual exploration.

**Swimmers:** Graphic novel adaptations of Ayn Rand’s shorter books, Pocket Guides that distill big concepts like Postmodernism and Socialism into a 90-minute read. Weekly podcasts with top entrepreneurs and thought-leaders, and discussion groups like “Morals & Markets.”

**Deep Divers:** They recruited an all-star academic faculty of philosophers and economists who guide students on a deeper study of Rand’s philosophy, publish independent work, and provide programming at their summer conference for students (the Galt’s Gulch Summit, where I spoke!).
Jennifer and The Atlas Society are accomplishing great things for our country, and I hope you will be one of the FIRST supporters of mine to make a donation and help me reach our $25,000 goal. Please use one of these links to donate:
[Donate $10 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $35 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $50 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $100 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $250 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $500 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate $1,000 >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

[Donate Any Amount >>>](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
Ultimately, here is what The Atlas Society is fighting FOR:
* Free market capitalism
* Rational self-interest
* Respect for achievement and success
* Free speech
* The future of young people and our great country

And here is what The Atlas Society is fighting AGAINST:
* Cancel Culture
* Our Educational system indoctrinating young people to embrace socialism
* Our sick culture that demonizes success and embraces twisted ideas
* Big government

I am inviting you to support The Atlas Society with a donation of ANY amount.

As a personal favor to me, please make your donation within the next 48 hours so I can help Jennifer reach our goal of $25,000.

[Here is the link to donate one more time.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Thank you for everything,

James O’Keefe

P.S. Here is a picture of me speaking with The Atlas Society’s top student leaders.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.) These students inspire me. Sadly, young people are learning to embrace socialism, reject critical thinking skills, and shed their creativity.

Well, NOT these students.

The Atlas Society is teaching students that they CAN accomplish great things, become leaders, and inspire others to do the same.

[Please take action by making a donation to The Atlas Society today. You can click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $500, $1,000, or ANY amount.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

Thank you,

James

_The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible._

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e19249968/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTExMTg/LbmNsNFpMUzdiUQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNFbThTakIwVG1lalBscw/gaRzVtw/s3m63975fb1)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: Sorry to be so direct
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
Hey Derek, it’s Jon. I’m respectfully asking: **[Can you split a donation of $10 to my reelection campaign and Adam Schiff today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs-em-ossoff.OVupfh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9201%2E5257348%2EjJAw9p)**
Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule.
And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won.
That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re _already_ spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me.
**_There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021._**
So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.**
**[If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Adam Schiff today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9201%2E5257348%2EjJAw9p)**
The campaign will be brutal.
_But this team wins the hardest battles._
We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible.
Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority.
And we will win again — with your help.
**[Please: send $10 to my reelection campaign and Adam Schiff today.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=abs-em-ossoff.OVupfh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=9201%2E5257348%2EjJAw9p)**
With gratitude,
Senator Jon Ossoff
[DONATE NOW](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20251118_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=9201%2E5257348%2EjJAw9p)
---
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

body:
| | | Peter, In just two weeks, we have an opportunity to flip a congressional seat and make Republicans’ already razor-thin margin in the House of Representatives even smaller. **Tennessee State Rep. Aftyn Behn — a proven champion for working people — is running in a special election against a MAGA Republican who’s been backed by the Bezos family and extremist election-buying billionaire Jeffrey Yass. 1** Aftyn isn’t taking corporate PAC money, and she’s not bankrolled by special interests. Her campaign to make our communities affordable and protect our human rights relies on people like you, pitching in $10 or whatever you can to help share her message in the final two weeks of this election. **[Can we count on your support as we work to flip this House seat and send a Working Families champion to DC? Aftyn Behn has dedicated her life to making this country work for the many, not the few. As a rural organizer and State Representative, she has won important victories for the people of Tennessee, helping to pass legislation to rebuild distressed communities and win a First Amendment case protecting reproductive freedoms. **Aftyn understands the crisis that our neighbors are facing as the cost of living keeps going up, and she is laser-focused on real solutions that would put money in the pockets of working people — not the billionaires who are working so hard to oppose her.** This election won’t be easy. Tennessee Republicans gerrymandered Aftyn’s district in 2022 to disenfranchise Democratic and Black voters in the Nashville area. But Trump and his corrupt, incompetent Republican Party have voters mad — and now, Trump faces a 55% disapproval rating in a district he won by double digits in 2024. clean_body: | | | Peter, In just two weeks, we have an opportunity to flip a congressional seat and make Republicans’ already razor-thin margin in the House of Representatives even smaller. Tennessee State Rep. Aftyn Behn — a proven champion for working people — is running in a special election against a MAGA Republican who’s been backed by the Bezos family and extremist election-buying billionaire Jeffrey Yass. 1 Aftyn isn’t taking corporate PAC money, and she’s not bankrolled by special interests. Her campaign to make our communities affordable and protect our human rights relies on people like you, pitching in $10 or whatever you can to help share her message in the final two weeks of this election. Aftyn Behn has dedicated her life to making this country work for the many, not the few. As a rural organizer and State Representative, she has won important victories for the people of Tennessee, helping to pass legislation to rebuild distressed communities and win a First Amendment case protecting reproductive freedoms. Aftyn understands the crisis that our neighbors are facing as the cost of living keeps going up, and she is laser-focused on real solutions that would put money in the pockets of working people — not the billionaires who are working so hard to oppose her. This election won’t be easy. Tennessee Republicans gerrymandered Aftyn’s district in 2022 to disenfranchise Democratic and Black voters in the Nashville area. But Trump and his corrupt, incompetent Republican Party have voters mad — and now, Trump faces a 55% disapproval rating in a district he won by double digits in 2024. What’s more, the nationwide progressive sweeps in elections two weeks ago show that voters across the country are ready to hear how we’ll work to protect their communities from billionaire greed and government corruption. We have a real shot to win this, Peter. But we can’t do it without you. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Tennessean, September 30, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Peter,
Lauren Boebert is among the most vulnerable Republicans in the entire nation.
Her personal life is in shambles and frequently explodes into public view.
She was forced to flee her old district and move hundreds of miles across Colorado after her grasp on the old one became untenable and is seen as a carpetbagger in the new one.
She just reported her lowest ever fundraising numbers last quarter, $110k, huge for a county dog catchers race but abysmal for a sitting member of Congress. And now even Trump is on the cusp of abandoning her.
And then there is what many are calling her problem from hell (or from heaven if you look at it the way we do 😇) her Democratic opponent:
Trisha Calvarese.
Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county.
She's vulnerable and can be easily beaten but only if we get the tidal wave of small dollar support that a challenge like this requires. [The best way you can help us is with a monthly contribution of $25, $10, or whatever amount is meaningful to you to beat Boebert, flip this seat, and take back the House for Democrats. Can we count on you to chip in?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ABaIfDZKtw-6RBRhMBBqxUZ1EJ9VZDQRabz5q_36MLDe2nLj-4_H-hKEUzLN4hLvQQkV7tfFcG6ix8veFmSZrxW-Sf7HPBG0IEZUg6RvxX50favdG9aCP8eJtlpfPrPjCv7HHtQXTWJKwTafXrs6TMTIzKEzNUEbtawON4BDlPRpkuJyLBmvwgd6R71KxxIBDuhqhRoo_jF0btSj6K81pInlBpXZdz0kbh38zJCjAI294jqESWDIqA==&c=UsKL_Xz_1k6O5gxAtK_tS-99dhBuhLDm6L9-Rem6hLPegW3QNLQFrw==&ch=ZX9Jw-BXpvDKqcFJzI7K8aCQhvJYjZc8wVtfXHh-N0dnsZ5tVYaLtw==)

Her personal life is in shambles and frequently explodes into public view. She was forced to flee her old district and move hundreds of miles across Colorado after her grasp on the old one became untenable and is seen as a carpetbagger in the new one. She just reported her lowest ever fundraising numbers last quarter, $110k, huge for a county dog catchers race but abysmal for a sitting member of Congress. And now even Trump is on the cusp of abandoning her. And then there is what many are calling her problem from hell (or from heaven if you look at it the way we do 😇) her Democratic opponent: Trisha Calvarese. Boebert is only in Congress because of just 546 votes. In 2024, Trisha had the best performance a Democrat has ever had in this district - overperforming Kamala Harris by 6 pts while Boebert embarrassingly underperformed Trump in every county. name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Texas Map Decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Today, a three-judge panel in El Paso considering the case of LULAC v. Abbott issued a preliminary injunction prohibiting the use of the congressional map the Texas Legislature passed and Governor Greg Abbott signed into law in 2025 in the 2026 elections.
The court reached the right result in its decision to prevent the new Texas congressional map from going into effect for the 2026 elections.
The evidence before the court made clear that race drove Texas’s mid-decade redistricting efforts from start to finish. In reaching its conclusion, the court found that the Plaintiff groups have shown a likelihood of success on their racial-gerrymandering challenges to the 2025 map.
The 2025 map should offend every Texan—no matter who they vote for—because it betrays the fundamental principle that Texans should have a say in our government.
This ruling is an important victory, and I am grateful to the dedicated team of lawyers and citizens who have worked tirelessly for this result. There is much more work to do to ensure that we have fair maps in Texas and across the United States, in the courts and in the Congress, and I am committed to continuing to be a partner and leader in this fight.
Thank you to everyone on #TeamLizzie who have supported the effort for fair maps—from contributing to the Texas Justice and Education Fund to testifying before the Texas Legislature. Our work is not done—but today we are grateful to see what we can accomplish when we work together.
Together we can do anything,

# [Trump's DOJ Turned the Grand Jury Into a Puppet Show](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179182629&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTgyNjI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1MDA3MzQsImV4cCI6MTc2NjA5MjczNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SNG_NP7gVZReMc3glBodKUJlyHs2qFZP4Rh0DBIWICg)
### A blistering judicial order reveals how Bondi and Halligan botched the Comey prosecution with political stunts, legal errors, and MAGA theater.
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Nov 18
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179182629&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTgyNjI5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MzUwMDczNCwiZXhwIjoxNzY2MDkyNzM0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.33-Q7iN_tCjSEmMnjCyueK0w-1-WaGgXSwlK-XlIyPA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=179182629&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc5MTgyNjI5LCJpYXQiOjE3NjM1MDA3MzQsImV4cCI6MTc2NjA5MjczNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SNG_NP7gVZReMc3glBodKUJlyHs2qFZP4Rh0DBIWICg&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45955b99-8a43-4d71-9391-93c7df248e22?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1bffa3af-a8c4-4d90-ad59-3e5a03f461f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0d15e52-db30-4fdd-a11f-0ff062906e56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
A federal judge recently laid into Donald Trump's Justice Department with all the subtlety of a bulldozer, calling Pam Bondi's DOJ's work in the James Comey indictment a "disturbing pattern of profound investigative missteps."
Magistrate Judge William Fitzpatrick ordered federal prosecutors to hand over _all_ the grand jury materials to Comey's defense.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/872e9139-041d-4749-a53d-4ff6afd51571?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Why? Because the judge writes there were "fundamental misstatements of the law" made to the grand jurors -- by a prosecutor who appears to have treated her audience as children too dull to grasp the most basic constitutional principles.
Worse, the judge found "irregularities" in the grand jury transcript and evidence that prosecutor Lindsey Halligan used attorney-client communications that are privileged and off limits. In short, the grand jury process was so flawed that Halligan may have tainted and poisoned the entire case.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0f7896be-4948-4f9b-a485-868e881c1a7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You may recall that Halligan, a former Trump White House aide, with _no prior prosecutorial experience_ , was plucked and installed just days before Comey's indictment. Halligan's predecessor as U.S. attorney felt the Comey case was so weak that he quit rather than pursue the charges. And no lawyers who stayed in the 100 person U.S. Attorney's Office for the Eastern District of Virginia were willing to join Halligan in seeking the indictment or in signing it.
* * *
Free Shuster! (In your inbox. It's not like we're holding him hostage or something.)
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.efc8R5mZ3XKpHmvhXCYD2fLX6Xl_1TfIp5pg2XUHV30?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179182629)
* * *
Comey's team is now urging that the case be dismissed, partly on the grounds that Halligan's elevation to U.S. Attorney was not only legally dubious but also political motivated.
Magistrate Judge William Fitzpatrick seems open to that argument.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fdcf2c54-2a31-4ce7-b221-0166adbfae02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0d15e52-db30-4fdd-a11f-0ff062906e56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He just warned that the procedural and substantive irregularities involving Halligan may have "undermined the integrity of the grand jury proceeding." The judge said it is not simply a technicality, it is in his judgment, a possible case of government misconduct, one that prejudices Comey.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c61b19c5-30b0-4313-b11c-14cf828becb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In other words, the Department of Justice has taken a hallowed instrument of our court system, the grand jury, and used it as a toy, spinning a grotesque claim about James Comey for the edification of no one but Lindsey Halligan, Pam Bondi, and Donald Trump.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/106b19c8-d367-4cf1-b748-db7e48464b4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Halligan and her bosses are defending her actions with the bureaucratic equivalent of a magician's flourish. They say that Halligan's appointment was a "retroactive designation" from the Attorney General, as if a piece of paper could transform incompetence into authority. Clever? Perhaps. Legal? Possibly. Ethical? Not in the least. And the audacity is off the charts. The U.S. Department of Justice is supposed to uphold the law, not engage in god-awful abuses of grand jury protocols and federal rules of criminal procedure.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f42a2c6-0b47-4669-a1d1-de01003f9cc9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, James Comey faces charges of lying to Congress -- a charge that may or may not hold water, depending entirely on one's interpretation of the labyrinthine questions asked and the obscure answers given. But the real story is not Comey's alleged lie; it is the horrific machinery of justice turned inside out, the Trumpian goons prosecution blunders elevated to the level of policy, the grand jury treated like a children's puppet theater.
Under Trump, one begins to suspect his DOJ views the Constitution, with its ponderous clauses and arcane restrictions, not as a manual to protect liberty, but as a document that provides endless opportunities for MAGA power grabs and self-parody.
* * *
Blue Amp Media is building a movement for 2026, and you're invited.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.efc8R5mZ3XKpHmvhXCYD2fLX6Xl_1TfIp5pg2XUHV30?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=179182629)
* * *
As Judge Fitzpatrick has noted, the prosecution blunders in the Comey case do not appear to be mere technical errors. They are a series of intentional political spectacles, demonstrating how power may be dressed in the robes of justice and paraded as virtue, while corrupt practitioners like Bondi and Halligan tumble and bumble with unholy glee. The American people, with our admirable if often misplaced faith in institutions, are expected to sit politely, applaud when told to do so, and ignore the Trump clowns tossing legal briefs like water balloons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1f534f88-c61a-4649-bd5e-4d9e1508de06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the end, what we have under Trump is a Department of Justice that has forgotten what it is supposed to be. It is neither impartial nor dignified; it is mischievous, erratic, and frequently malicious. The Trump DOJ treats the law as a toy, the courts as a stage, and the public as an audience to be manipulated and misled.
If there is one lesson we can draw from this sad spectacle, it is that justice, in Trump's America, is no longer a principle. It is a performance. And in this theater, the joke is not on the prosecutors, the judges, the grand juries or the defendants. The joke is on the nation itself.
Thankfully, a federal judge is not laughing. He is sounding the alarm.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b0d15e52-db30-4fdd-a11f-0ff062906e56?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

Magistrate Judge William Fitzpatrick seems open to that argument. | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- He just warned that the procedural and substantive irregularities involving Halligan may have "undermined the integrity of the grand jury proceeding." The judge said it is not simply a technicality, it is in his judgment, a possible case of government misconduct, one that prejudices Comey. | | ---|---|--- In other words, the Department of Justice has taken a hallowed instrument of our court system, the grand jury, and used it as a toy, spinning a grotesque claim about James Comey for the edification of no one but Lindsey Halligan, Pam Bondi, and Donald Trump. | | ---|---|--- Halligan and her bosses are defending her actions with the bureaucratic equivalent of a magician's flourish. They say that Halligan's appointment was a "retroactive designation" from the Attorney General, as if a piece of paper could transform incompetence into authority. Clever? Perhaps. Legal? Possibly. Ethical? Not in the least. And the audacity is off the charts. The U.S. Department of Justice is supposed to uphold the law, not engage in god-awful abuses of grand jury protocols and federal rules of criminal procedure. | | ---|---|--- Meanwhile, James Comey faces charges of lying to Congress -- a charge that may or may not hold water, depending entirely on one's interpretation of the labyrinthine questions asked and the obscure answers given. But the real story is not Comey's alleged lie; it is the horrific machinery of justice turned inside out, the Trumpian goons prosecution blunders elevated to the level of policy, the grand jury treated like a children's puppet theater. Under Trump, one begins to suspect his DOJ views the Constitution, with its ponderous clauses and arcane restrictions, not as a manual to protect liberty, but as a document that provides endless opportunities for MAGA power grabs and self-parody. Blue Amp Media is building a movement for 2026, and you're invited. As Judge Fitzpatrick has noted, the prosecution blunders in the Comey case do not appear to be mere technical errors. They are a series of intentional political spectacles, demonstrating how power may be dressed in the robes of justice and paraded as virtue, while corrupt practitioners like Bondi and Halligan tumble and bumble with unholy glee. The American people, with our admirable if often misplaced faith in institutions, are expected to sit politely, applaud when told to do so, and ignore the Trump clowns tossing legal briefs like water balloons. | | ---|---|--- In the end, what we have under Trump is a Department of Justice that has forgotten what it is supposed to be. It is neither impartial nor dignified; it is mischievous, erratic, and frequently malicious. The Trump DOJ treats the law as a toy, the courts as a stage, and the public as an audience to be manipulated and misled. If there is one lesson we can draw from this sad spectacle, it is that justice, in Trump's America, is no longer a principle. It is a performance. And in this theater, the joke is not on the prosecutors, the judges, the grand juries or the defendants. The joke is on the nation itself. Thankfully, a federal judge is not laughing. He is sounding the alarm. | | ---|---|--- You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Former Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Switching places with a Navy SEAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e4e7e6ff33a04f4198e0768631d55085&_e=wtDJUZ_ip-5ADwPxQ7j8FMzC1Fg1bkZkmzKlHLJxzrfX6aaqhUl1X8n4LVOABbuwo6_e8iKRRvUL9OEgjkqrbqtKYQZkmMxp2Nhgc9YOpf2fJGDO-kWm126wVJBFFs4XFA46tTbx4KHaDDdKKPeqwab72oNi6oEo86gg2KeqMz1KVBTbm94Szz-AzjoX37xg-ZBEhptjya6IhwnAgcs1r3HT3RS5Hgaceg0mHxu4QG5ZJ__OYZqU_TlUL2HY72FPkENxEShPMrNOQt6--ypUPCAXpNdRaFF9AVp_N5KLb3KPUt9TKfQRryeMZKowSpVjYGki6vTpXlUWtw-QrgtqVSfrPGU77cuF9peaEI4iohK8JjCUqMJsNwrWRj999IlnHqa_ggw43s3i7xEFcWgnF8EVqXB1jpYTw_y6EqVwWYU3C8MV-voTw0h66heSWqdA5YU8rKwfqd6Fi88xmNlaoov5EUk-JcmN1Z0KQYKYs_gdOqxiOw3w2TEmSkEWnlB5VYxLlql8UUEDLBFj35mkC0nA3EIzRH6o_aMGc4r8Qyd9OiXo4YgeGgakWYoJ1mRAsIRKwh85Y9nQ0rEoMqT_1Foj41fWttlSXH1uzt-ho9OCDbFTnLOGeczt7d0pYVJCM1V6EeGbvE4C4WOeejd2-DbYeIW6qIWzuQJbopqDxAW5bDZ4cJYdm0N2Qr8vjJl2lFyn7HqqBcL43smf830sYSqXWlRLflv7qI_8ERKQ1S0%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

Imagine, for a moment, **switching shoes with an active-duty Navy SEAL.**

The satellite phone rang at 3:00 a.m. local time.

You’re in a 20-foot shipping container turned command post, somewhere in the Horn of Africa you never see on a map.

_**No staff. No teleprompter. No second chances.**_

One of our teams was pinned down.

Bad guys closing in.

Decision time: **extract now and risk the helo, or hold and risk the men.**

You make the call. You get every American home.

_**That’s what a real 3 A.M. decision feels like.**_

_[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e4e7e6ff33a04f4198e0768631d55085&_e=wtDJUZ_ip-5ADwPxQ7j8FMzC1Fg1bkZkmzKlHLJxzrfX6aaqhUl1X8n4LVOABbuwo6_e8iKRRvUL9OEgjkqrbqtKYQZkmMxp2Nhgc9YOpf2fJGDO-kWm126wVJBFFs4XFA46tTbx4KHaDDdKKPeqwab72oNi6oEo86gg2KeqMz1KVBTbm94Szz-AzjoX37xg-ZBEhptjya6IhwnAgcs1r3HT3RS5Hgaceg0mHxu4QG5ZJ__OYZqU_TlUL2HY72FPeZTafNkbZR8okqi2W4lcfvvYjbGS4Y3C4kJn3qoxzSMSyEiQFPko358WiUEwpCOeYL_WnnqDCuw91EkXvy83oZwxpbdK1uH-7K0fUpw77iLpGtsJoxDoBcbf37pQWLH-1JE_C35m7C1GmYbpcjve2wP44b4t0opFkSL6UoyjdYsWSqXEG6KZBYXrz3a7M4qn7DNN3gc0Dnv_2XGudl2nu8zzoqJdQUhn5APuppyn2xpf2rnW9DrXE9-hS86j0QhAbFyUHFnSQR4cOMU7smaOL3EpnKRrnS2-Yv6dZWQIJfCLetBi7BUClKpgf8a9V9zPWOJWl4_8yGP-3sR0MW7hOxTaPGXEtOnebYB-zHcT8-WG2R7m0Ad5A6TUNco7QpFNv4TDqSjnLzbX7h8SzBUwy9j9812CNv1tsA1qPJyOgtTj4yr9qwk45K5UZ3ypTkj6KUQqqAgomir4FhmISiP3i1MOOAcsMn9aoXKnbskI95I%3D)_
Now, Minnesota faces its own 3 A.M. moments—only the phone is ringing in **Minneapolis, St. Cloud, Duluth.**

1. **_A 74% spike in carjackings since 2020._**

2. **_Illegals with criminal records released into our neighborhoods because Walz-Flanagan sued to defund ICE detention._**

3. **_Small-town hospitals are closing because state mandates crushed rural budgets._**

But this isn’t just happening in Minnesota - it’s happening all across the country. In big cities, small towns, and in state capitals, with out-of-touch career politicians leading the charge.

_**That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate - because Americans need a battle-tested former Navy SEAL, like me, ready to take the tough 3:00 a.m. calls that are commonplace at the highest levels of government. **_

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e4e7e6ff33a04f4198e0768631d55085&_e=wtDJUZ_ip-5ADwPxQ7j8FMzC1Fg1bkZkmzKlHLJxzrfX6aaqhUl1X8n4LVOABbuwo6_e8iKRRvUL9OEgjkqrbqtKYQZkmMxp2Nhgc9YOpf2fJGDO-kWm126wVJBFFs4XFA46tTbx4KHaDDdKKPeqwab72oNi6oEo86gg2KeqMz1KVBTbm94Szz-AzjoX37xg-ZBEhptjya6IhwnAgcs1r3HT3RS5Hgaceg0mHxu4QG5ZJ__OYZqU_TlUL2HY72FPmmypCkjeQSR-zkHDXc_FYFavWhI5KvFw5mpD4uPKJ10pn25OpGHomtR16OxVrIP2hX_W38mGLu05Eq7vW_cLJ6y4O3Q6i9Jel03JBFkpeO85ZfZLmhcj2El-NwbSykY504oCWg-Cvy4zoj43-ELMfEiT771j4N6-2b5IC3JXMkLmG0Xq5lbkpGQaIFsQEnCzipYQBclJdrrJxX_gnmztARXgWZN-ZY2G6HNptDqHfOkvTlv12POAvjRjmT1JuYC75HZ_KoEYlU5KdQLdlFPRcrHyUxzOMkOUEz9fztl-ez1PMd5N4cHWXuuWUeZ6PiOOjoR-NX0XzfLXXW0kmsDDo-A6vAR4xzB7Ig7MB1x6iblynQD9aVSkRZHhKD9MMcKNgQmqLtThof6EmWxnREHz2cuwedaev9NRqV2xFsNK-WY7cinW4CKY_1S52FKQQdMD-Icnzvx60ZWjsYNQlcN67GG42RsF-1GEZhQwViUpll8%3D)

My opponent?

She’s never taken a 3 A.M. call that didn’t come with a donor list attached.

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, lifelong Minnesotan. I’ve done **nine combat deployments** across **70 countries**. I’ve led men when the margin between life and death was measured in seconds.

Minnesota doesn’t need another career politician who reads a poll at 3:00 A.M.

America needs another Senator who has _****already answered the 3 A.M. call****_ —and brought everyone home.

The left’s most recent internal poll shows a _** **generic Republican within 2 points**. That means **this seat is flippable****_—but only with the help of grassroots conservatives like yourself. You must step up now if we’re to have any chance of flipping this seat for the first time since 2008.

Could you **[please consider contributing $5, $10, or even $25 to our campaign today?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e4e7e6ff33a04f4198e0768631d55085&_e=wtDJUZ_ip-5ADwPxQ7j8FMzC1Fg1bkZkmzKlHLJxzrfX6aaqhUl1X8n4LVOABbuwo6_e8iKRRvUL9OEgjkqrbqtKYQZkmMxp2Nhgc9YOpf2fJGDO-kWm126wVJBFFs4XFA46tTbx4KHaDDdKKPeqwab72oNi6oEo86gg2KeqMz1KVBTbm94Szz-AzjoX37xg-ZBEhptjya6IhwnAgcs1r3HT3RS5Hgaceg0mHxu4QG5ZJ__OYZqU_TlUL2HY72FPfU83kv_63OfLBa_hdcCW2DmzdLeKfu6DG4nl0KLcveY_qijs-FjIA3pgJdFH3rqGtRKkGukAu4gAD79hicgDl6V_1O5INNxqwEomAR-hzOdMeofhiGrOi5FJXW1Yf9bkfK4zqnuKg2LBx1DvC4B8MOrczHOI7AHthkCvJOgSb2sDisVnoKvDSTL-Vsm_QPUxCoSgjqscebWS48yFduWPR-M5Pa7c7vPRoxLb3eCd1YT6dVn8JI-ajvUoeAiXRwRhDe74JjkG1DtHKzh2Gn0L8SivsIgcJrb52ZXtYKFU1Jf793ipNeXG1-heSoYlzYkI9lRENPkC3-B6PlQtk_-zjbqxZ65rSuIqzfjIhsciycZ1v81ScrYWaA-7FUXbxIb_VlX9yA7b65n2c-SCzTWR9JklSiLh92vF-2lttGd2bNvlcrgA7xDp9M6_bt3G_9JWY0z0oHNA7wsepLxMmeKjgdweYWC7cxwNXhG8ox6ex1s%3D)** I have a story to tell and a lot of fight in me, but the one thing we don’t have is money.

[**SEND A SEAL TO THE SENATE →**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=e4e7e6ff33a04f4198e0768631d55085&_e=wtDJUZ_ip-5ADwPxQ7j8FMzC1Fg1bkZkmzKlHLJxzrfX6aaqhUl1X8n4LVOABbuwo6_e8iKRRvUL9OEgjkqrbqtKYQZkmMxp2Nhgc9YOpf2fJGDO-kWm126wVJBFFs4XFA46tTbx4KHaDDdKKPeqwab72oNi6oEo86gg2KeqMz1KVBTbm94Szz-AzjoX37xg-ZBEhptjya6IhwnAgcs1r3HT3RS5Hgaceg0mHxu4QG5ZJ__OYZqU_TlUL2HY72FPRU9iZqyMruIIIQ0Z5jskzK6vNrvZLsGrhBCrBaFIZk7ndN2UV45UKbHG7YaU-mK0lmhf12TYLCRcblxdcsGwMksY8Px2ZbpHPWop2eMMu-MxkAcfIZW1mEeFzjzBOw9cqoRYDyxVgZo_WR4_n54h6ktiOQLeJfx4UPEa0gg_IC0236NLw6sWF2PO1AJUTCJgzhCgfPMpbZMbgWzqLAxea63FwHdxpr1bcxtDaCohMCLVsf5_lNuZ6GxDtQ0RH1lh_6HAsVAbktqHLWGSjXGOlGRsp0HLX6MhflXu6qV2XNVOnPPWhSMaxfZJIoKgnDzW9ZtsRITPezJFZ47yT5tVZ6-nKHZibwzFUWhwU8EJXpq7-7z5YD6plMfeztYPWUkepGqmHW2mxmT0l1K6G976XnXjteWkCE0R8VtslMFJkcSFNLRVYAozsnkste5pIJ7rcKKAZWiZUcd65Sxo1edgLpAsMZvS_wtu5_-Dl35QnA4%3D)

I’m not backed by Hollywood or D.C. consultants. **I’m backed by conservatives like _you._******

Every dollar received by my campaign sends a message to the national GOP:_****Minnesota is in play. ****_ Because when the next 3 A.M. crisis hits—whether it’s a border surge, a riot, or a cyberattack— The American people deserve a U.S. Senator who’s **already been there**.

For a better tomorrow,
Adam Schwarze
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer
Marine Corps Veteran
Proud Minnesotan **_

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: This is about my son, Ben
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged.

I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities.

I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119525208/583355256/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.11.18_Ben-New_B1_F1_S1_C1_NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmEyODg1MC1iZmM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NlOs4upjJ-_NdX7aQAV0LWf6dJqWKZ8XuI6S2PNc7Vw=) Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. They’re attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access.

I’m not afraid of RFK Jr. I’ll continue going head-to-head with him in the Senate, but I need your support:

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: Two billion dollars for NOTHING
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Congress can stop this. They can exercise the power of the purse and not allocate a single dollar for this ridiculous exercise. And we are demanding they do.
#
This is a joke, Peter.
[](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251118_vv_dow/?source=em251118-1-120&akid=34774%2E3013755%2EBgNTm1)
They cut countless millions in medical research — including VA research — that would literally save lives. They went to court to avoid disbursing food stamps for millions of people, including Veterans. They told us they couldn’t afford the salaries of thousands of caseworkers, researchers, and medical staff at the VA. They can’t afford to continue supporting Veterans who need help to afford their mortgages.
But this jackass thinks he deserves $2 billion to make a vanity name change while the country falls into a recession.
Congress can stop this. They can exercise the power of the purse and not allocate a single dollar for this ridiculous exercise. And we are demanding they do.
**[Add your name and tell Congress: No money for the DEPARTMENT OF (FOREVER) WAR. Not a single cent before getting Veterans and their families the care and services they deserve.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251118_vv_dow/?source=em251118-1-120&akid=34774%2E3013755%2EBgNTm1)
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/251118_vv_dow/?refcode=em251118-1-120&akid=34774%2E3013755%2EBgNTm1)
---

The team at VoteVets

subject: The only way to compete and win is with grassroots power

body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251118-825&t=1&akid=828%2E294397%2EE_iwx7)
When Judge Chris Taylor decided to pursue a career in law, it wasn’t about prestige or politics. It was about **people**.
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251118_1_ak.x1l31h&amount=10&refcode=em20251118-825&t=3&akid=828%2E294397%2EE_iwx7)
Chris saw how the law could be used as a powerful tool to protect people, and that fueled her drive to ensure everyone gets a fair shot in our judicial system.
From standing up for reproductive freedom and workers’ rights as a public servant, to ensuring fairness and dignity in every courtroom she’s presided over, Judge Chris Taylor has always stood up for justice and equality.
Now, she’s ready to bring that same compassion and integrity to Wisconsin’s highest court, **but she can’t do it without us.**
Our extreme opponent has dark money and right-wing special interests on their side. They’re expected to flood Wisconsin with ads designed to mislead voters and buy this seat.
**The only way to compete and win is with grassroots power.**
Thousands of people chipping in together right now will give our campaign the resources to reach voters in every corner of the state before ballots are cast.

name: Deb Haaland
subject: I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Thank you for hearing my story.
Peter, Deb Haaland here and I want to tell you about a milestone I’m proud of: **I have reached 35 years of sobriety.**
Most people running for office wouldn’t choose to speak candidly about alcohol addiction. But I’m not like most people running for office. My story is different.
I was about 23 years old when I made the brave decision to get sober. It was a struggle at first, but I persevered because I was committed to doing all I could. I went to AA meetings and probably read 20 books on addiction.
My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me.
**My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico.**
High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico to cover drug and alcohol treatment.
**My promise to you, Peter: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal.**
Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. **[If you can, I’d be so grateful if you’d pitch in a split donation of $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can keep sharing our stories across New Mexico and beyond to hear from as many voices as possible and win this race.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/97466?refcode=em20251118-9728&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9728%2E614464%2ESAlUNr)**

My struggles made me fierce, which is why I chose to speak openly about my sobriety in my very first campaign ad when I ran for Congress 7 years ago. And I’m so glad I did. I'll never forget the day we went to the Marigold Parade in the South Valley, and people came up to me right and left and thanked me for my honesty in my ad. They shared stories about themselves, their parents, and their loved ones struggling with addiction, and it brought tears to my eyes that people felt represented by someone like me. My journey to sobriety taught me that you must face hard truths if you want to make change, which is why I’ll never shy away from the tough fights that lie ahead for New Mexico. High prices, homelessness, crime, and addiction weigh heavy on our state. As Governor, I will address these head on by investing in addiction services, helping families get the resources to support their loved ones, and requiring health insurers in New Mexico to cover drug and alcohol treatment. My promise to you, Peter: I will always be honest about topics other politicians might try to sweep under the rug, because I believe if we’re brave, we can heal. Thank you for hearing my story. That’s how we’ll win this race — by sharing our stories, lifting each other up, and being fierce enough to fight for the bright future New Mexicans deserve. If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, we will process your contribution to Deb Haaland and Heartland Patriots instantly: Thank you for everything. Deb | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.

This is unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.

Let me be clear: I will not hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.

I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies are trying to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.

Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.

**We aim to raise $25,000 within the next 72 hours to demonstrate our response in the face of this abuse of power.**

President Donald Trump on Sunday urged his fellow Republicans in
Congress to vote for the release of files related to the late
convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, reversing his earlier
resistance to such a move. House Speaker Mike Johnson said
earlier that he believed a vote on releasing the documents should
help put to rest allegations that Trump had any connection to
Epstein's abuse and trafficking of underage girls.

clean_body: Background on Trump's call for release of Epstein files [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Trump reverses stance on Epstein files, urges Republicans to vote for releasing them [] Source: Reuters [] President Donald Trump on Sunday urged his fellow Republicans in Congress to vote for the release of files related to the late convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, reversing his earlier resistance to such a move. House Speaker Mike Johnson said earlier that he believed a vote on releasing the documents should help put to rest allegations that Trump had any connection to Epstein's abuse and trafficking of underage girls. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] September 17, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Justice Department for Communications with Axios on Biden-Hur Audio, Epstein Memo [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch a FOIA lawsuit against the]Department of Justice for communication the department had with the media outlet Axios regarding the outlet’s “exclusive” on a July 2025 memo stating that there is no Jeffrey Epstein “client list.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] October 15, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues CIA for Epstein Records [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the CIA for records involving any role Jeffrey Epstein might have played in connection with the agency, his business dealings, travel, victim or witness information, and records concerning his death [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] June 11, 2025 Judicial Watch Sues Justice for Epstein Client Lists [] Source: Judicial Watch [] "They're obligated under the law to release the records, and they haven't," Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2025, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

subject: The fight to protect mail-in voting is intensifying

body:
things have only become more dire...

| **We’re following up because things have only become more dire.**

Legal experts are warning that a GOP-backed lawsuit heading to the Supreme Court could end mail-in voting if the conservative majority sides with Trump’s plan.

It would silence millions of Americans – especially seniors, rural voters, and disabled Americans – and it’s exactly why Trump and MAGA Republicans are pushing it.

MAGA Republicans know they can’t win on their record. This is yet another attempt for Republicans to pick their own voters – because they can’t win on their records.

We can’t let them succeed, friend – we need every supporter speaking out to show that we refuse to let our voting rights be infringed upon.

**[Can you add your name before midnight to help us defend mail-in voting and stop this coordinated MAGA attack to infringe upon millions of Americans’ voting rights? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119526677/583358972/1569424495?refcode=NDCAF_20251118_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmExMTY4OC1jMWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCwWgunh8YbcBLv59LDIKTFHlcA4ZmAgD9VbUJBF-eM=&emci=046a3dd7-a6c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c6a11688-c1c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)** | [STAND WITH NEW DEMS: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEFEND MAIL-IN VOTING »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119526678/583358973/1569424495?refcode=NDCAF_20251118_EMPET_E2_T0_AC_NS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmExMTY4OC1jMWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PCwWgunh8YbcBLv59LDIKTFHlcA4ZmAgD9VbUJBF-eM=&emci=046a3dd7-a6c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c6a11688-c1c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=48524772)

The conservative majority on the Supreme Court has agreed to hear a GOP-backed lawsuit that could make Trump’s dangerous plan a reality.

If the Court sides with Republicans, states could be forced to reject ballots that arrive after Election Day — **effectively silencing millions of voters, especially rural, senior, and disabled Americans who depend on mail voting to make their voices heard.**

_New Dems are fighting back in Congress and standing up for voting rights, but we can’t do it alone._

His administration had already begun drafting an executive order to outlaw mail-in ballots, and now there’s an even more alarming development: The conservative majority on the Supreme Court has agreed to hear a GOP-backed lawsuit that could make Trump’s dangerous plan a reality.
