name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 11/18/2025
body:
Colorado detransitioner’s story anchors Protect Kids Colorado event on safeguarding vulnerable children
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Xcel asked regulators to delay shutting down Comanche Unit 2 for a year, citing an extended outage at Unit 3 and rising demand, underscoring [growing strain on Colorado’s grid](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In Salida, police linked a violent home invasion to a [Venezuelan gang-connected assault in Buena Vista](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), with several suspects still at large. And in Brighton, a [WWII veterans memorial was vandalized](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for the tenth time in two years — this time just one day after Veterans Day — leaving the community frustrated and heartbroken.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Sen. Lindsey Graham is pushing legislation to let any American targeted in [Jack Smith’s sweeping data dragnet](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) sue the federal government, saying accountability shouldn’t be limited to senators whose phone records were subpoenaed. Meanwhile, [newly released Epstein emails](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) show years of resentment toward Donald Trump as he rose from developer to TV star to president.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Colorado detransitioner Antoinette shares how years of trauma and confusion led her into nearly two decades of medical transition, leaving her permanently changed — and now urging the state to [protect vulnerable kids from similar paths](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). In contrast, Pastor Drake Hunter reflects on what he calls a “miracle in our midst,” celebrating Pastor John Waters’ [successful liver transplant](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and the outpouring of community support that carried him through. Another new commentary argues the state is [violating its own constitution](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) by keeping former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters incarcerated despite her rapidly worsening health.
This is the Mountain Minute for Tuesday, November 18, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado detransitioner’s story anchors Protect Kids Colorado event on safeguarding vulnerable children](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY ANTOINETTE DE LA CRUZ, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_My name is Antoinette. I am a detransitioner. And I want to save Colorado’s children from enduring the anguish I’ve been through._
_I began exploring transitioning into a man during my late teenage years and spent nearly 20 years trying to turn myself into a man before I realized my mistake. Now I am mutilated and sterilized as the result of multiple surgeries with life-threatening complications. My body has been a battlefield of “gender affirmative care.”_
_I grew up in a household of physical, mental and sexual abuse and during my childhood, I learned I had no value as a person and certainly no value as a girl. I learned that being a girl meant being a target. And I did not want to be a target._
_So I transitioned to be a man. Transitioning gave me a way to hide from a lifetime of abuse which left me feeling vulnerable, unimportant, and unloved. It wasn’t safe to be a woman, but it seemed valuable to be a man. And that is what I was seeking—to be valued._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Colorado’s auto theft reckoning: A crisis we built, a crisis we can fix](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Colorado’s auto-theft crisis was years in the making:** Colorado became a national auto-theft hotspot after lawmakers downgraded theft of “low-value” cars to minor offenses, signaling to criminals that stealing older vehicles carried little risk — even though those cars were essential for working families, teens, and vulnerable residents.
* **State response reveals the depth of the failure:** As thefts surged and organized rings grew, the Colorado State Patrol urged victims to seek reimbursement for tow fees, repairs, and transportation — a sign of how severely policy had failed. Lawmakers eventually expanded CATPA with millions in new funding for victim aid, enforcement, and tracking.
* **Reforms arrive, but the damage remains:** Colorado reversed its value-based penalty system in 2023, making all auto theft a felony, but families are still facing higher insurance premiums, financial strain, and the fallout from repeat offenders. The crisis may be easing, but its impacts continue to burden Coloradans.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Colorado Accused of Abandoning Constitution in Handling of Tina Peters Case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ILLINOIS REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* **Commentary argues Colorado is violating its own constitution:** The piece claims the state is inflicting “cruel and unusual punishment” by keeping former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters imprisoned despite her rapidly deteriorating health and the facility’s inability to treat her safely.
* **Legal precedent says punishment becomes unconstitutional when circumstances change:** Citing cases like _People v. Gaskins_ , _Ramos v. Lamm_ , and _People v. Drake_ , the author notes Colorado courts must intervene when medical decline makes a lawful sentence disproportionately harsh or life-threatening.
* **State officials accused of crossing a “moral and constitutional line”:** With Peters allegedly facing a medical emergency the prison cannot manage, the commentary argues continued confinement serves no rehabilitative purpose and risks becoming punishment for its own sake.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
[**A Miracle in Our Midst: Celebrating Pastor John Water’s Successful Liver Transplant**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 17** _Every now and then, a moment arrives that stops us in our tracks and reminds us of the sheer goodness and mercy woven into the fabric of life. This is one of those moments._
__
[**The Whole Armor: Where Humanity Meets Holiness**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
**BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 16** _Are you a half-dressed soldier in the Lord’s Army? During my time in the Air Force, one lesson stuck with me: readiness is everything. There’s no such thing as being partially prepared for a mission._ __
[**Bill search reveals how Polis grew Medicaid—yet he blames rising costs**](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[****](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**BY CORY GAINES | COMMENTARY | NOVEMBER 14** _I recently saw a couple articles covering Gov Polis’ budget recommendations to help cut costs in this state and get our budget to (at least temporarily) balance. You’ll see lots of his ideas in the Sun and CBS articles big among them Polis’ brave words about Medicaid funding in this state being one of our biggest costs, and how continuing to expand it is unsustainable._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story, commentary or tip to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
|
---
**🗽 DID YOU KNOW?** **New York City’s population exceeds that of 38 U.S. states.** Home to more than 8 million residents across its five boroughs, NYC has more people than all but 12 states — including giants like California, Texas, and Florida. It’s also one of the most linguistically diverse places on earth, with over 200 languages spoken citywide.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "A nation that cannot control its borders is not a nation." – Ronald Reagan

name: Ro Khanna
subject: This is how we splinter the MAGA base – and win
body:
Help me continue to show up in red districts, MAGA podcasts, and conservative spaces. It’s working.
#
I’m going to say something blunt: for the first time ever, **we have split the MAGA base, and** **we did it by doing what Democrats have refused to do for years.**
Up to **40 MAGA Republicans** are ready to support my **Khanna Epstein Transparency Act,** even though Donald Trump publicly told them not to. Some are prepared to lose his endorsement over it.
This didn’t happen by accident.
It happened because I’ve spent months:
* going on MAGA-aligned podcasts
* holding town halls in deep-red districts
* building personal relationships with Rep. Massie and even MTG
* treating MAGA voters with respect — not mockery
* making the case for transparency and economic patriotism

Washington didn’t believe this strategy would work. But it’s working.
It’s the most consequential crack in the MAGA coalition in nearly a decade.
And if we can break Trump’s coalition on transparency, we can break it on other issues too and build a broad, durable, cross-partisan governing majority.
But I need your help to keep showing up where Democrats never go.
**[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help me keep going on conservative podcasts, holding town halls in Republican districts, and building the coalition we need to defeat extremism?](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22075?t=1&akid=1356%2E2118727%2Ef464Zm)**
**[👉 CHIP IN NOW](https://act.leftnet.org/go/22075?t=2&akid=1356%2E2118727%2Ef464Zm)**
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money.
My campaign is powered entirely by grassroots supporters like you. Your contribution funds:
* **Travel and event logistics** to reach communities that beltway insiders ignore.
* **Promotion and organizing** to bring new people into the movement.
* **Security and operations** so we can keep doing this safely and sustainably.

Together, we can reshape the political landscape in ways Washington still doesn’t understand.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1356%2E2118727%2Ef464Zm)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1356%2E2118727%2Ef464Zm)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1356%2E2118727%2Ef464Zm)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

name: Team Wes Moore
subject: Did you read this?
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=940%2E1086043%2EWbkmpI)
A LOT is happening in Maryland, Peter.
**_Gov. Moore Announces More New Jobs_**
**_Moore responds to SNAP benefits pause with emergency $10 million for food banks_**
**_Gov. Moore Directs $250K In Aid To Veterans_**
**_Maryland governor on redistricting: Trump is ‘not going to choose what our democracy looks like’_**
This is just some of the news we’re hearing as Wes Moore works hard to make progress for every Marylander. **But Donald Trump and his Republican allies are preparing to do everything they can to put a stop to Wes Moore’s work.**
To keep Wes fighting for Maryland, we have to step up. This grassroots team powered our movement to victory in 2022, and we can do it again next year with your help.
**[What do you say, Peter? Will you chip in $5, $25, $50 or any amount to keep Wes fighting for progress in Maryland?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251118-1.4MgyQy&refcode=em-20251118-1&t=2&akid=940%2E1086043%2EWbkmpI)**

Team Wes Moore

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Defund ICE NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Over 130 people were arrested in Charlotte this weekend – snatched from
their neighborhoods in a sweeping, targeted ICE blitz.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1011&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]Headlne: Charlotte on edge after dozens arrested in weekend immigration
crackdown

This is Trump’s ICE: masked raids on neighborhoods, separating loved ones
using intimidation and brute force. These attacks aren’t just headlines –
they’re happening in real time, tearing apart families, leaving children
stranded, and putting entire communities under siege. We cannot afford to
sit silent.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1012&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]Add your name: Tell Congress to stop funding ICE’s racist terror
campaigns now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1013&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]ADD YOUR NAME

ICE under Trump has morphed into a full-blown secret police force. Masked
officers using military hardware prowl neighborhoods, refuse to identify
themselves, and “disappear” people without warning or cause. This is not
safety. This is taxpayer-funded terror.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1014&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]Headline: US immigration enforcement using military hardware and
tactics on civilians

Let’s be clear: ICE is targeting people based on their accents, the color
of their skin, and where they go to school or work. Millions of Americans
across the country are now afraid to leave their homes. This is a
humanitarian emergency on American soil.

Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is working to organize rapid response
protests to fight back – calling out corporations like AT&T and Avelo
Airlines that are collaborating with ICE. But our voices are even more
powerful when we speak together across every city, every state.

Congress has the power, right now, to cut off ICE’s funding. Trump is
counting on Congress to quietly keep funding these violent campaigns – but
we can make sure their phones and inboxes are flooded with outrage. Every
name matters. Every signature raises the cost of inaction.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1015&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]Take urgent action now: Demand your representatives stop funding for
Trump’s cruel ICE raids that are ripping our communities apart. Will you
send an urgent email directly to Congress now?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34697?source=email-20251118&t=1016&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]ADD YOUR NAME

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20251118.FHO_Ga&t=1008&akid=9849%2E5885482%2EF4aR4j ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

name: Phil Weiser
subject: About the other day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
Grateful for the chance to speak with you.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119528161/583363020/1239926708?refcode=em_WEI_FR_PeoplesAssembly_111825_A&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjE1MWQ4YS1jNGM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e58DSNB4M7yuzi4wavRApPoy6-d6A9Slnypo4gkkV40=&emci=f8151d8a-c4c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=fb151d8a-c4c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=51844520) Did you hear about Together Colorado’s People’s Assembly, friend? I always value the chance to hear from the people of Colorado — to understand your needs, your hopes, and your challenges. Every conversation helps me and makes our movement stronger. Our campaign is truly grassroots, built on one simple belief: we move Colorado forward when we work together. And this means: ✔️ Refusing to take money from out-of-state billionaires.
✔️ Holding corporations and bad actors accountable when they cheat Coloradans — like corporate landlords that are using algorithms to fix prices and are charging deceptive junk fees.
✔️ Showing up, listening, and getting things done for Coloradans. **[I will be a governor who will fight for YOU, my fellow Coloradans. I won’t be distracted or deterred from that mission. We’re reaching out to Democrats who have not added their response to our time-sensitive poll about Trump’s plan to BAN mail-in voting.

**This could completely derail our chances for 2026!_While Trump tries to RIG the midterms, we need to know where you stand:_**

[**Please confirm your signature is submitted before the deadline: DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK)

→ Donald Trump wants REVENGE on mail-in voting after it handed him a HUGE DEFEAT in 2020.

→ His latest threat is one of the worst attacks on voting rights in HISTORY.

→ **If we don’t show MASSIVE support for vote-by-mail, MILLIONS of Americans risk having their ballots _thrown in the TRASH!!!_**
[**So we need to hear from YOU:
DO YOU SUPPORT VOTE-BY-MAIL?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK) | [YES, WE MUST PROTECT VOTING RIGHTS! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/poll-vote-by-mail/?source=VPP_20251118_EMPOLL_E3_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK)

If we don’t receive 5,000 responses by midnight, our momentum to save vote-by-mail will be lost. **Please respond ASAP!**

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21887%2E878179%2EfyDOIK).**

body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119528323/583363483/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWMyNmE5Mi1jNWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jVnm_tRrUtko-P_Bki8FWFoudzmA6O9LdnpLPuUnFQY=)

[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119528325/583363485/-309737922?refcode=251118_RG_hide-lose&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWMyNmE5Mi1jNWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jVnm_tRrUtko-P_Bki8FWFoudzmA6O9LdnpLPuUnFQY=)
_If Trump has nothing to hide, then he has nothing to lose. _
The moment those words aired, Trump and his allies went into full-blown panic mode. They do not want the public seeing what’s in those files — and they are doing everything they can to shut this down.
But I’m not backing down. Not now. Not when we are this close to getting the truth into the public’s hands.
**But here’s the reality: To keep the pressure on, to fight GOP obstruction, and to keep demanding the full release of the Epstein files, I need a wave of grassroots support behind me.**
If Trump and his allies think they can scare us off, let’s prove them wrong. Let’s show them the country is done with secrecy and cover-ups.
**[Will you chip in today to help me keep up the fight? Every donation — $5, $10, $25 — strengthens this movement and makes it harder for Republicans to bury the truth.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119528326/583363486/789508428?refcode=251118_RG_hide-lose&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWMyNmE5Mi1jNWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jVnm_tRrUtko-P_Bki8FWFoudzmA6O9LdnpLPuUnFQY=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119528327/583363487/-309737922?refcode=251118_RG_hide-lose&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWMyNmE5Mi1jNWM0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jVnm_tRrUtko-P_Bki8FWFoudzmA6O9LdnpLPuUnFQY=)
Trump has spent years hiding behind power and privilege. But this time? We’re not letting him off the hook.
Thank you for standing with me,
Robert

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We finished what we started in Luzerne County, Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Most political operatives had written it off as unwinnable.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529035/583365513/1328794144?refcode=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2I2MTg2LWM3YzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XkHBrWHFFNLkWJlfaute4hFjfK_l8EpuFk-E-Sc2sXI=&emci=423b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529036/583365514/2105508926?refcode=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2I2MTg2LWM3YzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XkHBrWHFFNLkWJlfaute4hFjfK_l8EpuFk-E-Sc2sXI=) A few weeks ago, I told you about our two-year fight in Luzerne County, Pennsylvania, to flip a county council where Republicans once held a 10–1 supermajority. It’s a community you may not know by name, but you know its story: abandoned mines, Superfund sites, and fracking pollution that went unchecked for far too long. Most political operatives had written it off as unwinnable. But we didn't walk away. In 2023, my team at JanePAC threw its full weight behind local leaders courageous enough to challenge Big Oil. And together, we flipped four seats and broke the Republican stranglehold. The council shifted to a much less powerful 7–4 GOP majority. It was progress. But not victory. Not yet. So we came back in 2025 ready to endorse three climate champions for the Luzerne County Council: **Denise Williams, Dawn Simmons, and Chris Belles.** We told you that if we could win just two more seats, we'd flip the council to a pro-environment majority. And on election night, something incredible happened. **_All three of our candidates won their races._ The Luzerne County Council is now a solidly pro-environment majority.** This victory belongs to you. To every JanePAC supporter who donated directly to their campaigns and refused to accept that some communities are just "unwinnable." Together, we proved that change takes time, sometimes more than one election cycle, but it's possible. Because there's only one way through this moment in our history, and it's to fight like hell. **Now we have a chance to replicate this success in communities across the country. We have runoffs to win and a special election in Tennessee — our last chance to flip a Republican seat for Congress in 2025.** **[If this victory inspired you the way it inspired me, will you chip in today to help us bring this same commitment to the fights ahead?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529037/583365515/2105508926?refcode=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2I2MTg2LWM3YzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XkHBrWHFFNLkWJlfaute4hFjfK_l8EpuFk-E-Sc2sXI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529038/583365516/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2I2MTg2LWM3YzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XkHBrWHFFNLkWJlfaute4hFjfK_l8EpuFk-E-Sc2sXI=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529039/583365517/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.483b6186-c7c4-f011-8196-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ4M2I2MTg2LWM3YzQtZjAxMS04MTk2LTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XkHBrWHFFNLkWJlfaute4hFjfK_l8EpuFk-E-Sc2sXI=)

clean_body: Most political operatives had written it off as unwinnable. | = A few weeks ago, I told you about our two-year fight in Luzerne County, Pennsylvania, to flip a county council where Republicans once held a 10–1 supermajority. It’s a community you may not know by name, but you know its story: abandoned mines, Superfund sites, and fracking pollution that went unchecked for far too long. Most political operatives had written it off as unwinnable. But we didn't walk away. In 2023, my team at JanePAC threw its full weight behind local leaders courageous enough to challenge Big Oil. And together, we flipped four seats and broke the Republican stranglehold. The council shifted to a much less powerful 7–4 GOP majority. It was progress. But not victory. Not yet. So we came back in 2025 ready to endorse three climate champions for the Luzerne County Council: Denise Williams, Dawn Simmons, and Chris Belles. We told you that if we could win just two more seats, we'd flip the council to a pro-environment majority. And on election night, something incredible happened. All three of our candidates won their races. The Luzerne County Council is now a solidly pro-environment majority. This victory belongs to you. To every JanePAC supporter who donated directly to their campaigns and refused to accept that some communities are just "unwinnable." Together, we proved that change takes time, sometimes more than one election cycle, but it's possible. Because there's only one way through this moment in our history, and it's to fight like hell. Now we have a chance to replicate this success in communities across the country. We have runoffs to win and a special election in Tennessee — our last chance to flip a Republican seat for Congress in 2025. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: Cook Political Report: MI-08 is the “tipping point”
body:
|
#
Big news, friend. With national redistricting changes, experts at the _Cook Political Report_ just announced that MI-08 is now _the_ “tipping-point” seat to decide control of the House next year. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/119529150/583365995/-185804085?refcode=em-11.18.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmJjN2FkNi1jN2M0LWYwMTEtODE5Ni02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_4RW-qFzEYnOd4TfDLpt1MGaBtAfDb3FdgAfkjnKVjE=) **In other words, MI-08 is seat 218 – 217 seats to the left and 217 to the right. If Democrats want to win the majority, this is the seat that gets us there.** That’s a big reason why MAGA-aligned outside groups have spent nearly **$1 million** on misleading attack ads against me – making me one of the most targeted Democrats this cycle. name: John Padora
subject: Boebert Won’t Show Up - So We’re Building a Movement That Will
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/7yDCEhFJbpuZW5JWPHPV6A~~/AAUS1hA~/jNGyJqo5XWW34BaSh3VfT5jUxYAxqfPr8ram0vLkB1R93eqksU_e0srMlcnPt6wBQvEiLMJ7RuIc7w8MGIy_5__k7Z2SHCFz6tlfQkPyFD8qTQh_i3IYkS0CikV8SzBH)
| | **Friend,** **Lauren Boebert refuses to meet her constituents. She hides from the public, ducks tough questions, and treats the people of CO-04 like an inconvenience instead of the backbone of this district.** **So while she runs from responsibility, we have been showing up everywhere.** Over the past two weeks our campaign has held back-to-back Town Halls in Windsor, Loveland, Larkspur and we're heading to Parker next. Hundreds of people took time out of their weekends - time away from family, work and rest - to participate in our democracy. I cannot thank you enough. And everywhere we go, the message is the same:
[**People are hurting. People are frustrated. People are done being ignored.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/xw_Mx5a7Kr9rYak7j_mN6A~~/AAUS1hA~/gvu081cpQ3XEoXHkDqnCNl3vtJ1xqM6J6s9T4c1F3AgX5rMA_Wzj-ygVNaFhnaqzTq5ZV7DThtYvlwr21Nw4ra5lZbh4S0LqVslGIN5GzqRHaoOZjY7niR0yyANe9haMQJ3QcHQ8VHOEAqhqMwvsp9ZXEp6Hc7oIB3q2PS3i-MU~) This race cannot - and will not - be just about beating **Lauren Boebert.**
It has to be about **fixing what is broken.**
It has to be about **giving people something worth fighting for.**
It has to be about **refusing to do the same things over and over and expecting different results.** At every stop, we talk openly about the issues Boebert will not touch:
* How to guarantee healthcare for every single American and end the for-profit cruelty that bankrupts families.
* How to rebuild American innovation through investment in technical, vocational and post-secondary education - opening real pathways to high paying careers.
* How to protect the fundamental right to clean air and clean water in every community.
* How to defend our democracy, strengthen voting rights and stop authoritarian overreach.
* How to hold ICE accountable and restore real oversight so executive power cannot be abused.
* How to reallocate federal spending toward working families instead of endless war budgets.
* How to tax extreme wealth, implement a maximum wage and build an economy that finally puts people first.

These are the conversations Washington avoids because corporate donors do not want them had. But we are not running a corporate campaign. We are running a people powered movement. Take a look at what people are saying about our campaign **And Friend, we have something Lauren Boebert will never have:**
Grit, determination, a strong family unit and a community full of people who are fired up, fed up and ready to take their power back. But here is the truth: we cannot win without each and every one of **you.**
Not one filled room, not one tough conversation, not one community reached happens without your support. If you want a representative who shows up, listens, answers the hard questions and fights like hell for real change - I am asking you to stand with us today. name: Team Tina
subject: Oregonians reject Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Donald Trump and his hand-picked Republicans aren’t wanted in Oregon. |
#
---
Peter, Donald Trump is looming large over the 2026 election, and not in a good way for Christine Drazan and Oregon Republicans. A new poll demonstrates just how angry voters across the state are about Trump’s policies and actions, particularly when it comes to his attacks on Portland. A big majority (60%) of Oregonians are opposed to Trump sending National Guard troops to the city. The message is clear: 61% of respondents will vote for the candidate who will challenge Trump’s policies — not just on troops, but on everything. That’s going to be a big problem for Christine Drazan. Just as a reminder, here’s what she’s done:
* Sided with Donald Trump on deploying the National Guard to Portland.
* Pushed a radical abortion ban and was endorsed by Oregon Right to Life, a radical group that opposes abortion even in cases of rape or incest.
* Voted to cut funding for Medicaid, threatening health care for 1.3 million Oregonians.
* Joined extremists pushing schools to ban books about race and LGBTQ+ themes.
* Opposed expanding affordable housing options that our state desperately needs.

Drazan is clearly not aligned with Oregonians’ values. But she’s Trump’s choice, and the GOP is going to go all in on trying to flip the governor’s seat. [_**We can’t let Drazan and Trump win. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Missouri
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Weeks ago, Missouri Republicans bowed to Trump's pressure and pass new maps in order to rig the next election before a single vote was cast.

**$3**
That is the contribution I am asking you to make today to People Not Politicians Missouri as they race to stop Donald Trump and Missouri Republicans from redrawing their maps to rig the next election.
The group has just three weeks to gather the signatures required to overturn the state's gerrymandered maps and they need the resources to get it done.
If that's all you need to hear, please rush a contribution to People Not Politicians Missouri using this link today:
[**https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/Missouri-Redistricting**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-mo?refcode=em251118-ggn-1&refcode2=2794_4767699_QhAQDV&akid=2794%2E4767699%2EQhAQDV)
Here's where we're at:
Weeks ago, Missouri Republicans bowed to Trump's pressure and passed new maps in order to rig the next election before a single vote was cast.
This was not a vote of the people like California, it was the legislature and Governor doing Trump's bidding.
But we can fight back. First via a direct legal challenge which is underway.
There is also a Citizen Veto provision that can force a statewide vote to reject the map; returning power to the people like we did in California.
But there are only three weeks left to get the signatures required to get on the ballot, and organizers are very worried Republicans will do all they can to disqualify as many signatures as possible.
**So People Not Politicians Missouri needs our help. Every dollar we raise will go toward the urgent need of gathering the signatures required to trigger a citizen veto referendum -- one we will win. What do you say?**
[**Please rush a $3 directly to People Not Politicians Missouri. They will put your support right to work and together we can stop Trump's power grab. Just like we did in California.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-mo?refcode=em251118-ggn-1&refcode2=2794_4767699_QhAQDV&akid=2794%2E4767699%2EQhAQDV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Gavin Newsom

name: James Talarico
subject: BREAKING: Court strikes down Trump’s redistricting power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter --
Moments ago, a federal court struck down Texas’ rigged Congressional map.
**This is a massive victory.**
Over the summer, my fellow Texas Democrats and I broke quorum to shine a national spotlight on Trump’s redistricting power grab.
We inspired other states and millions of Americans to join the fight — and today’s victory in the courts is the culmination of that work.
**This is why we fight back.**
I entered this U.S. Senate race because I know we need more fighters in Washington. **[If you’re with me, please consider making a donation today to take back Texas for the people. This race is Democrats’ best chance to take back the Senate and bring a fighting majority to Washington.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251118-1-ak&t=1&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7)**
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251118-1-ak&t=2&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7)
If I have the honor of serving as Texas’ U.S. Senator, my first bill will be a national ban to end gerrymandering once and for all.
Today’s ruling is a good win, but it’s not over. Texas is the frontline in the battle to save the American experiment in 2026, and we need to lay the organizing foundation right now.
**[Please make a contribution to our movement to take back Texas and the U.S. Senate majority. This fight couldn’t be more important.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251118-1-ak&t=3&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7)**
[DONATE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251118-1-ak&t=4&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7)
Let’s go.
James

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=247_1347274_HBLEq7&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=247%2E1347274%2EHBLEq7).

name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: ACT NOW: Trump’s EPA wants to allow more dirty air in our national parks. Tell them to protect clean air for parks.
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMxOTQxNzMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM0MDIyMjU0MwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Trump’s EPA wants to weaken the rule that delivers clean air for parks, which
will make our air dirtier and put the health and enjoyment of park visitors at
risk. Sign your name and tell the EPA to keep our national parks safe and beautiful and our air clean. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_ Peter, It's the EPA’s job to ensure that we have good air quality, including in our
national parks. To protect the health of people who visit our parks and ensure
that they can enjoy incredible places like Yosemite, Glacier, and Acadia
National Parks, Congress required the EPA to use the Clean Air Act to deliver
cleaner air for parks, through what is known as the Regional Haze Rule. Last month, the Trump EPA announced it would continue its pro-polluter agenda by
reconsidering this important rule. Weakening what could be called the “Clean Air
for Parks Rule” will lead to dirtier air and lower visibility in national parks
from pollution that drifts in from dirty coal power plants and industrial
facilities. Big polluters will be off the hook for haze pollution, and our
national parks and public health will suffer. We need to step up and make sure this doesn’t happen. Sign your name and tell Trump’s EPA: Keep clean air in our parks. https://links.messages.lcv. The Clean Air for Parks Rule has already delivered significant benefits since
its implementation 15 years ago, including reducing 1.4 million tons of
visibility-impairing and asthma and heart-attack triggering pollution and over
171 million tons of climate pollution. This rule works, and weakening it will make air quality worse while giving corporations and
polluters another corrupt handout at our expense. We can’t allow the EPA to weaken this time-tested and highly effective rule that
allows federal and state agencies, land managers, and stakeholders to work
together to clean up air pollution so we can breathe clean air and enjoy our
national parks and wilderness areas. Join us in demanding that the EPA stop the rollback of the Clean Air for Parks Rule. Everyone deserves access to clean air, and it’s our responsibility to keep our national parks and wilderness areas safe, visible and accessible for all. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/VXb6sXY- Thanks for being with us, Peter. Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13194173&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDIyMjU0MwS2&spReportId=MjM0MDIyMjU0MwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13194173&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM0MDIyMjU0MwS2&spReportId=MjM0MDIyMjU0MwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

Trump’s EPA wants to weaken the rule that delivers clean air for parks, which will make our air dirtier and put the health and enjoyment of park visitors at risk. Sign your name and tell the EPA to keep our national parks safe and beautiful and our air clean. Peter, It's the EPA’s job to ensure that we have good air quality, including in our national parks. To protect the health of people who visit our parks and ensure that they can enjoy incredible places like Yosemite, Glacier, and Acadia National Parks, Congress required the EPA to use the Clean Air Act to deliver cleaner air for parks, through what is known as the Regional Haze Rule. Last month, the Trump EPA announced it would continue its pro-polluter agenda by reconsidering this important rule. Weakening what could be called the “Clean Air for Parks Rule” will lead to dirtier air and lower visibility in national parks from pollution that drifts in from dirty coal power plants and industrial facilities. Big polluters will be off the hook for haze pollution, and our national parks and public health will suffer. We need to step up and make sure this doesn’t happen. Sign your name and tell Trump’s EPA: Keep clean air in our parks. The Clean Air for Parks Rule has already delivered significant benefits since its implementation 15 years ago, including reducing 1.4 million tons of visibility-impairing and asthma and heart-attack triggering pollution and over 171 million tons of climate pollution. This rule works, and weakening it will make air quality worse while giving corporations and polluters another corrupt handout at our expense. We can’t allow the EPA to weaken this time-tested and highly effective rule that allows federal and state agencies, land managers, and stakeholders to work together to clean up air pollution so we can breathe clean air and enjoy our national parks and wilderness areas. Join us in demanding that the EPA stop the rollback of the Clean Air for Parks Rule. Everyone deserves access to clean air, and it’s our responsibility to keep our national parks and wilderness areas safe, visible and accessible for all. Thanks for being with us, Peter. Matthew Davis Vice President of Federal Policy League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support. 740 15th St NW, Suite 700 Washington, DC 20005 202-785-8683 DONATE

Hey folks,
Just wrapped an absolutely electric conversation with **Wajahat Ali** , and I'm still buzzing. We got fiery, we got honest, and we dug all the way into the political rot that brought us to this moment. This one hit deep -- you don't want to miss it.
* [**00:09:40**] Wajahat breaks down why Trump is acting like a guilty man -- and how the Epstein files became his 'Achilles cankle'.
* [**00:17:05**] A wild back-and-forth about Dershowitz, elite protection, and what "the club" really looks like behind the curtain.
* [**00:25:45**] We get personal about safety, parenting, and what it feels like to raise kids in a country that keeps failing its own.
* [**00:32:58**] A blistering exchange on the 1%, AI collapse, billionaires drinking your milkshake, and why the working class is tapped out.
* [**00:42:37**] Wajahat closes with a beautiful call to imagine something better -- a politics of possibility instead of despair.

This episode hits every nerve we're all feeling right now -- corruption, inequality, disappearing trust, and that hunger for something more honest and humane. If you value conversations like this, if you want a movement that dreams again, help me keep this work going.

With urgency,
--Mike

You’ve stood with me every step of the way, and I think it could be time to bring a few of you even closer.

**OR**
Roll up in the full Presidential motorcade and bring you straight to the top of Trump Tower?

Thank you for your attention to this matter,
President Trump

body:

I just left the Capitol where I voted to release the Epstein files. It passed almost unanimously by a vote of 427 to 1 – a complete rebuke of Donald Trump. **This vote has been months and months in the making. Frankly, it never should have taken this long. But Republicans have been willing to fall on their swords for years in order to protect Trump.** Let’s be clear: Donald Trump and Speaker Johnson have been scrambling to stop this vote. Just days ago, Trump called Rep. Lauren Boebert to the situation room in an effort to change her vote. But then the dam broke - MAGA was going to vote yes. Trump quickly tried to save face by saying he now supports the release of the files. Do not believe him. This can’t be about politics. It’s about truth, justice, and accountability. The survivors have waited far too long for this day to come, and the American people deserve to know exactly who was involved in this horrific abuse. I’m proud of my vote. Now it’s time for the public to see what’s in the files and hold the perpetrators accountable. – Josh

Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. _But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you._ **_How We Win_**** is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up."** Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. clean_body: Charlie showed us how we take back our culture — for good.| | | Fellow Patriot,Charlie Kirk knew something long before the rest of America caught on. That the next generation of young Americans were desperate for truth... That the Left's grip on the culture wasn't as strong as it looked... And with boldness, hard work, and a focused strategy -- WE COULD WIN. Charlie didn't just talk about it. He built a movement that's changed history. And long before he left us... he wrote How We Win -- the playbook that lays it all out. Today, Turning Point USA wants to send it to you for FREE when you make a gift of any amount to carry Charlie's mission forward. Fellow Patriot, this isn't just a book... It 's the exact blueprint Charlie used to: 🔥 Launch Turning Point USA chapters in all 50 states 🔥 Wake up more than 820,000 student activists 🔥 Inspire a historic generational shift toward FREEDOM Charlie saw it coming before anyone else did. He showed the world that the American Culture War wasn't lost. While the media said Gen Z was gone, Charlie believed in them. He met them face to face. On the campuses. At the rallies. In the fight. He proved the Left and the Fake News Media wrong. He showed us HOW WE WIN. Now it's up to us to finish what he started. You and I have the opportunity to carry his torch, reach the next student, change more hearts and minds, and save the future of America. But we can't do it without grassroots patriots like you. How We Win is the game plan -- written in Charlie's words, forged in real fights, and ready to be handed to the next bold American who says "YES, I'll stand up." Let that be you, Fellow Patriot. This book isn't a political piece... It's not about playing games in the D.C. swamp... It's a blueprint for taking back our culture and rebuilding the foundations of this country. Faith. Freedom. Family. Truth. The Left is still attacking those values every single day. But now we have the roadmap to FIGHT BACK. Charlie didn't just write it -- he lived it. Every single day. Together, we can make sure his mission doesn't just survive... But that it multiplies. Let's keep the fire going. Let's honor Charlie's legacy. Let's win. For Charlie, The Turning Point USA Team 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Peter,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
Of all the things the Deep State did to me – _raiding my home, arresting me, holding me in the most violent jail in America, pushing me to the brink of bankruptcy..._
---
_...The worst thing they did was**DISBAR** me._
---
As the Bible says, earthly possessions will always fade, money comes and goes, but there are greater _priceless_ treasures.
---
_You see, I used my law license to defend the innocent, to take down bad guys, and to uphold our Constitution._
---
Truth be told, I didn’t make much money with my law license. But I _did_ make a difference. It was my legacy of justice – and it’s worth more than gold.
---
**_And the Left has STOLEN that from me._**
---
__Not only that, but I can no longer use my law license to defend myself from the Democrats’ lawfare.__
---
**Right now, I am facing a DEADLINE on 11/21 that will determine whether the Democrats’ last remaining RIGGED TRIAL against me proceeds or is thrown out for good!**
---
And because it’s in _state_ court, the President _cannot_ save me with a _federal_ pardon...
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, and no money for a top-notch legal defense team, I’m running out of options.**
---
**_BUT DEADLINE BE DAMNED, I WILL FIGHT FOR MY FREEDOM UNTIL THE VERY END!_**
---
_That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust._YOU_ truly are my final hope._
---

# **Democrat FBI BUSTED for hiding unbelievable truth about Trump 's "They/Them" shooter**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cd8679d1-b355-4510-ae95-9c3b6f02207a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/cd8679d1-b355-4510-ae95-9c3b6f02207a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **White House demands answers on FBI 's failure to share Crooks intel:** White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt told Miranda Devine on "Pod Force One" that the American people and President Trump deserve answers about what drove Thomas Crooks to attempt to assassinate Trump, following a bombshell report revealing the gunman left a trail of digital clues the FBI didn't previously share with the public.
* **Crooks ' extensive violent online history uncovered:** Newly revealed social media posts show Crooks openly supported political assassinations, ranted against Trump, and used they/them pronouns online, with one 2020 post stating "the only way to fight the gov is with terrorism style attacks" and advocating to "track down any important people/politicians/military leaders etc and try to assassinate them," made four years before he shot at Trump at a Butler, Pennsylvania rally on July 13, 2024.
* **Major questions remain unanswered 16 months later:** Key unanswered questions include whether Crooks acted alone or had contact with foreign agents, why the FBI never investigated his violent rhetoric despite it being posted in widely accessible YouTube comment sections and Discord channels across 17 accounts, and whether the FBI turned over all evidence to congressional investigators--with Sen. Ron Johnson saying he was "stonewalled" and forced to issue a subpoena.

# **More money please! - Mamdani seeks $4M in donations to fund his transition**
New York City Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani appealed to supporters Tuesday for additional transition funding, announcing his campaign has secured $1 million but **[requires $4 million total](https://substack.com/redirect/b4c4c722-ce10-472e-8352-c32baad66740?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to prepare for taking office, despite his entire campaign relying on free .... everything.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c50a1155-471d-4070-8d9d-9ef2224d2c31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Vetting and Planning Costs:** Mamdani said the transition team must review 50,000 job applications, maintain staff payroll, and organize both inauguration ceremonies and policy rollout plans within the remaining 50 days before assuming office, framing the fundraising push as necessary to "start to deliver."
* **Donor Comparison:** The mayor-elect highlighted receiving an average $77 contribution from 12,000 transition donors, contrasting sharply with outgoing Mayor Eric Adams who collected an average $1,219 from just 884 donors for his 2021 transition.
* **Trump Meeting Planned:** The donation request follows Mamdani's announcement that he will meet with President Trump to address affordability issues and cost-of-living concerns affecting New York City residents.

* * *
# **Islamic group awarded $1,000 checks to anti-Israel student protesters**
The Council on American-Islamic Relations' California chapter **[gave cash from a"Champions of Justice Fund" to students](https://substack.com/redirect/f80b7d83-73d2-40c3-af87-eaf253dc2d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** who faced penalties for leading pro-Palestinian protests, raising over $100,000 in donations and awarding $20,000 in interest-free loans and scholarships to 20 student protesters in October 2024 from schools including Columbia, Harvard, and University of Pennsylvania, the NY Post reports.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f80b7d83-73d2-40c3-af87-eaf253dc2d39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Harvard graduate who assaulted Jewish student received funding:** Ibrahim Bharmal, 29, who was arrested and sentenced to 80 hours of community service for assaulting a Jewish business student during a Harvard protest while volunteering as a "safety marshal," lost his summer law firm placement and diversity scholarship worth $115,000 but received funding from CAIR and now works as an immigration rights fellow at CAIR-Los Angeles.
* **DOJ probing CAIR-CA over alleged misuse of federal funds:** The Department of Justice and California Fair Political Practices Commission are investigating CAIR-California over alleged financial misrepresentation, including $7.2 million in taxpayer cash intended to settle 1,800 Afghan refugees between 2022-2024 that only helped 177 refugees (less than 10%), with much of the money unaccounted for in official filings, prompting demands for a forensic audit of the charity that received over $17 million in donations in 2023.

* * *
# **Federal judges block Texas republican redistricting plan over gerrymandering claims**
Three federal judges halted a Republican-crafted **[Texas congressional map](https://substack.com/redirect/2d3e8712-a0bc-452e-ac2d-83e8fd04b641?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Tuesday, determining by 2-1 vote that the redistricting scheme violated federal law through race-based manipulation of district boundaries. The decision forces Texas to abandon its new map and continue using boundaries established in 2021, thwarting GOP plans to gain additional House seats before next year's elections.
* **Bipartisan Ruling:** Trump appointee Judge Jeffrey V. Brown joined Obama appointee Judge David Guaderrama in finding substantial racial gerrymandering evidence after two weeks of testimony, while Reagan appointee Judge Jerry Smith dissented without explanation.
* **State Appeals Planned:** Attorney General Ken Paxton will appeal to the Supreme Court and seek emergency relief to halt the ruling, while Governor Abbott maintains the maps simply reflect conservative voting patterns and reject discrimination claims as baseless.
* **Multi-State Strategy Disrupted:** The decision undermines Trump's push for mid-decade redistricting across Republican states, with Missouri, North Carolina and Ohio already completing new maps while Florida and Kansas consider similar action. Democrats praised Texas legislators who broke quorum for two weeks trying to stop the original bill.

Brown joined Obama appointee Judge David Guaderrama in finding substantial racial gerrymandering evidence after two weeks of testimony, while Reagan appointee Judge Jerry Smith dissented without explanation. State Appeals Planned: Attorney General Ken Paxton will appeal to the Supreme Court and seek emergency relief to halt the ruling, while Governor Abbott maintains the maps simply reflect conservative voting patterns and reject discrimination claims as baseless. Multi-State Strategy Disrupted: The decision undermines Trump's push for mid-decade redistricting across Republican states, with Missouri, North Carolina and Ohio already completing new maps while Florida and Kansas consider similar action. name: Ilhan Omar
subject: my security
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1962%2E791427%2EsveqN0)
Friend, this is not an easy message to write.
As you know, I get a lot of hate from the far-right and conspiracy theorists of all kinds. I deal with constant harassment and threats of violence, both online and in real life.
And when folks like Donald Trump and Nancy Mace constantly attack me with baseless smears, **_the number of threats goes through the roof.**_
That’s why I do everything I can to ensure my safety and the safety of my campaign by hiring a security team.
But the thing is, security is expensive. Way more expensive than you may think. A lot of people assume that as a member of Congress, it is provided to me for free — it’s not.
So, I am coming to you today to humbly ask for your help in providing for the safety and peace of mind of my campaign.
If you can afford it, it would mean the world if you could chip in today and ensure that we have the budget to continue to afford our security detail.
We can’t take a laid-back approach when my safety and the safety of the people around me are on the line. We have to take every threat seriously.
**[Please, chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help us pay for security. I wish I didn’t have to ask. I wish we weren’t in this situation. But the far-right has made it so, and we have to protect ourselves.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov25.AgDe-P&refcode=em251118-1-nor&t=2&akid=1962%2E791427%2EsveqN0)

name: Team Cori
subject: You can’t teach heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251118_heart_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251118_heart_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251118_heart_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251118_heart_act]
We know exactly who Cori is. Cori is the one who always shows up when it matters most. In the summer of 2022, she was with our St. Louis communities during two 1,000-year flooding events that occurred in one week. As our Congresswoman, she camped out on the steps of the U.S. Capitol to protect 11 million people nationwide from eviction during the pandemic.
That’s the kind of leadership St. Louis needs: someone who fights for the people, not corporations.
You can’t teach heart like that.
Meanwhile, Wesley Bell’s 2026 campaign is awash in special interest money, from corporate PACs to AIPAC. He’s failing to deliver results for families in our district, and he’s not showing up when people need him most. Instead, he’s taking money from the very forces that put corporate profits above human lives.
Why are they investing so much money in his campaign? Because when they couldn’t buy off Cori, they found someone they could. Big money donors don’t give away anything without expecting something in return.
St. Louis deserves better. A fighter who shows up, delivers results, and can’t be bought. And early, sustained support from everyday people is how we drown out the noise of their attacks, and prove we can crush big money. Can you help today by donating $5, $10, or whatever you can today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251118_heart_act]

Let’s show these corporate interests that they can’t buy heart. They can’t buy courage. Only the people can power Cori Bush’s fight, and right now, your support makes all the difference.
Thank you,
Team Cori

name: Kellyanne Conway, Senior Advisor
subject: 2025 GOP Wake-Up Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Republicans just got a wake-up call. Kellyanne Conway needs your input to shape the GOP strategy for 2026. |
Fellow American,

I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th?

That was a catastrophe for America.

_Virginia_. _New Jersey_. _New York City_. Even _California_.
We didn't just lose - we got _**lapped**_.

Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026.

**[And if we don't wake up right now, they'll be right.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=53d67ff9fe084f30b4880a40422e0a5b&_e=z9XSL9HJoGW8VwBKBYLypxpAPGTvLz9N6Nh9eUwJ5r6PJkiqaDvSSbkJIn6gVvAsh5jjK8FrI9VvXa7q7OncF5GgqOIX6YTJN8c4xPzBf6zezeY3a1mkpe6dky79Ay3CC7CM87m6ExY2dHfScK862TkNzdPfoYU9v-NWlAR3KJuB_1_aNw27nuGyoDZjkNMF4-038GgMvNHWTTcN7IVBQgBZeKJb2rKKy2O8u2Ah_TIGICeoDGOOBgG7uQ_oCPRBcSbfaSxqiF7k7sK0vQZQrpeDLSl_ceUrU-hPxPupaGoT1zHKvPRP2RHWx1Qk59HVr53twO7Bp3jSZYPGtZQbnLP462-OTEqGX6UMr_aoN1cu5-xoLzCoacKVGZNWuOKqD_IoLIx3TmmaapUUG-MjgpqxAH0N2wPIvHlrUQUlyFiYZk0KHlY76dF9EWGxFa7mtjRSuzOPbbme5Dw_nCfty4ModEWolN2EbB_2j2HPSqMGZu4LYpa74pti8Uw7aYPs2TAFTNNlmR2yGjEvJhJvDkCpcrFz-OLTaovafhdVIcQEPWZlj1j7TJGdMUbndHtn9FnYV5bYbHPl6KbohPNnIibdQV6gBUV6qXKrWhIeH-UvSV7u-9Z8fnPHxSyNNhu8GGZzWfEZr8nsxORReW6fzlY8C5CxtQ7TWm8faGkxwrzOmyUzhIW1XVN2QFxKjUo0_PI66r_MGR8V6YYzeT_ayurOx1H9z4KrTqzLZQdIBoNYWupK2190JfKMhVF0RQovi2ebDOtYWV12l3AQc_AiwmxmNnXR8a87dRY_J_TWHwapBLHYW377y5_YgDL4Op4X55mTVSd7dmkc-XoY6dI9tpRrANf_ZqjkcGSlCHeXhAfho6KR87sUCUMqhUVoWK_axCEXgompnPsy9fxcvCXAv93wD2MZx8jX-Vh_8mZF2BkutWxdo660aWV3J242oepx)**

**I don't sugarcoat the truth: the Republican Party is bleeding out in blue states, and the ripple effect is coming for our majority.** We've got the better ideas, the stronger record, and the momentum - but we're losing the messaging war.

That's where you come in.

I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate.

**[Complete your 2025 Election Aftermath Survey right now. >>](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=53d67ff9fe084f30b4880a40422e0a5b&_e=z9XSL9HJoGW8VwBKBYLypxpAPGTvLz9N6Nh9eUwJ5r6PJkiqaDvSSbkJIn6gVvAsh5jjK8FrI9VvXa7q7OncF5GgqOIX6YTJN8c4xPzBf6zezeY3a1mkpe6dky79Ay3CC7CM87m6ExY2dHfScK862TkNzdPfoYU9v-NWlAR3KJuB_1_aNw27nuGyoDZjkNMF4-038GgMvNHWTTcN7IVBQgBZeKJb2rKKy2O8u2Ah_TIGICeoDGOOBgG7uQ_oCPRBcSbfaSxqiF7k7sK0vQZQrpeDLSl_ceUrU-hPxPupaGoT1zHKvPRP2RHWx1Qk59HVr53twO7Bp3jSZYPGtZQbnLP462-OTEqGX6UMr_aoN1fzoVjSPYhA7h-iQkka37aPxuk55tSNrHpLyxUwMgEyXH5UanaL7n-oWkJXsCxVAAypeG6wYUas8Xi_hYApjT3JWV3cc4bJgvVgARP_hD_T4zU2qponEZeP9URgHHE2wyAx9K0XlTyB2XEuezAhIgCHpzgCFy5UtnHupsVQdosx1NhMLC3T1FZmzzPIR1VyAhAMNzyO7cwacSh1lErMKtJbaqHGRNjtuUqDAGhbD7UyJrc2l9dgd-FW6KI5RJGnCoTCu8tdykLrapncAQscAK7tu8TkyLeJ-BGvWNsL1YlwjPpgolmebf5ot8YiyxR9HuCtVXMOu6Jb9FvAODPJPfaExduCqjCIRIk2VJda2AnO_SohIe7HkzRDyUTrQ1kfePLIyzYcnLeD6CHXS2GQ4bKM661HlzMTbCPcQ0_TQtfMJ3szAq43sZclsHT7QhciEJRuuUGhxDH9gWC2id-NR38F_BrZg1yEc2nboROKHrdw0UT7Fir-ajasJ1_04UJw6R_jf2L8k63-biwYTdaiZbmZ8pZ1qtMJwBnzEAK4LGAddncr7BCCpkkF3bfk7Vpo8VGyD_UuAb7g-6UVelhy8Br7)**

Your answers will help guide strategy, funding, and messaging in the most competitive races in America.

[**COMPLETE AFTERMATH ASSESSMENT →**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=53d67ff9fe084f30b4880a40422e0a5b&_e=z9XSL9HJoGW8VwBKBYLypxpAPGTvLz9N6Nh9eUwJ5r6PJkiqaDvSSbkJIn6gVvAsh5jjK8FrI9VvXa7q7OncF5GgqOIX6YTJN8c4xPzBf6zezeY3a1mkpe6dky79Ay3CC7CM87m6ExY2dHfScK862TkNzdPfoYU9v-NWlAR3KJuB_1_aNw27nuGyoDZjkNMF4-038GgMvNHWTTcN7IVBQgBZeKJb2rKKy2O8u2Ah_TIGICeoDGOOBgG7uQ_oCPRBcSbfaSxqiF7k7sK0vQZQrpeDLSl_ceUrU-hPxPupaGoT1zHKvPRP2RHWx1Qk59HVr53twO7Bp3jSZYPGtZQbnLP462-OTEqGX6UMr_aoN1doUo7xbLNsTVKlOpAdmLCy6iPKedEQsCDsBg_ytIlkfCFEBAuc1KJ-epEhFye4hRsEpk_q9ZQ7U_x2PQroR-sXsBmZGqvHmrClZaGm2du3yfVIVdYPSG69nIKjxvqaFBtVzdV6MkA2bEZo7ihNBf7ZihW1c5fZz7mF7qssO5lvsY7DJr23dIqMoeDK5g-DpxgQ99Rxi6__tPJ0h2UOVDNA34GKlplZushRjb5mHLVHfiPehZz772fSi1TC2k0MXMDl7fAS6t2PBN4UZKAbMG7m2OyLeXpZXAlxL2Ljel-e0pBJfIwslSlwzyDlt8VBrLQ1u27lqQVtMtJwDYvuJMEO5GhZ72Wjf3W9xX6wnK3XvnNnO1TBHsUto2eJambi3dsrMt-yfdKkAZ0Mhc4kYeAcp8CdJjh8pvJWtELEb_QYNeCNPAVVglscgsI5vBIKsL9hl4Dos7Lj5HX4SCDF_o5-D9v2sgT6qdNNyQykIOICSvu3-MKU6E9lPjrURaKZ1u94C1vYAkPnx1YPHaMx4NAec9I1JA4rU7-sAOBImkhZV0A1LSHhoqrw8CmbVAgbp4cNf8zjlEJtR6L8hvAD5JlT)

clean_body: Republicans just got a wake-up call. Kellyanne Conway needs your input to shape the GOP strategy for 2026. | Fellow American, I've seen plenty of elections in my lifetime — but what happened on November 4th? That was a catastrophe for America. Virginia. New Jersey. New York City. Even California. We didn't just lose - we got lapped. Democrats are already dancing in the streets, convinced they've found the playbook to take back the Senate in 2026. I don't sugarcoat the truth: the Republican Party is bleeding out in blue states, and the ripple effect is coming for our majority. We've got the better ideas, the stronger record, and the momentum - but we're losing the messaging war. That's where you come in. I've teamed up with the Senate Republicans to sound the alarm and refocus our movement on what matters most: winning back the voters we lost and holding the line in the Senate. Your answers will help guide strategy, funding, and messaging in the most competitive races in America. The Democrats are organized, funded, and fired up. We need to match their energy. Every second we delay is another inch they take. For America, - Kellyanne Conway If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Jermaine Johnson
subject: I’m taking on Nancy Mace. Will you join me?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1]
Peter, I’m gonna cut right to the chase:
South Carolina deserves better than Nancy Mace.
While families are working two jobs just to make ends meet, she's in Washington chasing cameras, picking fights on cable news, and auditioning for her next viral clip. She’s turned public service into self-promotion - and it’s costing South Carolinians every single day.
I’m Dr. Jermaine Johnson, and I’m running for Governor of South Carolina because I’m sick of seeing politicians like Nancy Mace play games while our roads crumble, our schools struggle, and our families fall further behind.
Will you split a donation between me and Real Texas PAC to help me take on the establishment and FIGHT for South Carolina families? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Jermaine Johnson and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?express_lane=true&refcode=102925_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?express_lane=true&refcode=102925_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?express_lane=true&refcode=102925_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?express_lane=true&refcode=102925_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?express_lane=true&refcode=102925_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1&amount=25]
Nancy Mace talks tough, but she doesn’t deliver.
She says one thing in South Carolina and does the opposite in Washington. She complains about inflation, then sides with the same extremists driving up costs. She rails about “freedom,” then votes to cut healthcare for the people who need it most.
All that posturing might get her a lot of media attention, but it doesn’t do a damn thing for the hardworking families of South Carolina.
South Carolina deserves a governor who won’t sell out for airtime, but who’ll walk across the aisle, grab folks by the hand, and pull this state forward. If you’re ready to leave the circus behind and start building something real, chip in any amount you can to join this campaign and help me bring true leadership back to South Carolina. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1]
Thanks for stepping up - let’s get this done,
Jermaine Johnson
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jermaine?refcode=102925_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=vRPhREShlnfmw9zSqgvmdkkWir7%2BwcUpT5OOOe4k0lXtET8SQJj5hmOXDazTtjalwNiqy1lK2%2FNkPhl4SZrmQKbXkvlJUR3aqKEQR%2BhLMEZxcrZnYs%2B%2FPkwWIID6laCAOQfF%2FuC%2FHi5CPj%2FYggcCxqCcu1aYV6dniaCJBVgPyHwV75nL%2FWE1pOpvmQwnp69VGfRWn1TWidfCWz7HM5RGO0MVeQ9407qrR3L9ejwGGbiO62GXqTQ0Vyw19USAodwJmjVd4iIvkGw9r9tDt0bvm9K9Sr7z6OljXB0EciQrQWY0F%2B8Z%2FaGra6dSemMiGF9cZlHuMD16ZRWl%2B2wqpD1uPMRFlVuVk9rbhk3dQK%2FwkGkEGPHvsJLbGoRkTaDxP8cmGuBs8lbEtTU5Zo1WWjxl%2FEpv0w37IIcwfDUp8nXSxFI%3D .

body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMU_BeZcmRBr16dPjlrMKhhjiC51ataw3Peft1wIO87ITSxjytRqnk5Se65PvvR0SC1Vi60eIcmGaf4kR6MPJnbRGd2XwIrhDn8ZZ-Z4PPuO0Vx2PdmM8zh_l0Ht__s0eBMHT_WEKtma9Kfww_9iRR30Hl3qyFwcK6fm0WwVyWYsruPTugK9FUVC7ZCYhmv0iE7M-E8Qt5p0xVHF45D33Ra4-VbO24VPZwCLdkrhMjlwuYwFmSIC63dWnhpUAp7Wp5w/4lp/Cc52h7CzRhWUEyC6u30RFw/h0/h001.b_Q4oObVOkWqMGgtI_xEN15ZL4BH_a8i5jLGXGEVx2E)
---
Peter,

I have some news that confirms what many of you have already been feeling: **voters in WA-03 are ready for change**. A new poll from Gravis Marketing shows that 46% of voters in WA-03 have an unfavorable opinion of our incumbent congresswoman. Worse? When voters learn about Marie Gluesenkamp Perez's actual voting record -- her votes against reproductive freedom and for Trump's mass deportation machine -- her support plummets to 17%. The poll surveyed likely primary voters, 52% of whom voted for MGP in the 2024 general election. But if the 2026 general election were held today, only 17% would still cast their ballot for Marie. **That's a massive erosion of trust in just one year**. Things got worse after the poll was conducted. Marie caved to MAGA and voted in favor of the Republican continuing resolution, surrendering all the leverage that Democrats held to protect our healthcare. But even that wasn't sinking low enough. Marie chose the moment of that vote, with her own capitulation in the spotlight, to stage a theatrical floor performance chastising Democratic Rep. Chuy Garcia. Both her fellow House Democrats and constituents (like me!) here in Southwest Washington were understandably furious. Marie won't fight for the families who are going to lose their healthcare, but she will yell at a fellow Democrat who is medically retiring next year? Here's the bottom line: We MUST win the House back next year, and **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez has put that at serious risk. ** **Our campaign is the best choice for Democrats to retain this seat**. This same poll found that 26% of voters would vote for me if the election were held today, and 22% remain undecided. [**That means we can win this race, but we have work to do. Our biggest challenge is that not enough voters know about our campaign yet, and you can help fix that. Donate today to help me expand our voter outreach program.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH8aQhQzL-6XFLiJ1IzrYZqHcVu3_2xEWSSvdjjDmkiSUAlljXsVBexNA2vfYVtDF75UlcwAF3Lqnta8hW5bOJxLv3gZndEHkPIhzLpn8uxnqIr1yPq3UTf21tyrnqXary4jhKEIFxi0PmQqkrNFHQxh7nPGh_IJjKT0ZDK3Be3cv3FzHJPNXC9YcqIQHLpSW0NqaUvIrWnUQ7Plp8B9KC78cUAs630sZQMF5q-Xl2jYv9-dN9kctPhqZFlDFQhDwTC1NqLee32Jr9UCml4-ob-i3ZPMxCiaUiFomfJUjefhOGcajdoPnLNDIb_SeitIiISuyBljXGATSKEO4kY1AgC0Q/4lp/Cc52h7CzRhWUEyC6u30RFw/h1/h001.fFwXc2DMS0MqIPImD6Vs0IT6kC0St9AblysLQqd8XCY) I'm a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. I was inspired to run for Congress after Republicans went to war on reproductive freedom having nearly lost my wife Amber to a pregnancy complication 13 years ago. That experience opened my eyes to how our broken healthcare system fails families when they need it most, and how Republican policies - that Marie continuously votes for - put lives at risk. We deserve a representative who fights for the rights and safety of families here in Southwest Washington. Someone who is willing to take on MAGA Republicans and the affordability crisis exploding here in WA-03, and across the country.
---

body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Peter,
---
| | My new book, **[_No Turning Back_ : Living as a Faithful Witness Until the Last Day](https://links.seanfeuchtministries.com/s/c/bBKWkrKQCu0THA66L7zeow5SLhsZPK4wGBzyBh0w8TnPnyoBB6JIDcrMvFjBwa506AMRQHz2PbDXQBUbbi2aAXtHJwbh-40Gmtsc3W2_nt186XMX7mw6U076KpiswmTSGB0G1FzEt9AMCKXHarne9IZTeotEuyR1a3-BmljtPeOgT9rjf8SNhVnduZk9ztQXo9UBE-sL8F2lC0AUI00HJq5qGPMwNJRX2U140CV4S8xeWxUZfiXGoy55Xq1l8sl-QOLllm2C9FwiXwiKUS7J2OXLKBoxUxye9swTLTjUeZML-FGvLRe-k3YeSEe80kC8_yGprA44BgnVGAjZQVSmNs2fyrMYbqk0CTH-x78I3WPLw2DxsWloQZcJj5a9xV9BeXefN3A_VEvyY6ZeAtnAx4nAXQ9-n0E/L0MfKg-FFjaFoRaRAyhb8IvpjaU-SHPa/15)**, is available for pre-order! We live in trying times. And the uncertainty that surrounds our daily lives seems to increase each day. But we as believers must live prepared for Christ’s return—not with fear, but on a mission. The Lord put on my heart a desire to encourage Believers with a prophetic blueprint for a generation called to stand strong.

| | I poured my heart and soul into this book. Sleepless nights, prayers, fasting, and groanings that words can’t utter, and I believe it is a word of the Lord for this season.
